meanings.example_cn: 《Hello!》杂志的封面

meanings.meaning_cn: 结冰的，冻硬的；（食物）冷冻的，冷藏的；冻坏的，冻僵的；吓呆的，惊呆的；（行为、态度等）冷淡的
结冰；凝固（freeze 的过去分词形式）

meanings.meaning_en: something that grows on a plant, tree, or bush, can be eaten as a food, contains seeds or a stone, and is usually sweet
meanings.example: Try to eat plenty of fresh fruit .
meanings.example_cn: 尽量多吃新鲜水果。

meanings.meaning_en: to cook something in hot fat or oil, or to be cooked in hot fat or oil
meanings.example: Fry the potatoes, covered, for about 20 minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 盖上盖，将马铃薯煎20分钟左右。

meanings.meaning_cn: 煎锅：一种带有手柄的金属平底锅，用于煎炸食物。
meanings.example: He put the frying pan on the gas burner.
meanings.example_cn: 他把煎锅放到煤气灶上。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance such as coal, gas, or oil that can be burned to produce heat or energy
meanings.example: Coal is one of the cheapest fuels.
meanings.example_cn: 煤是最廉价的燃料之一。

meanings.meaning_en: if you fuel a vehicle, or if it fuels up, fuel is put into it
meanings.example: We’d better fuel up at the next town.
meanings.example_cn: 我们最好在下个小镇加油。

meanings.meaning_en: containing as much or as many things or people as possible, so there is no space left
meanings.example: The train was completely full.
meanings.example_cn: 火车坐得满满的。

meanings.example: I call them a beautiful full stop.
meanings.example_cn: 我称他们为“美妙的句号”。

meanings.meaning_cn: 全职：指全天工作或全日制学习，没有其他兼职或业余活动。
meanings.example: The referee blew his whistle for full time.
meanings.example_cn: 裁判吹响了比赛结束的哨音。

meanings.meaning_cn: 专职的；全日制的；全部时间的
meanings.example: How many full-time staff have we got?
meanings.example_cn: 我们有多少全职员工？

meanings.meaning_en: completely
meanings.example: The restaurant is fully booked this evening.
meanings.example_cn: 今晚这家餐厅订满了。

meanings.meaning_en: an experience or activity that is very enjoyable and exciting
meanings.example: There’s plenty of fun for all the family.
meanings.example_cn: 可以让全家人玩得很开心。

meanings.meaning_en: making you laugh
meanings.example: the funniest man in Britain
meanings.example_cn: 英国最滑稽的男人

meanings.meaning_en: the thick soft hair that covers the bodies of some animals, such as cats, dogs, and rabbits
meanings.example: a fur coat
meanings.example_cn: 裘皮大衣

meanings.meaning_cn: 家具；装置；惯常的见解；贮藏物，内容；步枪底托；（排版用的）大空铅，填空材料

meanings.meaning_en: a greater distance, or beyond a particular place
meanings.example: They walked a little further.
meanings.example_cn: 他们又往前走了一点。

meanings.meaning_en: more
meanings.example: They’ve never been further south than San Diego.
meanings.example_cn: 他们从没有到过比圣迭戈更往南的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: the time after the present
meanings.example: What are your plans for the future?
meanings.example_cn: 你未来有什么打算？

meanings.meaning_en: to obtain or achieve something you want or need
meanings.example: After gaining independence in 1957, it was renamed ‘Ghana’.
meanings.example_cn: 1957年获得独立后，该国改名为“加纳”。

meanings.meaning_en: an increase in the amount or level of something
meanings.example: Carrie’s gained a lot of weight recently.
meanings.example_cn: 卡丽的体重最近增加了很多。

meanings.meaning_en: a large building where people can see famous pieces of art
meanings.example: an art/a picture gallery
meanings.example_cn: 美术馆；绘画陈列室

meanings.meaning_en: an activity or sport in which people compete with each other according to agreed rules
meanings.example: The boys were playing a game in the backyard.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩们在后院里玩游戏。

meanings.meaning_en: a space between two objects or two parts of an object, especially because something is missing
meanings.example: a gap in the traffic
meanings.example_cn: 车流中的一个空档

meanings.meaning_en: a building for keeping a car in, usually next to or attached to a house
meanings.example: I’ll just go and put the car in the garage.
meanings.example_cn: 我把车停到车库去。

meanings.meaning_en: piece of land next to or around your house where you can grow flowers, fruit, vegetables, etc., usually with an area of grass(called a lawn )
meanings.example: He’s outside in the garden.
meanings.example_cn: 他在外面花园里。

meanings.meaning_en: a plant like a small onion, used in cooking to give a strong taste
meanings.example: Add a crushed clove of garlic (= single section of it ).
meanings.example_cn: 加一瓣压碎的大蒜。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance such as air, which is not solid or liquid, and usually cannot be seen
meanings.example: hydrogen gas
meanings.example_cn: 氢气

meanings.meaning_cn: 加油站：一家零售加油站，为机动车提供汽油和机油等服务，也称为服务站。
meanings.example: One day, Monet stopped at the gas station to refuel.
meanings.example_cn: 一天，莫奈在加油站加油。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a fence or outside wall that you can open and close so that you can enter or leave a place
meanings.example: We went through the gate into the orchard.
meanings.example_cn: 我们穿过大门进了果园。

meanings.meaning_en: affecting all or most people, places or things
meanings.example: There has been a general decline in standards.
meanings.example_cn: 道德水准普遍下降。

meanings.meaning_en: an officer of very high rank in the army or air force
meanings.example: ways to improve your general health
meanings.example_cn: 全面提高身体素质的方法

meanings.meaning_en: used to introduce a statement that is true in most cases but not always
meanings.example: Generally speaking, the more expensive the stereo, the better it is.
meanings.example_cn: 一般说来，立体声音响越贵的越好。

meanings.meaning_en: all people of about the same age
meanings.example: Like most of my generation, I had never known a war.
meanings.example_cn: 和我们这一代的大多数人一样，我并没有经历过战争。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is generous is willing to give money, spend time etc, in order to help people or give them pleasure
meanings.example: a generous glass of wine
meanings.example_cn: 一大杯葡萄酒

meanings.meaning_en: kind and careful in the way you behave or do things, so that you do not hurt or damage anyone or anything
meanings.example: Arthur was a very gentle, caring person.
meanings.example_cn: 阿瑟是一个非常温柔体贴的人。

meanings.meaning_en: the study of the countries, oceans, rivers, mountains, cities etc of the world
meanings.example: a geography lesson
meanings.example_cn: 地理课

meanings.meaning_cn: 获得，得到；到达；变成，成为
meanings.meaning_en: to obtain something by finding it, asking for it, or paying for it
meanings.example: We need to get help quickly!
meanings.example_cn: 我们需要马上得到帮助！

meanings.meaning_cn: 报复，报仇：指为了报复而采取行动，通常与“at”连用。
meanings.example: I really need to get back in form.
meanings.example_cn: 我实在需要恢复状态。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重新获得，收回：指重新取回某物的所有权或控制权。
meanings.example: See yer when I get back.
meanings.example_cn: 等我回来时再见吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 回到，返回：指再次去某个人、地方或状态。
meanings.example: Then life started to get back to normal.
meanings.example_cn: 后来生活又开始恢复到正常状态。

meanings.example: She yelled at the child to get down from the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 她喊着让小孩从墙上下来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使沮丧：使身体、心理或情绪筋疲力尽。
meanings.example: I like to get down to work by 9.
meanings.example_cn: 我喜欢在9点之前开始工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 写下：将某事物记录下来。
meanings.example: Let's get down to business.
meanings.example_cn: 咱们开始干正事吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 下车：特指从车辆中下来。
meanings.example: She yelled at the child to get down from the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 她喊着让小孩从墙上下来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 专注于：集中注意力或考虑某事物。
meanings.example: She yelled at the child to get down from the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 她喊着让小孩从墙上下来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 表演音乐或舞蹈：有效而有感染力地表演音乐或舞蹈。
meanings.example: She yelled at the child to get down from the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 她喊着让小孩从墙上下来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 狂欢作乐：尽情享受派对或娱乐活动。
meanings.example: She yelled at the child to get down from the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 她喊着让小孩从墙上下来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 变得健康：通过锻炼和保持良好的身体状况来改善健康和体能。
meanings.example: You get fit by playing the game, day in, day out, morning, noon and night.
meanings.example_cn: 每日坚持做这项运动，你就会变得健壮。

meanings.meaning_cn: 到达：指到达某个地方或目的地。
meanings.example: Get in! There's bags of room.
meanings.example_cn: 进来吧！地方很空。

meanings.meaning_cn: 变得友好：指与某人建立友好关系。
meanings.example: What did you get in the mock?
meanings.example_cn: 你的模拟考试得了多少分？

meanings.meaning_cn: 加入：指成为某个组织的成员或被选为某个职位。
meanings.example: 'Get in here now!' she bawled.
meanings.example_cn: “马上进来！”她嚷道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 成功做到：指成功完成某个任务、制作某个产品或交付某个物品。
meanings.example: Get in! There's bags of room.
meanings.example_cn: 进来吧！地方很空。

meanings.meaning_cn: 纳入日程：指将某事安排在自己的日程中。
meanings.example: Get in! There's bags of room.
meanings.example_cn: 进来吧！地方很空。

meanings.meaning_cn: 进入：指进入某个地方或物体。
meanings.example: Get in! There's bags of room.
meanings.example_cn: 进来吧！地方很空。

meanings.meaning_cn: 1、下车：从交通工具（如公共汽车、火车、自行车等）上下来。
meanings.example: I told you. Get off the farm.
meanings.example_cn: 我告诉过你，离开农场。

meanings.example: Just get off my back, will you!
meanings.example_cn: 请别烦我了好吗！

meanings.meaning_cn: 3、离开：离开某个地方或停止做某事。
meanings.example: I get off at the next station.
meanings.example_cn: 我在下一站下车。

meanings.meaning_cn: 获得知识或理解：指获得知识或理解某事物。
meanings.example: Can we just get on with it, huh?
meanings.example_cn: 我们能继续干下去吗，啊？

meanings.meaning_cn: 与某人相处融洽：指与某人相处融洽或与某人合作。
meanings.example: Where do we get on the bus?
meanings.example_cn: 我们在哪儿上公共汽车？

meanings.meaning_cn: 摆脱：采取行动以消除或不再受到（不需要的事物或人）的影响或困扰。
meanings.example: I began to suspect (that) they were trying to get rid of me.
meanings.example_cn: 我开始觉察出，他们试图摆脱掉我。

meanings.meaning_cn: 起立：指从坐或躺的姿势变为站立的姿势。
meanings.example: "Brigid!" she screamed. "Get up!"
meanings.example_cn: “布里吉德！”她尖声叫道。“起床！”

meanings.meaning_cn: 爬起，攀登：指从地面或低处向上移动，尤指攀登山峰或爬上高处。
meanings.example: I generally get up at six.
meanings.example_cn: 我一般六点钟起床。

meanings.meaning_cn: 起床：指从床上离开，开始新的一天。
meanings.example: We've got to get up early, all right?
meanings.example_cn: 我们得早起床，可以吧？

meanings.meaning_cn: 装扮，打扮：指为了特定场合或目的而精心打扮。
meanings.example: "Brigid!" she screamed. "Get up!"
meanings.example_cn: “布里吉德！”她尖声叫道。“起床！”

meanings.meaning_cn: 编造，虚构：指创造或编造出某种情况、故事或借口。
meanings.example: "Brigid!" she screamed. "Get up!"
meanings.example_cn: “布里吉德！”她尖声叫道。“起床！”

meanings.meaning_cn: 〔儿童故事中的〕巨人；巨人；巨物
meanings.meaning_en: an extremely tall strong man, who is often bad and cruel, in children’s stories
meanings.example: a Nordic saga of giants
meanings.example_cn: 一部关于巨人的北欧传奇

meanings.meaning_en: something that you give someone, for example to thank them or because you like them, especially on a special occasion
meanings.example: The earrings were a gift from my aunt.
meanings.example_cn: 这副耳环是我姑姑送给我的礼物。

meanings.example: I met a girlfriend for lunch.
meanings.example_cn: 我和一个女伴一起吃了午饭。

meanings.example: I had lunch with a girlfriend.
meanings.example_cn: 我同女友一起吃的午饭。

meanings.meaning_en: used with a noun to describe a particular action, giving the same meaning as the related verb
meanings.example: She gave a shrug of her shoulders (= she shrugged ) .
meanings.example_cn: 她停下工作抬起头来打了个哈欠。

meanings.meaning_cn: 归还：将东西送回或归还给原主。
meanings.example: What? I was trying to give back your bag! You dropped it.
meanings.example_cn: 什么？我只是想把包还给你！你把它弄掉了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 回报：以某种方式回报或报答。
meanings.example: The young man always wanted to give back, even when he was close to death.
meanings.example_cn: 这个年轻人即使接近死亡时，也总是想要回报社会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 宣布，发布：指宣布或发布某事物，使其为公众所知。
meanings.example: He wouldn't give out any information.
meanings.example_cn: 他不会宣布任何消息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发出，散发：指释放或散发出某种物质或能量。
meanings.example: Could you please teach me how to give out "red envelope" on WeChat?
meanings.example_cn: 你能教我如何在微信上发“红包”吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 分发，发放：指分发或发放某物给他人。
meanings.example: The teenagers often help give out water and food to those people in need.
meanings.example_cn: 这些青少年经常帮助分发水和食物给那些有需要的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 耗尽，用完：指某物的数量或能量被完全消耗或用尽。
meanings.example: He wouldn't give out any information.
meanings.example_cn: 他不会宣布任何消息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 出故障，失效：指某物因损坏或故障而无法正常工作。
meanings.example: He wouldn't give out any information.
meanings.example_cn: 他不会宣布任何消息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 放弃：指放弃对某物的控制或拥有，尤其是被迫放弃工作。
meanings.example: I give up—tell me the answer.
meanings.example_cn: 我放弃了，把答案告诉我吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 放弃，抛弃：指停止做某事或尝试某事，特别是作为失败的承认。
meanings.example: Did he give up or keep on trying?
meanings.example_cn: 他是放弃了，还是在继续努力？

meanings.example: He counselled them to give up the plan.
meanings.example_cn: 他建议他们放弃此项计划。

meanings.meaning_cn: 沉溺于某种感觉、影响或活动：指全身心地投入到某种感觉、影响或活动中。
meanings.example: I give up—tell me the answer.
meanings.example_cn: 我放弃了，把答案告诉我吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 对……绝望：指对看到某人/某物的希望感到绝望。
meanings.example: I give up—tell me the answer.
meanings.example_cn: 我放弃了，把答案告诉我吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 让路：指在交通中主动让出道路给其他车辆或行人。
meanings.example: There is a zebra crossing but cars will never stop and give way.
meanings.example_cn: 马路上有斑马线，但是汽车永远不会停下来让路。

meanings.meaning_cn: 屈服，让步：指在面对压力或要求时屈服或让步。
meanings.example: We felt the ground give way under our feet.
meanings.example_cn: 我们感觉到脚下的土地下陷了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 崩溃，倒塌：指在承受压力或力量时崩溃或倒塌。
meanings.example: He refused to give way on any of the points.
meanings.example_cn: 他拒绝在任何一点上让步。

meanings.meaning_en: pleased and happy about something
meanings.example: We’re so glad you came.
meanings.example_cn: 你来了我们真高兴。

meanings.meaning_en: to quickly look at someone or something
meanings.example: Wyatt glanced around the restaurant.
meanings.example_cn: 怀亚特环视了一下餐馆。

meanings.meaning_en: a quick look
meanings.example: Emily glanced over her shoulder.
meanings.example_cn: 埃米莉回头看了一眼。

meanings.meaning_en: a transparent solid substance used for making windows, bottles etc
meanings.example: a glass bowl
meanings.example_cn: 玻璃碗

meanings.meaning_cn: 玻璃杯; 眼镜（glass 的复数）
meanings.example: He wore green-tinted glasses.
meanings.example_cn: 他戴着染成绿色的眼镜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 把……装入玻璃容器内; 给……装上玻璃（glass 的第三人称单数）
meanings.example: Sunlight glinted on his glasses.
meanings.example_cn: 阳光在他的眼镜上闪光。

meanings.meaning_cn: 全球变暖：指地球表面温度逐渐上升的现象，主要原因是人类活动导致的温室气体排放增加。
meanings.example: Global warming is a real problem.
meanings.example_cn: 全球变暖是个确实存在的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing that you wear on your hand in order to protect it or keep it warm
meanings.example: a pair of gloves
meanings.example_cn: 一副手套

meanings.meaning_en: to move in a particular way, or to do something as you are moving
meanings.example: The plate went crashing to the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 盘子哗啦一声掉在地板上。

meanings.example: I think I'll go for a swim.
meanings.example_cn: 我想去游泳。

meanings.example: Let's go for a drink, yaar!
meanings.example_cn: 咱们去喝一杯吧，朋友！

meanings.example: When can we go for a swim?
meanings.example_cn: 我们什么时候可以去游泳？

meanings.meaning_cn: 突然爆炸或发出巨响：指突然爆炸或发出巨响。
meanings.example: What time do you go off duty?
meanings.example_cn: 你什么时候下班？

meanings.meaning_cn: 离开，离去：指离开或离去。
meanings.example: He heard the alarm go off.
meanings.example_cn: 他听见警报器响了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 变坏，变质：指变坏或变质。
meanings.example: He had never been afraid of failure: he was a gambler, ready to go off somewhere else and start all over again.
meanings.example_cn: 他从不害怕失败：他是个冒险家，随时准备去别的地方重新开始。

meanings.meaning_cn: 按预期或期望进行，进行下去：指按照预期或期望进行，进行下去。
meanings.example: What time do you go off duty?
meanings.example_cn: 你什么时候下班？

meanings.meaning_cn: 发出特定的声音：指发出特定的声音。
meanings.example: What time do you go off duty?
meanings.example_cn: 你什么时候下班？

meanings.meaning_cn: 继续：持续进行某个动作或状态。
meanings.example: Tickets go on sale this week.
meanings.example_cn: 票本周开始出售。

meanings.meaning_cn: 进行：继续或进行某个活动或事件。
meanings.example: The shoes go on the shoe shelf.
meanings.example_cn: 鞋子应该放在鞋架上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发生：事件或情况正在进行或发生。
meanings.example: It won't go on beyond midnight.
meanings.example_cn: 这事不会延续到午夜以后。

meanings.meaning_cn: 夸夸其谈：滔滔不绝地说话，尤指夸大其词。
meanings.example: Tickets go on sale this week.
meanings.example_cn: 票本周开始出售。

meanings.meaning_cn: 继续前进：继续或像进行旅程一样继续前进。
meanings.example: Tickets go on sale this week.
meanings.example_cn: 票本周开始出售。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you hope to achieve in the future
meanings.example: Your goal as a parent is to help your child become an independent adult.
meanings.example_cn: 身为父母，你的目标就是要培养孩子成为独立的成年人。

meanings.example: The goalkeeper made a dive for the ball.
meanings.example_cn: 守门员一个鱼跃向球扑去。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that has horns on top of its head and long hair under its chin, and can climb steep hills and rocks. Goats live wild in the mountains or are kept as farm animals.
meanings.example: The tiger sprang on the goat.
meanings.example_cn: 老虎向山羊扑去。

meanings.meaning_en: a valuable soft yellow metal that is used to make coins, jewellery etc. It is a chemical element: symbol Au
meanings.example: solid gold watches
meanings.example_cn: 纯金手表

meanings.meaning_en: made of gold
meanings.example: gold watch/chain/ring etc
meanings.example_cn: 金表/链/戒指 等

meanings.meaning_en: having a bright yellow colour like gold
meanings.example: golden hair
meanings.example_cn: 金发

meanings.meaning_en: a game in which the players hit a small white ball into holes in the ground with a set of golf clubs, using as few hits as possible
meanings.example: He plays golf on Sundays.
meanings.example_cn: 他星期天都去打高尔夫球。

meanings.meaning_en: of a high standard or quality
meanings.example: a good hotel
meanings.example_cn: 一家不错的宾馆

meanings.meaning_cn: 下午好：用于下午向他人打招呼的相对正式的问候语。
meanings.example: Good afternoon, Miss Maria.
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽亚小姐，下午好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 早上好：用于向早上遇见的人打招呼。
meanings.example: Good morning, sir. Can I help you?
meanings.example_cn: 早上好，先生。您要点什么？

meanings.meaning_cn: 好看的：指外貌令人愉悦或吸引人的。
meanings.example: Women found him charming. It must have been his patter because he's not good-looking.
meanings.example_cn: 女人们觉得他有魅力。这肯定是因为他的顺口溜，因为他并不好看。

meanings.example: ‘What do you think of my new flatmate?’ ‘He’s absolutely gorgeous !’
meanings.example_cn: “你觉得我的新室友怎么样？”“他帅极了！”

meanings.meaning_en: the group of people who govern a country or state
meanings.example: The Government are planning further cuts in public spending.
meanings.example_cn: 政府正计划进一步削减公共支出。

meanings.meaning_en: to take hold of someone or something with a sudden or violent movement
meanings.example: I grabbed my bag and ran off.
meanings.example_cn: 我抓起我的包就跑。

meanings.meaning_en: to say what level of a quality something has, or what standard it is
meanings.example: Pencils are graded according to softness.
meanings.example_cn: 铅笔按软硬度分级。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular level of quality that a product, material etc has
meanings.example: The best grades of tea are expensive.
meanings.example_cn: 最上等的茶叶价格很贵。

meanings.meaning_en: the time when you complete a university degree course or your education at an American  high school
meanings.example: After graduation Neil returned to Ohio.
meanings.example_cn: 尼尔毕业以后回到了俄亥俄州。

meanings.meaning_cn: 语法，文法；（人的）语言知识及运用能力；语法书；语法理论，语法学；（某门类知识和技能的）基本原理；<英，非正式>中学；（计算机）文法
孙子; 孙女; 外孙; 外孙女
meanings.example: She lived to see her first grandchild.
meanings.example_cn: 她一直活到抱上第一个孙子。

meanings.meaning_en: the daughter of your son or daughter
meanings.example: a drawing of my granddaughter Amelia
meanings.example_cn: 一幅我孙女阿梅莉亚的画像

meanings.meaning_en: the father of your father or mother
meanings.example: His grandfather was a professor.
meanings.example_cn: 他爷爷曾是位教授。

meanings.meaning_en: grandmother
meanings.example: Grandma was from Scotland.
meanings.example_cn: 奶奶来自苏格兰。

meanings.example: Grandpa was not yet back from the war.
meanings.example_cn: 爷爷那时还没从战场归来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 祖父或祖母, 祖父母
meanings.meaning_en: one of the parents of your mother or father
meanings.example: My grandparents live in Sussex.
meanings.example_cn: 我的祖父母住在萨塞克斯郡。

meanings.meaning_en: the son of your son or daughter
meanings.example: My grandson's birthday was on Tuesday.
meanings.example_cn: 我孙子的生日是星期二。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奶奶; 外婆; 婆婆妈妈的人
meanings.example: Granny was astounded and a little piqued, I think, because it had all been arranged without her knowledge.
meanings.example_cn: 奶奶很惊讶也有一点生气，我想，因为她对整件事的安排一无所知。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money given to someone, especially by the government, for a particular purpose
meanings.example: The university gets a government grant.
meanings.example_cn: 这所大学获得政府拨款。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone something or allow them to have something that they have asked for
meanings.example: Britain could grant Spain’s request .
meanings.example_cn: 英国可能会同意西班牙的请求。

meanings.meaning_en: one of a number of small round green or purple fruits that grow together on a  vine . Grapes are often used for making wine
meanings.example: a bunch of grapes
meanings.example_cn: 一串葡萄

meanings.example: The U. S. envoy was recalled to Washington.
meanings.example_cn: 该美国特使被召回了华盛顿。

meanings.example: Dave made a U-turn on North Main and drove back to Depot Street.
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫在北干道掉头，把车开回了第伯街。

meanings.meaning_en: having the colour of grass or leaves
meanings.example: beautiful green eyes
meanings.example_cn: 漂亮的碧眼

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of grass and leaves
meanings.example: Raw coffee beans are green in colour.
meanings.example_cn: 生咖啡豆是绿色的。

meanings.meaning_en: to say hello to someone or welcome them
meanings.example: Belinda greeted her warmly.
meanings.example_cn: 贝琳达热情地招呼她。

meanings.meaning_cn: 欢迎，迎接；对……作出反应；映入眼帘，扑鼻而来（greet 的现在分词形式）

meanings.meaning_en: having the colour of dark clouds, neither black nor white
meanings.example: an old lady with grey hair
meanings.example_cn: 头发灰白的老太太

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of dark clouds, neither black nor white
meanings.example: a grey sky
meanings.example_cn: 灰色的天空

meanings.meaning_cn: 烤架, 铁格子, 烤肉
meanings.meaning_en: a part of a  cooker  in which strong heat from above cooks food on a metal shelf below
meanings.example: Pop it under the grill for five minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 把它放在烤架下烤五分钟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 炙烤（grill 的过去式和过去分词）

meanings.example: 'Hello, Paul,' they chorused.
meanings.example_cn: “你好，保罗。”他们齐声问候道。

meanings.example: Hello, Peter, it's Mike here.
meanings.example_cn: 喂，彼得，我是迈克。

meanings.example: Hello, this is John Thompson.
meanings.example_cn: 你好，我是约翰·汤普森。

meanings.meaning_en: to clean and brush an animal, especially a horse
meanings.example: The horses were exercised and groomed with special care.
meanings.example_cn: 这些马受到特殊的训练和照料。

meanings.meaning_en: the solid surface of the earth
meanings.example: I found her lying on the ground.
meanings.example_cn: 我发现她躺在地上。

meanings.meaning_en: several people or things that are all together in the same place
meanings.example: He was surrounded by a group of admirers.
meanings.example_cn: 他的身边围了一群仰慕者。

meanings.meaning_en: to come together and form a group, or to arrange things or people together in a group
meanings.example: The photo shows four men grouped round a jeep.
meanings.example_cn: 照片上是四个男人围着一辆吉普车。

meanings.meaning_en: to become bigger, taller etc over a period of time in the process of becoming an adult
meanings.example: Support for Mr Thompson is growing.
meanings.example_cn: 汤普森先生的支持率在上升。

meanings.meaning_cn: 长大：指在身体或心智上达到完全成熟的状态。
meanings.example: These days kids grow up so quickly.
meanings.example_cn: 如今孩子们成长得真快。

meanings.meaning_en: to protect a person, place, or object by staying near them and watching them
meanings.example: The Sergeant told Swift to guard the entrance.
meanings.example_cn: 中士叫斯威夫特守着入口。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to protect a place or person
meanings.example: a lioness guarding her cubs
meanings.example_cn: 守护着幼狮的母狮

meanings.meaning_en: to try to answer a question or form an opinion when you are not sure whether you will be correct
meanings.example: I’d say he’s around 50, but I’m only guessing.
meanings.example_cn: 我想他50岁左右，不过也只是猜测。

meanings.meaning_en: an attempt to answer a question or make a judgement when you are not sure whether you will be correct
meanings.example: What star sign are you? No, let me guess.
meanings.example_cn: 你是什么星座的？别说，让我来猜猜看。

meanings.meaning_en: a person that you have invited to your house or to a particular event that you are paying for
meanings.example: We have guests staying this weekend.
meanings.example_cn: 这周末我家有客人来住。

meanings.meaning_cn: 小型客栈，廉价宾馆；（大型住宅附近）客房，供客人住的小屋

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to take tourists to a place and show them around
meanings.example: a tour guide
meanings.example_cn: 导游

meanings.meaning_en: to show sb the way to a place, often by going with them
meanings.example: an experienced mountain guide
meanings.example_cn: 一位有经验的登山向导

meanings.meaning_cn: 指南书：一本提供指导的书籍，尤其是为旅行者设计的，提供有关特定国家或地区的本地旅游信息的书籍。
meanings.example: The guide book contains a short write-up of each hotel.
meanings.example_cn: 指南包括对每个酒店的简评。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling very ashamed and sad because you know that you have done something wrong
meanings.example: She looked self-conscious and guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 她看上去很不自然，很内疚的样子。

meanings.example: "I'm a mediocre harmonica player and a worse guitarist, but I had my pick of incredible musicians," says Mr. Anderson.
meanings.example_cn: “我是个平庸的口琴演奏者和糟糕的吉他手，但我挑选出了非常棒的音乐家们。”安德森先生说。

meanings.meaning_cn: （Guitarist）（俄、美、印、丹、澳）纪大力史特（人名）
meanings.example: The guitarist went AWOL in the middle of the recording.
meanings.example_cn: 录音录到一半吉他手溜走了。

meanings.meaning_en: (chewing gum)a sweet/candy that you chew but do not swallow
meanings.example: I do not chew gum in public.
meanings.example_cn: 我不在公共场合嚼口香糖。

meanings.meaning_en: a metal weapon which shoots bullets or shells
meanings.example: I’ve never fired a gun in my life.
meanings.example_cn: 我这辈子从来没开过枪。

meanings.meaning_en: a man
meanings.example: Dave’s a nice guy when you get to know him.
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫是个好人，你了解他后就知道了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 体育馆，健身房; （尤指学校的）体育活动
meanings.example: The commons is next to the gym.
meanings.example_cn: 学生公共食堂在体育馆的旁边。

meanings.meaning_cn: 体操，体操训练；技巧，技能训练
meanings.example: China made a clean sweep of the medals in the gymnastics events.
meanings.example_cn: 中国队在体操比赛中包揽了所有的奖牌。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you do regularly or usually, often without thinking about it because you have done it so many times before
meanings.example: Regular exercise is a good habit.
meanings.example_cn: 经常锻炼是个好习惯。

meanings.meaning_en: the mass of things like fine threads that grows on your head
meanings.example: Her hair was short and dark.
meanings.example_cn: 她的头发又短又黑。

meanings.meaning_en: one of two equal parts of something
meanings.example: Two halves make a whole.
meanings.example_cn: 两个一半构成一个整体。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly or about 50% (1/2) of an amount, time, distance, number etc
meanings.example: Only half the guests had arrived by seven o’clock.
meanings.example_cn: 7点钟前只来了一半客人。

meanings.example: A half-price suit still cost $400.
meanings.example_cn: 一套半价西装仍然花了$400。

meanings.example: By yesterday she was selling off stock at half-price.
meanings.example_cn: 到昨天她一直都在以半价抛售股票。

meanings.example: Main courses are half price from 12:30 p.m. to 2 p.m.
meanings.example_cn: 主菜从下午12：30到2：00是半价。

meanings.meaning_en: the area just inside the door of a house or other building, that leads to other rooms
meanings.example: a huge tiled entrance hall
meanings.example_cn: 铺着地砖的大门厅

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your body at the end of your arm, including your fingers and thumb, that you use to hold things
meanings.example: Steve gripped the steering wheel tightly with both hands.
meanings.example_cn: 史蒂夫双手紧握方向盘。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提交：将作业等交给他人或机构。
meanings.example: Time's up. Stop writing and hand in your papers.
meanings.example_cn: 时间到了。不要再写了，把试卷交上来。

meanings.example: To many people, technology means computers, hand-held devices, or vehicles that travel to distant planets.
meanings.example_cn: 对许多人来说，技术意味着计算机、手持设备或者是飞往遥远星球的交通工具。

meanings.meaning_cn: 手提包：指一种小型手提行李。
meanings.example: Lorin: Yes, a hand bag and an overcoat.
meanings.example_cn: 劳瑞恩：一个手提包和一件大衣。

meanings.meaning_cn: 钱包：指用于携带钱币、信用卡等小物件的小型袋子。
meanings.example: She juggled a hand bag and glass at a cocktail party.
meanings.example_cn: 鸡尾酒会上，她在手拿提包的同时还得持稳酒杯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 手写，书写；笔迹，书法；手稿
手写，书写（handwrite 的现在分词形式）

meanings.meaning_en: a short book that gives information or instructions about something
meanings.example: the Fiction Writer’s Handbook
meanings.example_cn: 《小说写作手册》

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of cloth that you use for drying your nose or eyes
meanings.example: He flicked at spot with handkerchief.
meanings.example_cn: 他轻轻地用手帕拂拭污点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 拿；处理，应付；操纵；触（球）；经营，管理
把手，拉手；柄，提手；（理解、解决问题的）方法，途径；<非正式>（尤指奇怪的）名字，名称；（织物等的）手感；<美，非正式>赌注总额
（男子）英俊的，帅气的；（女子）端庄健美的；宽敞而美观的，宏伟的；慷慨的，气量大的；（金额）可观的，优厚的；（礼品、奖品）贵重的，值钱的；（胜利）重大的

meanings.meaning_en: to attach sth, or to be attached, at the top so that the lower part is free or loose
meanings.example: Hang your coat up on the hook.
meanings.example_cn: 把你的大衣挂在衣钩上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 挂出：作为公告向外展示，尤指在短语“挂出招牌”中使用。
meanings.example: Hang out with friends.
meanings.example_cn: 和朋友出去玩。

meanings.meaning_cn: 闲逛：在某个地方消磨时间，特别是与朋友一起。
meanings.example: The local kids hang out at the mall.
meanings.example_cn: 当地的孩子常在商场闲荡。

meanings.example: The industry isn't regulated, so anybody can hang out a shingle.
meanings.example_cn: 这个行业无制度规范，所以任何人都可以开业。

meanings.meaning_cn: 挂起：将物品放在专门设计的挂钩或衣架上。
meanings.example: Don't hang up on me—we must talk!
meanings.example_cn: 别挂断电话—我们一定得谈谈！

meanings.meaning_cn: 挂断电话：将电话听筒放回底座，断开连接。
meanings.example: It's no use. Let's hang up and try for a better line.
meanings.example_cn: 没用。我们挂断电话试打更好的线路吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 延迟，搁置：使延迟、暂停或搁置。
meanings.example: Perhaps her ladyship would like to hang up her own clothes today!
meanings.example_cn: 尊贵的夫人今天也许愿意动手自己把衣服挂起来吧！

meanings.meaning_cn: 卡住，被卡住：使物体卡住或被卡住，无法移动。
meanings.example: Don't hang up on me—we must talk!
meanings.example_cn: 别挂断电话—我们一定得谈谈！

meanings.example: Don't hang up on me—we must talk!
meanings.example_cn: 别挂断电话—我们一定得谈谈！

meanings.meaning_cn: 快乐地；幸运地；乐意地；合适地

meanings.meaning_en: having feelings of pleasure, for example because something good has happened to you or you are very satisfied with your life
meanings.example: It’s a lovely house and we’ve been very happy here.
meanings.example_cn: 房子很漂亮，我们住在这里非常开心。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of water next to the land where the water is calm, so that ships are safe when they are inside it
meanings.example: as they sailed into Portsmouth Harbour
meanings.example_cn: 当他们驶入朴次茅斯港的时候

meanings.meaning_en: to protect and hide criminals that the police are searching for
meanings.example: Accusations of harbouring suspects were raised against the former Hungarian leadership.
meanings.example_cn: 匈牙利前领导人被指控窝藏疑犯。

meanings.meaning_en: firm, stiff, and difficult to press down, break, or cut
meanings.example: a hard wooden chair
meanings.example_cn: 一把硬木椅

meanings.meaning_cn: 几乎不，几乎没有；刚刚，才；几乎无法；差不多，大约；<古>严厉的，苛刻的

meanings.meaning_en: computer machinery and equipment, as opposed to the programs that make computers work
meanings.example: 英文例句:To be totally secure, you need a piece of hardware that costs about $200.
meanings.example_cn: 为保证绝对安全，你需要一个花费约为两百美元的硬件。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing that you wear on your head
meanings.example: Maria was wearing a beautiful new hat.
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽亚戴着一顶漂亮的新帽子。

meanings.meaning_en: to dislike something very much
meanings.example: It’s the kind of movie you either love or hate.
meanings.example_cn: 这是那种你要么喜欢要么讨厌的电影。

meanings.meaning_cn: （与过去分词连用构成完成时）
meanings.meaning_en: used with past participles to form perfect tenses
meanings.example: Our guests have arrived.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的客人到了。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that someone owns something or that it is available for them to use
meanings.example: Has anyone phoned?
meanings.example_cn: 有人打过电话来吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 不得不，必须：表示必须要做某事，没有其他选择。
meanings.example: They have got to abide by the rules.
meanings.example_cn: 他们必须要遵守规定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 必须，不得不：表示某事是必需或必要的。
meanings.example: They may have to amputate.
meanings.example_cn: 他们可能不得不施行截肢手术。

meanings.meaning_cn: 根据规定或法律要求：表示某事是根据规定或法律要求的。
meanings.example: I have to finish this essay today. We have to hand them in tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 我今天得完成这篇论文，因为我们明天必须交。

meanings.meaning_cn: 应该，应当：表示某事是期望或应该做的。
meanings.example: Sorry, I really have to bail.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，我真得赶紧走了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 很可能：表示某事是非常可能的。
meanings.example: They may have to amputate.
meanings.example_cn: 他们可能不得不施行截肢手术。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用于强调陈述：用于强调陈述的真实性或重要性。
meanings.example: They may have to amputate.
meanings.example_cn: 他们可能不得不施行截肢手术。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用于表达恼怒或愤怒：用于表达恼怒或愤怒的疑问或陈述。
meanings.example: They may have to amputate.
meanings.example_cn: 他们可能不得不施行截肢手术。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to a man, boy, or male animal that has already been mentioned or is already known about
meanings.example: ‘Where’s Paul?’ ‘He’s gone to the cinema.’
meanings.example_cn: “保罗在哪儿？”“他去看电影了。”

meanings.meaning_en: the top part of your body that has your face at the front and is supported by your neck
meanings.example: He kissed the top of her head.
meanings.example_cn: 他吻了一下她的头顶。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in charge of a team, government, organization etc
meanings.example: Alan fell asleep as soon as he put his head on the pillow.
meanings.example_cn: 艾伦头一挨枕头就睡着了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 头痛；使人头痛的事，难题
meanings.example: My head aches and I ache all over because I'm so tired.
meanings.example_cn: 我头疼，全身都疼，因为我太累了。

meanings.meaning_cn: （报纸的）标题，大字标题；（广播或电视里的）新闻提要，头条新闻
给（报道、文章）加标题；在（演出）中担任主演；大肆宣传
身体状况；健康；医疗，卫生；（组织或系统的）运行状况，运作状况；发达，兴旺

meanings.meaning_en: physically strong and not likely to become ill or weak
meanings.example: a healthy baby boy
meanings.example_cn: 健康的男婴

meanings.meaning_en: to know that a sound is being made, using your ears
meanings.example: Blanche heard a crash as the back door was flung open.
meanings.example_cn: 布兰奇听见后门哗啦一声被推开。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of you that feels strong emotions and feelings
meanings.example: His heart was full of anger and grief.
meanings.example_cn: 他的内心充满愤怒和悲伤。

meanings.meaning_en: warmth or the quality of being hot
meanings.example: Ice needs heat to melt.
meanings.example_cn: 冰需要热才能融化。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something become warm or hot
meanings.example: Insulating the attic is a good way to reduce heat loss.
meanings.example_cn: 为阁楼安装隔热层是减少热量流失的好方法。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine for making air or water hotter
meanings.example: Did you turn the heater off?
meanings.example_cn: 你关掉加热器了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the process of heating a building or room, considered especially from the point of view of how much this costs
meanings.example: We wanted to reduce the cost of heating and air-conditioning.
meanings.example_cn: 我们想减少供暖与空调的开支。

meanings.meaning_en: weighing a lot
meanings.example: The wardrobe was too heavy for me to move on my own.
meanings.example_cn: 衣橱太重，我一个人移不动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 脚后跟，踵；中文释义: 后跟
meanings.meaning_en: the curved back part of your foot
meanings.example: He had an operation on his heel last week.

meanings.example_cn: 大象力气很大，可以打倒一个人。

meanings.example: The elephant has such great strength that he can knock down a man with it.

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of water surrounded by land

meanings.meaning_en: a young sheep

meanings.meaning_en: an object that produces light by using electricity, oil, or gas

meanings.meaning_en: big in size, amount, or number

meanings.example_cn: 洛杉矶是美国的第二大城市。

meanings.meaning_en: not liking work and physical activity, or not making any effort to do anything

meanings.example: drinking water supplied by old-fashioned lead pipes
meanings.example_cn: 由老式铅管输送的饮用水

meanings.meaning_cn: 领导者，首领；领先者，佼佼者；首席小提琴手；指挥；社论；<美>（报纸的）要闻，头条；（胶卷，磁带的）空白段；（渔线）接钩绳；（植物的）顶枝；（尤指表格中的）指向符

meanings.meaning_en: one of the flat green parts of a plant that are joined to its stem or branches
meanings.example: a flowering bush with large shiny leaves
meanings.example_cn: 叶子大而油亮的开花灌木

meanings.example: King Athamus of northern Greece had two children, Phrixus and Helle.
meanings.example_cn: 希腊北部国王阿塔·玛斯有两个孩子，法瑞克斯和赫勒。

meanings.example: The work appears in the journal Psychological Science. [Helle Larsen et al., bit.ly/cU7vgJ.]
meanings.example_cn: 这项研究发表在《心理科学》杂志上。

meanings.meaning_en: to gain knowledge of a subject or skill, by experience, by studying it, or by being taught
meanings.example: What’s the best way to learn a language?
meanings.example_cn: 学习语言的最佳方法是什么？

meanings.meaning_en: smallest in size, amount, degree, etc.
meanings.example: He's the best teacher, even though he has the least experience.
meanings.example_cn: 他虽然经验最少，却是最出色的老师。

meanings.meaning_en: less than anything or anyone else
meanings.example: He’s my least favourite member of staff.
meanings.example_cn: 他是最不讨我喜欢的员工。

meanings.meaning_cn: 皮，皮革；（骑摩托车穿的）皮衣，皮夹克

meanings.meaning_en: to go away from a place or a person
meanings.example: My baby gets upset when I leave the room.
meanings.example_cn: 我一离开房间宝宝就会不安。

meanings.meaning_en: a long talk on a particular subject that someone gives to a group of people, especially to students in a university
meanings.example: He regularly gives lectures on modern French literature.
meanings.example_cn: 他经常讲授法国现代文学课程。

meanings.meaning_en: to talk to a group of people on a particular subject, especially to students in a university
meanings.example: He lectures on European art at Manchester University.
meanings.example_cn: 他在曼彻斯特大学讲授欧洲艺术。

meanings.meaning_en: on the same side of something as your left side
meanings.example: She held out her left hand.
meanings.example_cn: 她伸出左手。

meanings.example: His rooms were on the left-hand side of the quad.
meanings.example_cn: 他的房间在这个四方院的左侧。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the long parts of your body that your feet are joined to, or a similar part on an animal or insect
meanings.example: a young boy with skinny legs
meanings.example_cn: 双腿干瘦的小男孩

meanings.meaning_en: time when you are not working or studying and can relax and do things you enjoy
meanings.example: Most people now enjoy shorter working hours and more leisure time.
meanings.example_cn: 现在大多数人都喜欢工作时间短些，闲暇时间多些。

meanings.meaning_en: a fruit with a hard yellow skin and sour juice
meanings.example: a slice of lemon
meanings.example_cn: 一片柠檬

meanings.example: I wonder if there's any fizz left in the lemonade.
meanings.example_cn: 我想知道这柠檬汽水中还有没有气泡。

meanings.meaning_en: to let someone borrow money or something that belongs to you for a short time
meanings.example: The hospital agreed to lend us a wheelchair.
meanings.example_cn: 医院同意借给我们一把轮椅。

meanings.meaning_en: the measurement of how long something is from one end to the other
meanings.example: We measured the length and width of the living room.
meanings.example_cn: 我们量了客厅的长和宽。

meanings.meaning_en: a smaller amount or not as much
meanings.example: Doctors recommend eating less salt.
meanings.example_cn: 医生建议少吃盐。

meanings.meaning_en: not so much or to a smaller degree
meanings.example: Maybe he would worry less if he understood the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 他要是了解情况，也许就不会那么担心了。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time in which someone is taught a particular skill, for example how to play a musical instrument or drive a car
meanings.example: piano lessons
meanings.example_cn: 钢琴课

meanings.meaning_en: a written or printed message that is usually put in an envelope and sent by mail
meanings.example: I got a letter from Melanie today.
meanings.example_cn: 今天我收到梅拉妮的一封信。

meanings.example: Lettuce was grown by the ancient Romans.
meanings.example_cn: 莴苣是由古罗马人种植的。

meanings.meaning_en: the height of something in relation to the ground or to another object
meanings.example: Your arms should be at the same level as your desk.
meanings.example_cn: 手臂应该与桌子齐平。

meanings.meaning_en: flat and not sloping in any direction
meanings.example: The floors in the old house were not completely level.
meanings.example_cn: 老房子的地面不是完全平整的。

meanings.meaning_en: a room or building containing books that can be looked at or borrowed
meanings.example: a public library
meanings.example_cn: 公共图书馆

meanings.meaning_cn: 执照, 许可证, 特许
meanings.meaning_en: an official document giving you permission to own or do something for a period of time
meanings.example: The dealers applied for an export licence.
meanings.example_cn: 经销商申请了出口许可证。

meanings.meaning_en: to be or put yourself in a flat or horizontal position so that you are not standing or sitting
meanings.example: to lie on your back/side/front
meanings.example_cn: 仰 / 侧 / 俯卧

meanings.meaning_cn: 躺下：指身体平放在床上或其他平面上。这是一个不及物动词短语，用于描述人或动物躺下休息或睡觉。
meanings.example: You can finally lie down.
meanings.example_cn: 你终于能躺下了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 屈服或接受失败、失望或侮辱：这个短语常用于描述某人在面对失败、失望或侮辱时，以温顺或卑微的态度屈服或接受。也可以用于表示某人故意不履行职责或忽视自己的工作。
meanings.example: I lie down with my mum.
meanings.example_cn: 我在我的母亲身边躺下来。

meanings.meaning_en: the period of time when someone is alive
meanings.example: Learning goes on throughout life.
meanings.example_cn: 学习是一生的事。

meanings.meaning_en: to move something or someone upwards into the air
meanings.example: Sophie lifted the phone before the second ring.
meanings.example_cn: 铃响了一下苏菲就接起了电话。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine that you can ride in, that moves up and down between the floors in a tall building
meanings.example: He lifted the lid on the pot of soup.
meanings.example_cn: 他揭开汤锅的盖子。

meanings.meaning_en: not very heavy
meanings.example: You can carry this bag – it’s fairly light.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以拿这个袋子——它很轻。

meanings.meaning_en: a small object that produces a flame for lighting cigarettes etc
meanings.example: a cigarette lighter
meanings.example_cn: 香烟打火机

meanings.meaning_en: to enjoy something or think that it is nice or good
meanings.example: I like your jacket.
meanings.example_cn: 我喜欢你这件上衣。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is likely will probably happen or is probably true
meanings.example: Snow showers are likely tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 明天可能有阵雪。

meanings.meaning_en: probably
meanings.example: the most likely cause of the problem
meanings.example_cn: 造成这个问题最有可能的原因

meanings.meaning_en: the greatest or least amount, number, speed etc that is allowed
meanings.example: a 55 mph speed limit
meanings.example_cn: 55英里的时速限制

meanings.meaning_cn: 有限的；受限的；受宪法限制的；（公司）有限责任的 (=Ltd)
限制（limit 的过去式和过去分词形式）

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin mark on a piece of paper, the ground, or another surface
meanings.example: Draw a straight line across the top of the page.
meanings.example_cn: 在这一页的上方画一条直线。

meanings.meaning_en: to join two things by putting one through the other
meanings.example: He walked with her, linking arms (= putting his arm around her arm ).
meanings.example_cn: 他与她挽臂同行。

meanings.meaning_en: each ring of a chain
a large animal of the cat family that lives in Africa and parts of southern Asia. Lions have gold-coloured fur and the male has a mane (long hair around its neck ).
meanings.example: The wounded lion bellowed out.
meanings.example_cn: 受伤的狮子发出了怒吼。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two soft parts around your mouth where your skin is redder or darker
meanings.example: She had big eyes and full lips (= large and round lips ).
meanings.example_cn: 她眼睛大大的，嘴唇很丰满。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that is not a solid or a gas, for example water or milk
meanings.example: Add a little more liquid to the sauce.
meanings.example_cn: 在酱汁中再加一点水。

meanings.meaning_en: in the form of a liquid instead of a gas or solid
meanings.example: Children take antibiotics in liquid form.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童服用液态抗生素。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of names, numbers etc, usually written one below the other, for example so that you can remember or check them
meanings.example: Make a list of all the things you have to do.
meanings.example_cn: 把你必须做的所有事情列一个清单。

meanings.meaning_en: to write a list, or mention things one after the other
meanings.example: The first person on my list is Mrs Gilling.
meanings.example_cn: 我的名单上排在第一位的是吉林夫人。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay attention to what someone is saying or to a sound that you can hear
meanings.example: Listen! There’s a strange noise in the engine.
meanings.example_cn: 听！引擎发出奇怪的声音。

meanings.meaning_en: books, plays, poems etc that people think are important and good
meanings.example: He has read many of the major works of literature.
meanings.example_cn: 他读过许多重要的文学作品。

meanings.example: One tablet will purify a litre of water.
meanings.example_cn: 一丸即可净化一升水。

meanings.example: It is sold to the public at eight cents a litre.
meanings.example_cn: 它以每升8美分的价格出售给公众。

meanings.meaning_en: Litter is rubbish or waste that is left lying around outside
meanings.example: If you see litter in the corridor, pick it up.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你看到走廊里有垃圾，就把它捡起来。

meanings.meaning_en: small in size
meanings.example: a little house
meanings.example_cn: 小屋

meanings.meaning_en: to have your home in a particular place
meanings.example: He lives just across the street from me.
meanings.example_cn: 他就住在我街对面。

meanings.meaning_en: living; not dead
meanings.example: We live only a few miles from the coast.
meanings.example_cn: 我们住的地方离海边只有几英里远。

meanings.meaning_en: full of life and energy; active and enthusiastic
meanings.example: a lively child
meanings.example_cn: 精力充沛的孩子

meanings.meaning_cn: 客厅：住宅中用于居住者共同社交活动的房间。
meanings.example: The living room is tiny.
meanings.example_cn: 这间起居室极小。

meanings.meaning_en: to put a large quantity of something into a vehicle or container
meanings.example: Have you finished loading up?
meanings.example_cn: 你装完货了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a large quantity of something that is carried by a vehicle, person etc
meanings.example: It took an hour to load the van.
meanings.example_cn: 给小型货车装货花了一小时。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that you borrow from a bank etc
meanings.example: We obtained a loan from the government.
meanings.example_cn: 我们得了一笔政府贷款。

meanings.meaning_en: to lend sth to sb, especially money
meanings.example: If you ask him for a loan, he'll come through.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你向他贷款，他会满足你的要求的。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the particular area you live in, or the area you are talking about
meanings.example: local hospital
meanings.example_cn: 当地医院

meanings.meaning_en: to find the exact position of something
meanings.example: We couldn’t locate the source of the radio signal.
meanings.example_cn: 我们无法确定无线电信号的来源。

meanings.meaning_cn: 地点，位置；（电影的）外景拍摄地；定位；（计算机内存里的）地址

meanings.meaning_en: a thing that keeps a door, drawer etc fastened and is usually opened with a key or by moving a small metal bar
meanings.example: I’m sorry, there isn’t a lock on the bathroom door.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，浴室门上没有锁。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something, usually with a key, so that other people cannot open it, or to be fastened like this
meanings.example: The key turned stiffly in the lock.
meanings.example_cn: 这把钥匙开锁不灵活。

meanings.meaning_en: A locker is a small metal or wooden cabinet with a lock, where you can put your personal possessions, for example in a school, place of work, or sports club
meanings.example: a meat locker
meanings.example_cn: 肉类冷藏间

meanings.meaning_en: a small design that is the official sign of a company or organization
meanings.example: ...the famous MGM logo of the roaring lion.
meanings.example_cn: …米高梅公司著名的怒吼狂狮标志。

meanings.meaning_cn: 孤单的，寂寞的；在孤单中度过的；偏僻的，人迹罕至的

meanings.meaning_en: to want something very much, especially when it seems unlikely to happen soon
meanings.example: He longed to see her again.
meanings.example_cn: 他盼望再见到她。

meanings.meaning_en: to turn your eyes towards something, so that you can see it
meanings.example: We sneaked out while Jessie’s mom wasn’t looking.
meanings.example_cn: 我们趁杰茜的妈妈没有看到，偷偷地溜了出去。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of looking at something
meanings.example: If you look carefully you can see that the painting represents a human figure.
meanings.example_cn: 如果仔细看，就会看出画上是一个人形。

meanings.meaning_cn: 看起来像：与（某人或某物）非常相似的外貌；类似于（某人或某物）。
meanings.example: They look like stars to the naked eye.
meanings.example_cn: 用肉眼看上去它们像星星。

meanings.meaning_cn: 看：将目光集中在某物或某人身上，观察或审视。
meanings.example: Let's take a look at the damage.
meanings.example_cn: 让我们看看损失情况吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 期待：指对未来的某事或某人充满期待和期望。
meanings.example: I look forward to hearing from you.
meanings.example_cn: 盼望着收到你的信。

meanings.meaning_cn: 期望：指对未来的某事或某人抱有希望和期望。
meanings.example: I now look forward to going back to work as soon as possible.
meanings.example_cn: 我现在盼望尽快回到工作中。

meanings.meaning_en: not firmly fastened in place
meanings.example: a loose floorboard
meanings.example_cn: 松动的地板

meanings.meaning_en: a large vehicle for carrying heavy goods
meanings.example: Now and then they heard the roar of a heavy lorry.
meanings.example_cn: 他们不时听见一辆重型卡车的轰响声。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop having a particular attitude, quality, ability etc, or to gradually have less of it
meanings.example: I’ve lost my appetite.
meanings.example_cn: 我已经没有了胃口。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迷路的，迷失的; 失去的，丢失的; 不复存在的，不再拥有的; 不知所措，一筹莫展; 糊涂的，困惑的; 全神贯注的; （时间或机会）浪费的，错过的; 输了的; 遭难的，阵亡的; 彻底毁坏的
meanings.example: Thousands have lost their jobs.
meanings.example_cn: 数千人都丢了工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 遗失，丢失; 失去; 输掉（比赛、战斗、争论等）（lose 的过去式和过去分词形式）
meanings.example: Harry was hopelessly lost.
meanings.example_cn: 哈里彻底迷路了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 抽彩给奖法，博彩；<美>抽签法，随机选择；碰运气的事

meanings.meaning_en: making a lot of noise
meanings.example: The book fell to the floor with a loud bang.
meanings.example_cn: 书砰的一声掉落到地上。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a strong feeling of  affection  for someone, combined with sexual attraction
meanings.example: I love you, Tracy.
meanings.example_cn: 我爱你，特雷西。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of caring about someone, especially a member of your family or a close friend
meanings.example: He was the only man she had ever loved.
meanings.example_cn: 他是她唯一爱过的男人。

meanings.meaning_en: beautiful or attractive
meanings.example: She had a lovely face.
meanings.example_cn: 她有一张漂亮的脸蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: not high or tall
meanings.example: a low wall/building/table
meanings.example_cn: 矮墙 / 建筑物 / 桌子

meanings.meaning_en: good things that happen to you by chance
meanings.example: You’re not having much luck today, are you?
meanings.example_cn: 你今天运气不太好，是不是？

meanings.meaning_en: having good luck
meanings.example: I didn’t really know your name – it was just a lucky guess.
meanings.example_cn: 我并不知道你的名字―只是运气好猜中的。

meanings.meaning_en: the cases, bags etc that you carry when you are travelling
meanings.example: They searched his luggage for illegal drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 他们搜查他的行李看是否藏有毒品。

meanings.meaning_en: a meal eaten in the middle of the day
meanings.example: What’s for lunch?
meanings.example_cn: 午饭吃什么？

meanings.meaning_cn: 奢华，华贵；奢侈品；不常有的乐趣，难得的享受
机器，机械（装置）；计算机，电脑；（组织的）核心机构，领导核心；车辆（常指摩托车）；效率高的人（或动物）；机械般工作的人；（投币式）自动售货机
用机器制造（加工）；机器缝制，用缝纫机缝

meanings.meaning_en: crazy or very silly
meanings.example: He can’t possibly get that finished in time. He must be mad !
meanings.example_cn: 他不可能按时完成的。他一定是疯了！

meanings.meaning_en: used to address a woman in a polite way, especially a customer in a shop
meanings.example: Are you being served, Madam?
meanings.example_cn: 有人接待您吗，夫人？

meanings.meaning_cn: 由……制成：用某种材料制成。
meanings.example: The soles are made of leather.
meanings.example_cn: 鞋底是皮革做的。

meanings.meaning_en: a large thin book with a paper cover that contains news stories, articles, photographs etc, and is sold weekly or monthly
meanings.example: a magazine article
meanings.example_cn: 杂志中的文章

meanings.meaning_en: the power to make impossible things happen by saying special words or doing special actions
meanings.example: Do you believe in magic?
meanings.example_cn: 你相信魔法吗？

meanings.meaning_en: very good or beautiful, and very impressive
meanings.example: a magnificent performance
meanings.example_cn: 气势恢宏的演出

meanings.meaning_en: the letters and packages that are delivered to you
meanings.example: You shouldn’t read other people’s mail.
meanings.example_cn: 你不应该看别人的信件。

meanings.meaning_en: to send a letter or package to someone
meanings.example: He found a mountain of mail waiting for him.
meanings.example_cn: 他发现有堆积如山的邮件等着他处理。

meanings.meaning_en: larger or more important than all other things, ideas etc of the same kind
meanings.example: The main reason for living in Spain is the weather.
meanings.example_cn: 居住在西班牙的主要原因是天气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 主菜; 主要课程; 主帆
meanings.example: The main course was roast duck.
meanings.example_cn: 主菜是烤鸭。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce something, for example by putting the different parts of it together
meanings.example: I’m going to show you how to make a box for your tools.
meanings.example_cn: 我来教你怎么做一个箱子存放工具。

meanings.meaning_cn: 确保：确保某事是真实的、正确的、会发生的等，以消除疑虑。
meanings.example: Make sure the wires don't touch.
meanings.example_cn: 一定不要让金属线搭在一起。

meanings.meaning_cn: 让每个人都知道：确保每个人都知道应该在哪里。
meanings.example: Make sure the edges are glued down.
meanings.example_cn: 一定要把边缘粘牢。

meanings.meaning_cn: 组成，构成：将不同的部分组合在一起形成整体。
meanings.example: The pharmacist will make up your prescription.
meanings.example_cn: 药剂师会给你依处方配药。

meanings.meaning_cn: 弥补，弥合：补偿或弥补某种缺陷或遗漏。
meanings.example: Her make-up was a bit OTT.
meanings.example_cn: 她化的妆有些过浓。

meanings.meaning_cn: 化妆，打扮：为了角色或特定场合而进行外貌的准备。
meanings.example: Jealousy is not part of his make-up.
meanings.example_cn: 嫉妒不是他的本质。

meanings.meaning_cn: 编造，虚构：创造或编写一个故事或情节。
meanings.example: The pharmacist will make up your prescription.
meanings.example_cn: 药剂师会给你依处方配药。

meanings.meaning_cn: 和解，言归于好：结束争吵或冲突，恢复友好关系。
meanings.example: The pharmacist will make up your prescription.
meanings.example_cn: 药剂师会给你依处方配药。

meanings.meaning_en: a male person or animal cannot have babies or lay eggs
meanings.example: Many women earn less than their male colleagues.
meanings.example_cn: 许多女性挣钱比她们的男性同事少。

meanings.meaning_en: a man
meanings.example: Police described her attacker as a white male aged about 25.
meanings.example_cn: 警方称袭击她的人是一名大约25岁的白人男子。

meanings.meaning_en: an adult male human
meanings.example: There were two men and a woman in the car.
meanings.example_cn: 车上有两男一女。

meanings.meaning_cn: 管理，处理；操纵，控制；设法做到，勉力完成；腾出时间参加；凑合着活下去，支撑；调教（人或动物）；竟搞得，竟做出
（公司、部门等的）经理；（艺人或运动员的）经纪人；（运动队的）管理人，主教练；管理某物的人；（计算机）管理程序
meanings.example: I am just calling to follow up on the status of the Sal es Manag er position.
