meanings.meaning_en: measuring only a small distance from one side to the other, especially in relation to the length
meanings.example: The stairs were very narrow.
meanings.example_cn: 楼梯非常狭窄。

meanings.meaning_en: offensive; in bad taste
meanings.example: to have a nasty mind
meanings.example_cn: 思想肮脏

meanings.meaning_cn: 国家的，全国的；国家所有的，国立的；国内的，本国的
国民，侨民；全国性比赛；全国性报纸

meanings.meaning_en: existing in nature and not caused, made, or controlled by people
meanings.example: the study of the natural world
meanings.example_cn: 对自然界的研究

meanings.meaning_en: at a short distance away
meanings.example: A bomb exploded somewhere near.
meanings.example_cn: 一颗炸弹在附近爆炸。

meanings.meaning_en: a short distance away
meanings.example: Visitors came from near and far.
meanings.example_cn: 游客来自四面八方。

meanings.meaning_en: not far away
meanings.example: Lucy was staying in the nearby town of Hamilton.
meanings.example_cn: 露西当时住在附近的汉密尔顿镇。

meanings.meaning_en: a short distance from sb/sth; not far away
meanings.example: He might easily have been seen by someone who lived nearby.
meanings.example_cn: 他可能很容易被住在附近的人看到。

meanings.meaning_en: almost, but not quite or not completely
meanings.example: It took nearly two hours to get here.
meanings.example_cn: 到这里花了将近两小时。

meanings.meaning_en: tidy and carefully arranged
meanings.example: neat handwriting
meanings.example_cn: 工整的笔迹

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your body that joins your head to your shoulders, or the same part of an animal or bird
meanings.example: Mike rubbed the back of his neck.
meanings.example_cn: 迈克揉了揉后颈。

meanings.meaning_en: a string of jewels, beads etc or a thin gold or silver chain to wear around the neck
meanings.example: She was wearing a coral necklace.
meanings.example_cn: 她戴着一串珊瑚项链。

meanings.meaning_en: to have to have something or someone, because you cannot do something without them, or because you cannot continue or cannot exist without them
meanings.example: You don’t really need a car.
meanings.example_cn: 你其实并不需要一辆车。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有害的，负面的；悲观的，消极的；否定的，拒绝的；否定式的；（结果）阴性的；负极的，阴极的；负的，小于零的；亏损的；负像的，底片的；（天文）负的；<英>（立法）自动生效的；Rh阴性的
底片，负片；否定词，否定句；坏处，害处；阴性结果；（逻）（对命题的）否定；负电；负数
拒绝，否定；推翻，证伪；消除，抵消
邻居，邻人；邻近的人（或物）；邻国；他人，世人
（地方，物体）位于……的附近，邻接；住在邻近
社区，四邻；邻近的地方；邻里情谊，邻居间的友善关系；（数）领域
meanings.example: He was a common figure in the streets and lived in some shabby neigh- bourhood of tenement houses where there were hens and chickens among the cobble stones.
meanings.example_cn: 他在街上也算小有名气，住在一座破旧的出租公寓里，与鹅卵石堆砌的鸡舍为伴。

meanings.meaning_en: worried or frightened about something, and unable to relax
meanings.example: I wish you’d stop looking at me like that. You’re making me nervous.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望你不要再那样看着我了，你让我紧张。

meanings.meaning_en: something used for catching fish, insects, or animals which is made of threads or wires woven across each other with regular spaces between them
meanings.example: a fishing net
meanings.example_cn: 渔网

meanings.meaning_cn: 网络，网状系统；人际关系网，联络网；计算机网络，互联网；广播网，电视网
使（计算机）联网；（尤指工作中）建立关系网，建立人脉；对（电视或广播节目）进行联播

meanings.meaning_en: not at any time, or not once
meanings.example: He’s never been to Australia.
meanings.example_cn: 他从未去过澳大利亚。

meanings.meaning_en: recently made, built, invented, written, designed etc
meanings.example: the city’s new hospital
meanings.example_cn: 市里新建的医院

meanings.meaning_en: reports of recent events in the newspapers or on the radio or television
meanings.example: a late evening news broadcast
meanings.example_cn: 晚间新闻节目

meanings.meaning_cn: 报纸，报；报社；（尤指用作他途的）旧报纸

meanings.meaning_en: coming straight after sb/sth in time, order or space
meanings.example: The next six months will be the hardest.
meanings.example_cn: 接下来的六个月将是最难熬的。

meanings.example: The commons is next to the gym.
meanings.example_cn: 学生公共食堂在体育馆的旁边。

meanings.example: The seat next to him was vacant.
meanings.example_cn: 他旁边的座位空着。

meanings.meaning_en: pleasant, attractive, or enjoyable
meanings.example: They’ve got a very nice house.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的房子真漂亮。

meanings.meaning_en: the daughter of your brother or sister, or the daughter of your wife’s or husband’s brother or sister
meanings.example: his niece, the daughter of his eldest sister
meanings.example_cn: 他的外甥女，他大姐的女儿

meanings.meaning_en: the dark part of each 24-hour period when the sun cannot be seen and when most people sleep
meanings.example: It was a cold moonlit night.
meanings.example_cn: 那是个寒冷的月夜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 噩梦；可怕的经历，很难对付的人（或情形）

meanings.meaning_en: used to give a negative reply to a question, offer, or request
meanings.example: ‘Are you Italian?’ ‘No, I’m Spanish.’
meanings.example_cn: “你是意大利人吗？”“不，我是西班牙人。”

meanings.example: ‘Do you want any more?’ ‘No thanks.’
meanings.example_cn: “你还要再来点吗？”“不要了，谢谢。”

meanings.meaning_cn: 没有人：表示没有任何人存在或没有任何人做某事。
meanings.example: No one doubted his ability.
meanings.example_cn: 没有人怀疑他的能力。

meanings.meaning_en: a sound, especially one that is loud, unpleasant, or frightening
meanings.example: What’s that noise?
meanings.example_cn: 那是什么声音？

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is noisy makes a lot of noise
meanings.example: The kids have been really noisy today.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们今天实在是吵。

meanings.meaning_en: not any amount of something or not one of a group of people or things
meanings.example: I wish I could offer you some cake but there’s none left.
meanings.example_cn: 我真想能请你吃些蛋糕，但一点也没剩的了。

meanings.meaning_en: not at all
meanings.example: Although these were good students, none had a score above 60.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然这些都是好学生，但是没有一个考到60分以上。

meanings.meaning_en: 12 o’clock in the daytime
meanings.example: We met at 12 noon.
meanings.example_cn: 我们中午12点见了面。

meanings.meaning_cn: 正常的，标准的；（身心）健康的，（人）普通的；（线或线性特征）正交的，垂直的；（盐溶液）与血液的盐浓度相同的；正（断层）的；平常的，通常的
meanings.example: The girl was born out of wedlock on June l, 1926. in a Los Angeles hospital She was named Norma Jean Mortenson.
meanings.example_cn: 这个小女孩是个私生女，1926年6月1日出生于洛杉矶的一家医院，取名诺玛·琴·莫藤森。

meanings.meaning_cn: 常态，通常标准；<非正式>正常人，循规蹈矩者；法线，正交
meanings.example: The girl was born out of wedlock on June l, 1926. in a Los Angeles hospital She was named Norma Jean Mortenson.
meanings.example_cn: 这个小女孩是个私生女，1926年6月1日出生于洛杉矶的一家医院，取名诺玛·琴·莫藤森。

meanings.example: The girl was born out of wedlock on June l, 1926. in a Los Angeles hospital She was named Norma Jean Mortenson.
meanings.example_cn: 这个小女孩是个私生女，1926年6月1日出生于洛杉矶的一家医院，取名诺玛·琴·莫藤森。

meanings.meaning_cn: 通常，平常；正常地；正交地

meanings.meaning_en: the direction that is at the top of a map of the world, above the Equator. It is on the left if you are facing the rising sun
meanings.example: Which way is north?
meanings.example_cn: 哪边是北？

meanings.meaning_en: in the north or facing the north
meanings.example: He lives in North Wales.
meanings.example_cn: 他住在威尔士北部。

meanings.meaning_cn: 东北的；向东北的；（风等）来自东北的
在东北；向东北；（风等）来自东北

meanings.meaning_en: in or from the north of a country or area
meanings.example: a man with a northern accent
meanings.example_cn: 带有北方口音的男子

meanings.meaning_cn: 在西北，向西北，来自西北地

meanings.meaning_en: used to make a word, statement, or question negative
meanings.example: Most of the stores do not open until 10 am.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数商店要到上午10点才开始营业。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you write down to remind you of something
meanings.example: Dave made a note of her address and phone number.
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫记下了她的地址和电话号码。

meanings.meaning_en: not anything or no thing
meanings.example: Nothing ever happens in this town.
meanings.example_cn: 这镇上从来都不会发生什么特别的事。

meanings.meaning_en: to have no qualities or features that are similar to someone or something else
meanings.example: There’s nothing in this box.
meanings.example_cn: 这盒子里什么也没有。

meanings.meaning_en: if you notice something or someone, you realize that they exist, especially because you can see, hear, or feel them
meanings.example: He noticed a woman in a black dress sitting across from him.
meanings.example_cn: 他看到有位黑衣女子坐在他的对面。

meanings.meaning_en: when you notice or pay attention to someone or something
meanings.example: I didn’t notice any smoke.
meanings.example_cn: 我没注意到有烟。

meanings.meaning_en: a long written story in which the characters and events are usually imaginary
meanings.example: a novel by Jane Austen
meanings.example_cn: 简·奥斯丁的小说

meanings.meaning_en: not like anything known before, and unusual or interesting
meanings.example: What a novel idea!.
meanings.example_cn: 多么新奇的想法呀！

meanings.meaning_en: (at) the present time
meanings.example: She's a widow now.
meanings.example_cn: 她现在是一个寡妇。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无处，哪里都不；不可能看见（或找到）的；没有任何地方；无名的小地方；（在文本、演讲或争论中） 任何地方都没有
不存在的地方，荒芜的地区
<非正式>无望成功的；不知名的

meanings.meaning_en: a word or sign that represents an amount or a quantity
meanings.example: They wrote various numbers on a large sheet of paper.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在一张大纸上写下了很多不同的数字。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to look after people who are ill or injured, usually in a hospital
meanings.example: The nurse is coming to give you an injection.
meanings.example_cn: 护士会来给你打针。

meanings.meaning_en: to look after someone who is ill or injured
meanings.example: The school nurse sent Sara home.
meanings.example_cn: 学校的护士送萨拉回家。

meanings.example: The clock said three o'clock.
meanings.example_cn: 时钟显示三点整。

meanings.meaning_en: a solid thing that you can hold, touch, or see but that is not alive
meanings.example: an everyday object such as a spoon
meanings.example_cn: 调羹之类的日常用品

meanings.meaning_en: easy to notice or understand
meanings.example: The obvious way of reducing pollution is to use cars less.
meanings.example_cn: 减少污染显而易见的办法就是少用汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: used to mean that a fact can easily be noticed or understood
meanings.example: We’re obviously going to need more help.
meanings.example_cn: 显然我们将需要更多的帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: an important social event or ceremony
meanings.example: I’m saving this bottle of champagne for a special occasion.
meanings.example_cn: 我要把这瓶香槟酒留到特别的日子喝。

meanings.meaning_cn: 工作，职业；消遣，业余活动；（尤指军队的）占领，控制；（房屋等地方的）居住，使用
<美>海洋，大海（the ocean）；（五大洋之一的）洋；<非正式>许多，大量（an ocean of/oceans of）

meanings.meaning_en: used to show what a part belongs to or comes from
meanings.example: the back of the house
meanings.example_cn: 房子的后部

meanings.meaning_en: away from a place
meanings.example: He got into his car and drove off.
meanings.example_cn: 他上了车，随即开车走了。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone if they would like to have something, or to hold something out to them so that they can take it
meanings.example: Can I offer you something to drink?
meanings.example_cn: 我给你拿点喝的好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a statement saying that you are willing to do something for someone or give them something
meanings.example: I can’t turn down the offer of a free trip to Milan!
meanings.example_cn: 我怎能拒绝免费去米兰旅行的机会！

meanings.meaning_en: a building that belongs to a company or organization, with rooms where people can work at desks
meanings.example: The department occupies an office just a mile from the White House.
meanings.example_cn: 该部门就在离白宫一英里远的地方有个办公楼。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is in a position in an organization or the government
meanings.example: a former Cabinet officer
meanings.example_cn: 前内阁官员

meanings.meaning_en: if something happens often, it happens regularly or many times
meanings.example: She often works at the weekend.
meanings.example_cn: 她周末经常要上班。

meanings.meaning_en: used when you want to get someone’s attention or continue what you are saying
meanings.example: Oh, look, I think that’s Harry over there.
meanings.example_cn: 噢，你看，我想那边那个人是哈里。

meanings.meaning_en: the thick dark liquid from under the ground from which petrol is produced
meanings.example: a rise in the price of oil
meanings.example_cn: 石油价格的上涨

meanings.meaning_en: to put oil onto part of a machine or part of something that moves, to help it to move or work more smoothly
meanings.example: the importance of protecting our oil supplies
meanings.example_cn: 保护我们石油供应的重要性

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is old has lived for a very long time
meanings.example: an old man
meanings.example_cn: 一位老人

meanings.meaning_cn: 过时的，老式的；（观点、习俗、价值观等）守旧的，传统的；（表情）反对的
meanings.example: An old-fashioned bell tinkled as he pushed open the door.
meanings.example_cn: 当他推开这扇门时，一个老式的门铃发出叮当声。

meanings.meaning_cn: <美>（主要用威士忌、苦味酒、水和糖调成的）威士忌鸡尾酒
meanings.example: Singer Brett Anderson inspires old-fashioned hero worship.
meanings.example_cn: 歌手布雷特•安德森唤起了老式的个人崇拜风潮。

meanings.meaning_en: a small bitter egg-shaped black or green fruit, used as food and for making oil
meanings.example: an olive grove
meanings.example_cn: 一片橄榄树林

meanings.meaning_en: used to say what part of someone or something is hit or touched
meanings.example: I wanted to punch him on the nose.
meanings.example_cn: 我真想一拳打到他鼻子上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在船上（或飞机上、火车上）：指在船、飞机或火车内部。
meanings.example: We have six gyros on board.
meanings.example_cn: 我们船上有六个陀螺仪。

meanings.meaning_cn: 支持：指对某个想法或项目给予支持。
meanings.example: There are two restaurants on board ship.
meanings.example_cn: 船上有两个餐厅。

meanings.meaning_cn: 加入团队：非正式用法，表示成为某个团队的一员。
meanings.example: The six astronauts on board will spend ten days in space.
meanings.example_cn: 宇宙飞船上的六位宇航员将在太空度过10天的时间。

meanings.meaning_cn: 骑马：非正式用法，特指职业赛马骑师骑马比赛。
meanings.example: We have six gyros on board.
meanings.example_cn: 我们船上有六个陀螺仪。

meanings.meaning_cn: 着火；起火；在兴头上；非常激动
meanings.example: Many of the buildings in the west of the city are on fire.
meanings.example_cn: 该城西部的许多建筑都着火了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 步行：没有使用交通工具，用脚步行走。
meanings.example: I left my car in a lay-by and set off on foot.
meanings.example_cn: 我把车留在路侧停车带，开始步行。

meanings.meaning_cn: 故意地：有意地、刻意地做某事。
meanings.example: Emily drops the water on purpose.
meanings.example_cn: 艾米丽是故意洒水的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 按要求：根据需要或要求。
meanings.example: Each guest has her own single room, or shares, on request, a double room.
meanings.example_cn: 每位客人都有自己的单人房间，经要求也可共用双人间。

meanings.meaning_cn: 特价销售：商品以降价或特价的方式出售。
meanings.example: Are the erasers on sale?
meanings.example_cn: 这些橡皮在出售吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 准时：按照预定的时间进行；不延误或提前。
meanings.example: Don't worry, she'll be on time.
meanings.example_cn: 别担心，她会准时的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 按时：在规定的时间内完成；不延迟。
meanings.example: You're bang on time, as usual.
meanings.example_cn: 你像往常一样，非常准时。

meanings.meaning_en: on one occasion only
meanings.example: I’ve only met her once.
meanings.example_cn: 我只见过她一面。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 1
meanings.example: They had one daughter.
meanings.example_cn: 他们有一个女儿。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to a member of a group or pair of people or things
meanings.example: one hundred and twenty-one pounds
meanings.example_cn: 121英镑

meanings.meaning_en: a round white vegetable with a brown, red, or white skin and many layers. Onions have a strong taste and smell.
meanings.example: Chop the onions finely.
meanings.example_cn: 把洋葱切碎。

meanings.meaning_cn: （产品、服务或信息）在线的，网上的; （计算机）联机的
meanings.example: An online tutorial is provided.
meanings.example_cn: 在线辅导可供查阅。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在网上，利用网际网路（购买、获得等）; 联机地，在电脑操控下; 开始运行，存在着
meanings.example: I keep getting disconnected when I'm online.
meanings.example_cn: 我上网时不断掉线。

meanings.meaning_en: not more than a particular number, age etc
meanings.example: Naomi was only 17 when she got married.
meanings.example_cn: 娜奥米结婚时才17岁。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that there is one person, thing, or group in a particular situation and no others
meanings.example: There are only a few cars on the island.
meanings.example_cn: 这个岛上只有几辆汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that someone or something moves to a position on a surface, area, or object
meanings.example: She watched him walk onto the platform.
meanings.example_cn: 她看着他走上站台。

meanings.meaning_en: not closed, so that things, people, air etc can go in and out or be put in and out
meanings.example: He threw the door open and ran down the stairs.
meanings.example_cn: 他猛地打开门，往楼下跑去。

meanings.meaning_en: to move a door, window etc so that people, things, air etc can pass through, or to be moved in this way
meanings.example: an open window
meanings.example_cn: 打开的窗户

meanings.meaning_cn: 开放时间：商店或组织对顾客或访客开放的时间。
meanings.example: The opening hours are as follows...
meanings.example_cn: 营业时间如下…

meanings.meaning_en: a musical play in which all of the words are sung
meanings.example: We go to the opera (= go to a performance of opera ) regularly.
meanings.example_cn: 我们常去听歌剧。

meanings.meaning_en: to use and control a machine or equipment
meanings.example: The Lewis family operated a number of boats on the canal.
meanings.example_cn: 刘易斯一家在运河上经营着几艘船。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of cutting into someone’s body to repair or remove a part that is damaged
meanings.example: She’s going to need an operation on her ankle.
meanings.example_cn: 她需要接受脚踝手术。

meanings.meaning_en: your ideas or beliefs about a particular subject
meanings.example: What’s your opinion of Cathy?
meanings.example_cn: 你对凯茜的看法如何？

meanings.meaning_cn: 完全相反的，截然不同的；相反的，另一边的；（在说话者、所指的人或物）对面的；（角）对的；（叶，芽）对生的
对立的人（或物），对立面；反义词
在……对面，与……相对；与……合演，与……联袂演出
可选择的事物；选择，选择权；（将来的）买卖选择权利，期权；（计算机程序中的）选项；<英>选修课；（购买新设备，尤其是汽车时提供的）附件，配件

meanings.meaning_en: used between two words or phrases to show that either of two things is possible, or used before the last in a list of possibilities or choices
meanings.example: Shall we go out to the cinema or stay at home?
meanings.example_cn: 我们是出去看电影还是待在家里？

meanings.meaning_en: a round fruit that has a thick orange skin and is divided into parts inside
meanings.example: orange juice
meanings.example_cn: 橙汁

meanings.meaning_cn: （大型的）管弦乐队；乐池（=orchestra pit）；<美>（剧院中）靠近舞台的座位；古希腊剧场舞台前部半圆形的表演区（供合唱队表演歌舞）

meanings.meaning_en: the way that things or events are arranged in relation to each other, so that one thing is first, another thing is second etc
meanings.example: There seemed to be no logical order to the sections.
meanings.example_cn: 这几部分似乎没有逻辑顺序。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone that they must do something, especially using your official power or authority
meanings.example: Let’s have some order in here.
meanings.example_cn: 我们把这里整理一下吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 普通的，平常的；平淡无奇的，平庸的；（尤指法官、主教）常任的，本身有权的
常见的人（或事物）（the ordinary）；<英>常任法官；管区长，教区长（the Ordinary）；（罗马天主教）常规弥撒（Ordinary）；礼拜式规程书典（Ordinary）；（纹章）普通图记；普通股（ordinary share 的简称）；<美>（前轮大后轮小的）老式自行车
起初的，原先的；原作的，真迹的；新创作的，未发表的；独创的，新颖的；有独到见解的，有独创性的
（艺术作品或文件的）原件，原稿；（文学作品中人物或地点的）原型；原版书，原版唱片；（根据服装展特制图样定做的）真品原板服装；<非正式>（举止、服装等）怪异滑稽的人，独特有趣的人

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to all the people or things in a group apart from the one you have already men­tioned or the one that is already known about
meanings.example: The other hotels are all full.
meanings.example_cn: 其他的宾馆均已客满。

meanings.meaning_en: used to state what the result would be if sth did not happen or if the situation were different
meanings.example: You’ll have to go now, otherwise you’ll miss your bus.
meanings.example_cn: 你现在就得走，要不然就赶不上公共汽车了。

meanings.meaning_en: it is morally right to do a particular thing or that it is morally right for a particular situation to exist, especially when giving or asking for advice or opinions.
meanings.example: Basically the system ought to have worked.
meanings.example_cn: 其实这套系统本应发挥作用的。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to or connected with us
meanings.example: They partook of our triumph.
meanings.example_cn: 他们分享我们的胜利。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to something that belongs to or is connected with us
meanings.example: I’ll show you to your room. Ours is next door.
meanings.example_cn: 我带你去你的房间，我们的房间在你的隔壁。

meanings.meaning_en: from inside an object, container, building, or place
meanings.example: She opened her suitcase and took out a pair of shoes.
meanings.example_cn: 她打开手提箱，拿出一双鞋。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不再处于某个地方或状态：表示不再处于某个特定的地方或状态。
meanings.example: Kent, you're out of order.
meanings.example_cn: 肯特，你太过分了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 由……制成：表示某物是由特定材料制成的。
meanings.example: I asked out of curiosity.
meanings.example_cn: 我因为好奇问了问。

meanings.meaning_cn: 因为……而做某事：表示某人做某事的原因。
meanings.example: I'm right out of ideas.
meanings.example_cn: 我完全没了主意。

meanings.meaning_cn: 从……中选出：表示从一定数量或数量中选择。
meanings.example: Kent, you're out of order.
meanings.example_cn: 肯特，你太过分了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 从……中来，起源于：表示某物来自或起源于某个地方或开始于某个时间。
meanings.example: Kent, you're out of order.
meanings.example_cn: 肯特，你太过分了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不再参与：表示不再参与某个活动或关系。
meanings.example: Kent, you're out of order.
meanings.example_cn: 肯特，你太过分了。

meanings.meaning_cn:
过时的：指衣服、颜色、款式等陈旧不时尚。
指信息陈旧不有用或不正确。
指食物过期不再安全可食用。
meanings.example: You'll need to check that your passport hasn't been out of date either.
meanings.example_cn: 你也需要检查一下你的护照是否过期。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过期的：指食物过期不再安全可食用。
meanings.example: These figures are very out of date.
meanings.example_cn: 这些数字早已过时。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不工作，损坏：指不能正常工作或使用。
meanings.example: You were well out of order taking it without asking.
meanings.example_cn: 你不问一声就把它拿走，这是很不妥当的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 违反规则，不按程序：指不遵守会议、法庭等正式规则。
meanings.example: I checked the files and some of the papers were out of order.
meanings.example_cn: 我检查过案卷，其中有些未按顺序编排。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不合理，不恰当：指超出合理或允许的范围，不正确或不适当。
meanings.example: The toilets are all out of order.
meanings.example_cn: 这些抽水马桶都坏了。

meanings.example: I was out of work at the time.
meanings.example_cn: 那时我失业了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 户外的，露天的；喜欢户外活动的
meanings.example: To outdo or outwit; defeat.
meanings.example_cn: 胜过或赢过；击败。

meanings.meaning_en: the part or surface of something that is furthest from the centre
meanings.example: The outside of the house was painted white.
meanings.example_cn: 这房子的外墙刷成了白色。

meanings.meaning_en: involving people who do not belong to the same group or organization as you
meanings.example: Outside observers said the election was free and fair.
meanings.example_cn: 外部观察员说此次选举自由而公正。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that food is cooked inside, shaped like a metal box with a door on the front
meanings.example: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees C.
meanings.example_cn: 把烤箱预热至200摄氏度。

meanings.meaning_en: above or higher than something, without touching it
meanings.example: A lamp hung over the table.
meanings.example_cn: 一盏灯悬挂在桌子上方。

meanings.meaning_en: for or during the night
meanings.example: Pam’s staying overnight at my house.
meanings.example_cn: 帕姆要在我家过夜。

meanings.meaning_en: to need to pay someone for something that they have done for you or sold to you, or to need to give someone back money that they have lent you
meanings.example: How much do I owe you (= often used to show that you want to pay for something )?
meanings.example_cn: 我该付你多少钱？

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that something belongs to or is connected with a particular person or thing and not any other
meanings.example: Bring your own equipment.
meanings.example_cn: 带上你自己的装备。

meanings.meaning_en: to have something which belongs to you, especially because you have bought it, been given it etc and it is legally yours
meanings.example: Every dance has its own rhythm.
meanings.example_cn: 每一种舞蹈都有自己的节奏。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who owns something
meanings.example: He was now the proud owner of a bright red sports car.
meanings.example_cn: 他现在拥有了一辆亮红色跑车，很是自豪。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things into cases, bags etc ready for a trip somewhere
meanings.example: I forgot to pack my razor.
meanings.example_cn: 我忘记把剃须刀放入行李包了。

meanings.meaning_en: something wrapped in paper or packed in a box and then sent by post or taken somewhere
meanings.example: Hundreds of people packed into the mosque.
meanings.example_cn: 成百上千的人挤进了清真寺。

meanings.meaning_en: a container made of paper, plastic, or cardboard that something is sold in
meanings.example: a packet of envelopes
meanings.example_cn: 一包信封

meanings.meaning_en: one side of a piece of paper in a book, newspaper, document etc, or the sheet of paper itself
meanings.example: The full address is given on page 15.
meanings.example_cn: 详细地址见第15页。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling you have when part of your body hurts
meanings.example: The pain is getting worse.
meanings.example_cn: 疼得越来越厉害了。

meanings.meaning_en: causing physical pain
meanings.example: a painful blow on the head
meanings.example_cn: 头部遭到的疼痛一击

meanings.meaning_en: to put paint on a surface
meanings.example: The ceiling needs painting.
meanings.example_cn: 天花板需要粉刷了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who paints pictures
meanings.example: Gerry’s ambition was to become a portrait painter.
meanings.example_cn: 格里的志向是成为一名肖像画家。

meanings.meaning_cn: （一幅）画，绘画作品；绘画创作，绘画；粉刷，上油漆
给……上油漆（或涂料）；（用颜料）绘，画；往（指甲、嘴唇等上）施化妆品（paint 的现在分词形式）

meanings.meaning_en: two things of the same type that are used together
meanings.example: earrings, £5 a pair
meanings.example_cn: 耳环，5英镑一副

meanings.meaning_en: to put people or things into groups of two, or to form groups of two
meanings.example: We were each paired with a newcomer to help with training.
meanings.example_cn: 我们每个人都和一名新手组对，帮助他们训练。

meanings.meaning_cn: 王宫，（官位极高者的）府邸；住在王宫里的人，王室（the Palace）；大厦，豪宅
王宫的，（总统）官邸的；与政府人员有关的

meanings.meaning_en: having a skin colour that is very white, or whiter than it usually is
meanings.example: Why do your face look like so pale? What's wrong with you?
meanings.example_cn: 为什么你的脸色看起来是如此苍白？发生什么事了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a round metal container that you use for cooking, usually with one long handle and a lid
meanings.example: a frying pan
meanings.example_cn: 炒锅

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing that covers you from your waist to your feet and has a separate part for each leg
meanings.example: She was wearing dark blue pants and a white sweater.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿着深蓝色长裤和白色毛衣。

meanings.meaning_en: material in the form of thin sheets that is used for writing on, wrapping things etc
meanings.example: I’ll get you a piece of paper so you can write the number down.
meanings.example_cn: 我给你找张纸，你好把号码写下来。

meanings.meaning_en: part of a piece of writing which starts on a new line and contains at least one sentence
meanings.example: the opening paragraphs of the novel
meanings.example_cn: 小说开篇的几个段落

meanings.meaning_en: an object that has been wrapped in paper or put in a special envelope, especially so that it can be sent by post
meanings.example: The parcel was delivered last week.
meanings.example_cn: 那个邮包上周送到了。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of forgiving sb for sth
meanings.example: to ask/grant/receive a pardon
meanings.example_cn: 请求 / 准予 / 获得赦免

meanings.meaning_en: to forgive someone for behaving badly
meanings.example: He asked her pardon for having deceived her.
meanings.example_cn: 他欺骗了她，向她请求原谅。

meanings.meaning_en: the father or mother of a person or animal
meanings.example: Children under 14 should be accompanied by a parent.
meanings.example_cn: 14 岁以下儿童须由一位家长陪同。

meanings.meaning_en: a large open area with grass and trees, especially in a town, where people can walk, play games etc
meanings.example: Let’s go for a walk in the park.
meanings.example_cn: 我们去公园散步吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 停车，泊车；停车场，停车位
meanings.example: Philip Raskin, MD, Depart we are pirates, these data are stolen from youdao  of Internal Medicine, Southwestern Medical Center, Dallas; and Christopher G. Parkin, MS, Carmel, Indiana.
meanings.example_cn: 菲利·普拉斯金博士，内科学，西南医学中心，达拉斯部和克里斯托弗g帕金，硕士，卡梅尔，印第安纳州。

meanings.meaning_cn: 存放，寄存；停车，泊车；坐下（或站着）（park 的现在分词形式）
meanings.example: Philip Raskin, MD, Depart we are pirates, these data are stolen from youdao  of Internal Medicine, Southwestern Medical Center, Dallas; and Christopher G. Parkin, MS, Carmel, Indiana.
meanings.example_cn: 菲利·普拉斯金博士，内科学，西南医学中心，达拉斯部和克里斯托弗g帕金，硕士，卡梅尔，印第安纳州。

meanings.example: Philip Raskin, MD, Depart we are pirates, these data are stolen from youdao  of Internal Medicine, Southwestern Medical Center, Dallas; and Christopher G. Parkin, MS, Carmel, Indiana.
meanings.example_cn: 菲利·普拉斯金博士，内科学，西南医学中心，达拉斯部和克里斯托弗g帕金，硕士，卡梅尔，印第安纳州。

meanings.example: More rarely, the tubes have been malformed from birth.
meanings.example_cn: 更罕见的是，这些管道先天畸形。

meanings.meaning_en: a tropical bird with a curved beak and brightly coloured feathers that can be taught to copy human speech
meanings.example: We recited poems parrot fashion.
meanings.example_cn: 我们鹦鹉学舌般机械地背诵诗歌。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece or feature of something such as an object, area, event, or period of time
meanings.example: For part of the day, you will be outside doing practical work.
meanings.example_cn: 你们每天将有一部分时间在户外实际操作。

meanings.example: Part-time work is generally hard to find.
meanings.example_cn: 兼职工作一般很难找。

meanings.example: The company encourages job-shares and part-time working.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司鼓励工作分担和从事兼职工作。

meanings.example: I'm only part-time at the moment.
meanings.example_cn: 我现在只是兼职。

meanings.example: She's looking for a part-time job.
meanings.example_cn: 她在寻找兼职工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 特定的，某一的；格外的，特别的；讲究的，挑剔的；特殊的，独特的；详细的，详尽的
一点，一个细节； 详细资料，详情（particulars）；（哲学）（与普遍性相对的）特殊性

meanings.meaning_en: to some degree, but not completely
meanings.example: The poor weather was partly responsible for the crash.
meanings.example_cn: 天气不好是造成坠机事故的部分原因。

meanings.meaning_en: one of two people who are married, or who live together and have a sexual relationship
meanings.example: Discuss your worries with your partner.
meanings.example_cn: 和伴侣谈谈你的忧虑。

meanings.meaning_en: a social event when a lot of people meet together to enjoy themselves by eating, drinking, dancing etc
meanings.example: We’re having a small party this evening to celebrate our wedding anniversary.
meanings.example_cn: 我们今晚有个小聚会，庆祝我们的结婚纪念日。

meanings.meaning_en: to come up to a particular place, person, or object and go past them
meanings.example: The crowd parted to let the truck pass.
meanings.example_cn: 人群分开让卡车通过。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is travelling in a vehicle, plane, boat etc, but is not driving it or working on it
meanings.example: Neither the driver nor the passengers were hurt.
meanings.example_cn: 司机和乘客均未受伤。

meanings.meaning_en: done, used, or experienced before now
meanings.example: Judging by her past performance, Jane should do very well.
meanings.example_cn: 从以往的表现来看，简应该会干得很好。

meanings.meaning_en: the time that existed before the present
meanings.example: From past experience she knew that it was no use arguing with him.
meanings.example_cn: 根据过去的经验，她知道和他争论是没有用的。

meanings.example: She dug into her bowl of pasta.
meanings.example_cn: 她津津有味地吃着碗里的面条。

meanings.example: I'm not overly fond of pasta.
meanings.example_cn: 我不怎么太喜爱意大利面食。

meanings.meaning_en: a track that has been made deliberately or made by many people walking over the same ground
meanings.example: I walked nervously up the garden path towards the front door.
meanings.example_cn: 我提心吊胆地沿着花园的小道向前门走去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 病人，患者；（语言学）受动者，承受者

meanings.meaning_en: able to wait calmly for a long time or to accept difficulties, people’s annoying behaviour etc without becoming angry
meanings.example: You’ll just have to be patient and wait till I’m off the phone.
meanings.example_cn: 你只能耐心点，等我打完电话。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is receiving medical treatment from a doctor or in a hospital
meanings.example: She was tough but wonderful with her patients.
meanings.example_cn: 她很严厉，但对病人很好。

meanings.meaning_en: the regular way in which something happens, develops, or is done
meanings.example: Weather patterns have changed in recent years.
meanings.example_cn: 气候模式近年已经发生了变化。

meanings.meaning_cn: 暂停，停顿；暂停键；延长记号
暂停，停顿；（按暂停键）暂停；踌躇
<英>人行道；<美>（公路或街道的）硬路面；铺过的表面（地方）；（水平分布的）裸露岩面，砾石滩

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone money for something you buy or for a service
meanings.example: How would you like to pay?
meanings.example_cn: 你想怎么付款？

meanings.meaning_en: a round green seed that is cooked and eaten as a vegetable, or the plant on which these seeds grow
meanings.example: roast chicken with peas and carrots
meanings.example_cn: 烤鸡配豌豆胡萝卜

meanings.meaning_en: a situation or a period of time in which there is no war or violence in a country or an area
meanings.example: The country is at peace with its neighbours for the first time in years.
meanings.example_cn: 这是多年来该国与其邻国第一次和平共处。

meanings.meaning_en: a peaceful time, place, or situation is quiet and calm without any worry or excitement
meanings.example: We had a peaceful afternoon without the children.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们不在，我们度过了一个宁静的下午。

meanings.meaning_en: a round juicy fruit that has a soft yellow or red skin and a large, hard seed in the centre, or the tree that this fruit grows on
meanings.example: Those boys rifled the peach trees in our garden.
meanings.example_cn: 那些男孩子把我们花园里的桃树抢摘光了。

meanings.meaning_en: the sharply pointed top of a mountain
meanings.example: snow-capped mountain peaks
meanings.example_cn: 白雪覆盖的山顶

meanings.meaning_en: used to talk about the best, highest, or greatest level or amount of something
meanings.example: jagged peaks
meanings.example_cn: 嶙峋的山峰

meanings.meaning_cn: 花生，花生米；<非正式>很少的钱（peanuts）；小片聚苯乙烯泡沫塑料（peanuts）

meanings.meaning_en: a sweet juicy fruit that has a round base and is thinner near the top, or the tree that produces this fruit
meanings.example: a pear tree
meanings.example_cn: 梨树

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is walking, especially along a street or other place used by cars
meanings.example: Ingrid was a walker, even in Los Angeles, where a pedestrian is a rare sight.
meanings.example_cn: 英格丽德是个步行者，即使在行人少见的洛杉矶也是如此。

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument for writing or drawing with ink
meanings.example: a ballpoint pen
meanings.example_cn: 圆珠笔

meanings.meaning_cn: 铅笔；石墨芯，类似石墨芯的东西；化妆笔；笔状物；一束光
铅笔盒：一种用于存放铅笔和其他小物品的小盒子。
meanings.example: How much is this kind of pencil case?
meanings.example_cn: 这种文具盒多少钱？

meanings.example: Looking for a Japanese penfriend for my language classes.
meanings.example_cn: 为我的语言班寻找一位日本的笔友。

meanings.meaning_en: a small unit of money in Britain. There are 100 pence in one pound.
meanings.example: The bus fare is 80 pence.
meanings.example_cn: 公共汽车费是80便士。

meanings.meaning_cn: 人，人类；人们，大家（the people）；平民，老百姓（the people）；民族，种族（peoples）；（具有共同品质、兴趣等的）人员，团体；与某人有联系的人们（one's people）；<美，非正式>各位，诸位；<美>（审判中的）公诉人（the People）
居住在，定居于；充满，充斥着（某种类型的人）
胡椒粉；辣椒，甜椒，灯笼椒；胡椒；辣椒粉；（棒球）热身投击球练习
（在食物上）撒胡椒粉；连续射击；在……上撒，使布满； （演讲、文章等）充满……

meanings.meaning_en: for each
meanings.example: How much does it cost per kilo?
meanings.example_cn: 每公斤多少钱？

meanings.meaning_en: one part in every hundred
meanings.example: Poor families spend about 80 to 90 percent of their income on food.
meanings.example_cn: 贫困家庭大约花费收入的80%到90%购买食物。

meanings.meaning_en: not having any mistakes, faults, or damage
meanings.example: His English was perfect.
meanings.example_cn: 他的英语很地道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 演出，表演；执行，履行（尤指复杂的任务或行动）；运行，表现；起…...作用，有…...功能
表演，演出；工作情况，表现；（投资的）业绩；执行，履行；麻烦，苦差事（a performance）；艺术上的表现，演技；（汽车的）性能；（语言学）语言表现，言语行为
meanings.example: Florida International University's perFORM [d] ance home is a classic beach bungalow that features passive solar design, natural ventilation and a hurricane resistant design.
meanings.example_cn: 佛罗里达国际大学的perFORM [d] ance小屋是一栋经典的海滩别墅，以被动式太阳能设计，自然通风和抗飓风设计为特色。

meanings.example: Why we like it: the perFORM [d] ance house is symmetrical pleasing with a modernistic style we think could become really popular - plus they get extra points for a disaster resistance.
meanings.example_cn: 推荐理由：perFORM [d] ance小屋外形对称，风格现代，我们认为很受欢迎。再说还有抗灾性能。

meanings.meaning_en: an actor, musician etc who performs to entertain people
meanings.example: circus performers
meanings.example_cn: 马戏演员

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid with a strong pleasant smell that women put on their skin or clothing to make themselves smell nice
meanings.example: She was wearing the perfume that he’d bought her.
meanings.example_cn: 她擦了他买给她的香水。

meanings.meaning_en: to put perfume on something
used to say that something may be true, but you are not sure
meanings.example: Perhaps she’s next door.
meanings.example_cn: 她也许在隔壁。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular length of time with a beginning and an end
meanings.example: Tomorrow’s weather will be dry with sunny periods.
meanings.example_cn: 明天天气干燥，间或晴朗。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing to exist for a long time or for all the time in the future
meanings.example: He gave up a permanent job in order to freelance.
meanings.example_cn: 他放弃了固定工作，为的是当一名自由职业者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 同意，许可；许可证，书面许可

meanings.meaning_en: to allow something to happen, especially by an official decision, rule, or law
meanings.example: Smoking is only permitted in the public lounge.
meanings.example_cn: 只允许在公共休息室里抽烟。

meanings.meaning_en: an official written statement giving you the right to do something
meanings.example: He had more than the permitted level of alcohol in his blood.
meanings.example_cn: 他血液中的酒精含量超出了允许的水平。

meanings.meaning_cn: 允许；（使）有可能；批准；可能有；允许有（permit 的过去式及过去分词）

meanings.meaning_en: a human being, especially considered as someone with their own particular character
meanings.example: He was a very nice person, always pleasant and friendly.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个很好的人，始终彬彬有礼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 个人的，私人的；私密的，隐私的；针对个人的，人身攻击的；人身的，身体的；人际的，私交的；供个人使用的；亲自的；有人性的；（语法）人称的
（报纸私人广告栏内的）私人信息发布，私人广告；（报纸或杂志上的）个人启事栏，私人广告栏（the personals）
就个人而言；亲自地，本人地；当面地，直接地；个别地，单个地；私人地，私下里；无礼地，冒犯地
meanings.example: People should wash regular ly to ensure personal hygiene.
meanings.example_cn: 人们应经常洗澡以保证个人卫生。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal such as a cat or a dog which you keep and care for at home
meanings.example: They have two pets – a cat and a dog.
meanings.example_cn: 他们有两只宠物，一只猫和一只狗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 药店；（医院的）药房，配药室；药剂学，配药学；一批备用药品

meanings.meaning_en: a telephone
meanings.example: Much of his work is done by phone .
meanings.example_cn: 他的工作大部分是通过电话进行的。

meanings.meaning_en: a photograph
meanings.example: Can you take a photo of me and Rachel?
meanings.example_cn: 你能给我和雷切尔拍张照吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 摄影，摄影术；摄影影像，摄影图片

meanings.meaning_en: a group of words without a finite verb, especially when they are used to form part of a sentence, such as ‘walking along the road’ and ‘a bar of soap’
meanings.example: It is impossible to hypnotise someone simply by saying a particular word or phrase.
meanings.example_cn: 不可能仅通过说某个词或短语就能把人催眠。

meanings.meaning_en: the science concerned with the study of physical objects and substances, and of natural forces such as light, heat, and movement
meanings.example: ...the laws of physics.
meanings.example_cn: …物理学定律。

meanings.meaning_en: a large musical instrument that has a long row of black and white  key s  . You play the piano by sitting in front of it and pressing the keys.
meanings.example: Jean accompanied her on the piano .
meanings.example_cn: 琼为她钢琴伴奏。

meanings.meaning_en: a  pickaxe
meanings.example: The Roman Swiss Army knife has a knife, spoon, fork, spike, spatula, and small pick.
meanings.example_cn: 这种古罗马瑞士军刀包含了刀，勺，叉，长钉，抹刀和小鹤嘴锄。

meanings.meaning_cn: 抬起，拾起：指从地面或其他位置抬起或拾起物体。
meanings.example: Will you pick up all your toys?
meanings.example_cn: 把你的玩具都收起来好不好？

meanings.meaning_cn: 收拾，整理：指整理、清理或收拾物品或空间。
meanings.example: We can pick up Mexican television.
meanings.example_cn: 我们可以接收到墨西哥电视。

meanings.meaning_cn: 学会，掌握：指通过学习或实践获得新的知识、技能或能力。
meanings.example: She bent down to pick up her glove.
meanings.example_cn: 她俯身去捡手套。

meanings.meaning_cn: 接人，搭载：指去接人或搭载乘客。
meanings.example: Will you pick up all your toys?
meanings.example_cn: 把你的玩具都收起来好不好？

meanings.meaning_cn: 增加，提高：指增加数量、水平或程度。
meanings.example: Will you pick up all your toys?
meanings.example_cn: 把你的玩具都收起来好不好？

meanings.meaning_cn: 恢复，改善：指情况、状况或状态的恢复或改善。
meanings.example: Will you pick up all your toys?
meanings.example_cn: 把你的玩具都收起来好不好？

meanings.meaning_en: if you have a picnic, you take food and eat it outdoors, especially in the country
meanings.example: We decided to have a picnic down by the lake.
meanings.example_cn: 我们决定在湖边野餐。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a picnic
meanings.example: a picnic table
meanings.example_cn: 野餐桌

meanings.meaning_en: shapes, lines etc painted or drawn on a surface, showing what someone or something looks like
meanings.example: The room had several pictures on the walls.
meanings.example_cn: 那个房间墙上有几幅画。

meanings.meaning_en: to show someone or something in a photograph, painting, or drawing
meanings.example: a book with pictures in it
meanings.example_cn: 带插图的书

meanings.meaning_en: fruit baked inside a  pastry  covering
meanings.example: Would you like another piece of apple pie?
meanings.example_cn: 想再来一块苹果派吗？

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of something that has been separated from the main part
meanings.example: Cut off a piece of wood 5 cm in length.
meanings.example_cn: 截下一段五厘米长的木头。

meanings.meaning_en: to put all the separate parts of sth together to make a complete whole
meanings.example: His trousers were held up with a piece of string.
meanings.example_cn: 他的裤子靠一根细绳系着。

meanings.meaning_en: a farm animal with short legs, a fat body and a curved tail. Pigs are kept for their meat, which includes  pork  ,  bacon  and  ham  .
meanings.example: He kept pigs and poultry.
meanings.example_cn: 他养过猪和家禽。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of several things of the same type that are put on top of each other
meanings.example: He balanced the plate on the top of a pile of books.
meanings.example_cn: 他把盘子在一摞书上放稳。

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange things in a pile
meanings.example: Ma stacked the cups and piled the plates.
meanings.example_cn: 妈妈把杯盘堆叠起来。

meanings.meaning_en: a small solid piece of medicine that you swallow whole
meanings.example: He has to take pills to control his blood pressure.
meanings.example_cn: 他必须服药控制血压。

meanings.meaning_en: a cloth bag filled with soft material that you put your head on when you are sleeping
meanings.example: I’ll be asleep as soon as my head hits the pillow.
meanings.example_cn: 我头一碰到枕头就会睡着。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who operates the controls of an aircraft or spacecraft
meanings.example: an airline pilot
meanings.example_cn: 航空公司飞行员

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of metal, sometimes containing jewels, that you fasten to your clothes to wear as a decoration
meanings.example: a diamond pin
meanings.example_cn: 一枚钻石胸针

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something somewhere, or to join two things together, using a pin
meanings.example: He pinned the name tag on his jacket.
meanings.example_cn: 他把姓名牌别在自己的短外套上。

meanings.meaning_cn: [园艺] 菠萝；[园艺] 凤梨

meanings.meaning_en: a pale red colour
meanings.example: Her room was decorated in bright pinks and purples.
meanings.example_cn: 她的房间装饰成明亮的粉红色和紫色。

meanings.meaning_en: pale red
meanings.example: She had arrived dressed in pink.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿着粉色的衣服来了。

meanings.meaning_en: a tube through which a liquid or gas flows
meanings.example: a water pipe
meanings.example_cn: 水管

meanings.meaning_cn: 海盗, 盗印者, 盗版者, 侵犯专利权者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who sails on the seas, attacking other boats and stealing things from them
meanings.example: Computer game pirates cost the industry twenty million pounds a year.
meanings.example_cn: 电脑游戏盗版者每年要给该行业带来两千万英镑的损失。

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that you are disappointed about something and you wish things could happen differently
meanings.example: It’s a great pity Joyce wasn’t invited.
meanings.example_cn: 乔伊斯没有受到邀请太遗憾了。

meanings.meaning_en: to feel sorry for someone because they are in a very bad situation
meanings.example: I like Charlie. Pity he had to marry that awful woman.
meanings.example_cn: 我喜欢查利，遗憾的是他得和那个糟糕的女人结婚。

meanings.meaning_cn: 比萨饼（一种涂有乳酪和番茄酱的意大利式有馅烘饼）; （Pizza）（意）皮扎（人名）
meanings.example: I had a whole pizza to myself.
meanings.example_cn: 我独自吃了一整个比萨饼。

meanings.meaning_en: a space or area, for example a particular point on a surface or in a room, building, town, city etc
meanings.example: Make sure you keep the key in a safe place.
meanings.example_cn: 一定要把钥匙放在安全的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of flat dry land
meanings.example: The grassy plain gave way to an extensive swamp.
meanings.example_cn: 青草覆盖的平原被广阔的沼泽地所取代。

meanings.meaning_en: very clear, and easy to understand or recognize
meanings.example: the vast plains of central China
meanings.example_cn: 华中地区的广阔平原

meanings.meaning_en: something you have decided to do
meanings.example: His plan is to get a degree in economics and then work abroad for a year.
meanings.example_cn: 他计划先取得经济学学位，然后去国外工作一年。

meanings.meaning_en: to think carefully about something you want to do, and decide how and when you will do it
meanings.example: Do you have any plans for the weekend?
meanings.example_cn: 你周末有什么打算？

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle that flies in the air and has wings and at least one engine
meanings.example: It is a big airline with a large fleet of planes.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一家大航空公司，拥有庞大的机群。

meanings.meaning_en: A planet is a large, round object in space that moves around a star. The Earth is a planet.
meanings.example: The picture shows six of the nine planets in the solar system.
meanings.example_cn: 这张图片展示太阳系9个行星中的6个行星。

meanings.meaning_en: a living thing that has leaves and roots and grows in earth, especially one that is smaller than a tree
meanings.example: Don’t forget to water the plants.
meanings.example_cn: 别忘记给植物浇水。

meanings.meaning_en: to put plants or seeds in the ground to grow
meanings.example: a huge chemical plant
meanings.example_cn: 一座大型化工厂

meanings.example: Club that promotes and supports yachting and boating.
meanings.example_cn: 促进和支持快艇与划船的俱乐部。

meanings.example: In 1900, yachting began to be competed at the second Olympics.
meanings.example_cn: 1900年，帆船运动在第二届奥运会上开始比赛。

meanings.example: Here is the insurance certificate from Chinese Yachting Association.
meanings.example_cn: 这是中国帆船协会出具的保险证明。

meanings.meaning_en: flat and usually round dish that you eat from or serve food on
meanings.example: The plates were piled high with rice.
meanings.example_cn: 盘子里都堆满了米饭。

meanings.meaning_en: to be covered with a thin covering of gold or silver
meanings.example: a beautiful necklace, plated with 22-carat gold
meanings.example_cn: 一条漂亮的22开镀金项链

meanings.meaning_en: the raised place beside a railway track where you get on and off a train in a station
meanings.example: The Edinburgh train will depart from platform six.
meanings.example_cn: 开往爱丁堡的火车将从六号站台发车。

meanings.meaning_en: when children play, they do things that they enjoy, often with other people or with toys
meanings.example: Kids were playing and chasing each other.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们在互相追逐嬉闹。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who takes part in a game or sport
meanings.example: a game for four players
meanings.example_cn: 四人玩的游戏

meanings.meaning_en: an area for children to play, especially at a school or in a park, that often has special equipment for climbing on, riding on etc
meanings.example: children shouting and running in the playground
meanings.example_cn: 在操场上叫嚷奔跑的孩子们

meanings.meaning_en: enjoyable or attractive and making you feel happy
meanings.example: It had been a pleasant evening.
meanings.example_cn: 那是个愉快的夜晚。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone happy or satisfied
meanings.example: a business that wants to please its customers
meanings.example_cn: 希望让顾客满意的一家公司

meanings.meaning_cn: 高兴的，满意的; 高兴，乐于（做某事）; 洋洋自得的，自满的
meanings.example: You're coming? I'm so pleased.
meanings.example_cn: 你要来呀？我太高兴了。

meanings.meaning_cn: （使）开心，（使）满意; 想，选择，喜欢; 请便，随你的便（please 的过去式和过去分词形式）
meanings.example: Aren't you pleased to see me?
meanings.example_cn: 见到我你不高兴吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling of happiness, enjoyment, or satisfaction that you get from an experience
meanings.example: She sipped her drink with obvious pleasure.
meanings.example_cn: 她小口抿着喝饮料，显然很高兴

meanings.meaning_cn: 大量，很多；<非正式>非常，十分；<非正式>足够有余

meanings.meaning_en: a round flat piece of rubber used for stopping the water flowing out of a bath or  sink
meanings.example: the bath plug
meanings.example_cn: 浴缸塞子

meanings.meaning_en: to fill or block a small hole
meanings.example: an electric plug
meanings.example_cn: 电源插头

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that one number or amount is added to another
meanings.example: Three plus six equals nine (3+6=9).
meanings.example_cn: 3 加6等于9。

meanings.meaning_en: more than zero – used especially when talking about temperatures
meanings.example: The total cost was $10,000, plus 14% interest.
meanings.example_cn: 全部费用是1万美元，外加14%的利息。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of small bag in or on a coat, trousers etc that you can put money, keys etc in
meanings.example: Luke came in with his hands in his pockets.
meanings.example_cn: 卢克走了进来，双手插在口袋里。

meanings.meaning_en: small enough to be carried in your pocket
meanings.example: The policeman told me to turn out my pockets (= take everything out of them ) .
meanings.example_cn: 警察让我把口袋里的东西都掏出来。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing that expresses emotions, experiences, and ideas, especially in short lines using words that  rhyme
meanings.example: I decided to write a poem about how I felt.
meanings.example_cn: 我决定把我的感受写成一首诗。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who writes poems
meanings.example: He was a painter and poet.
meanings.example_cn: 他是一位画家兼诗人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 诗歌；诗一般的美丽，诗的意境；（学校或大学里的）诗歌课

meanings.meaning_en: a mark or unit on a scale of measurement
meanings.example: The party's share of the vote fell by ten percentage points.
meanings.example_cn: 该党的得票率下跌了十个百分点。

meanings.meaning_en: a male police officer
meanings.example: He tried to corrupt the policeman with money.
meanings.example_cn: 他设法用金钱向警察行贿。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving or speaking in a way that is correct for the social situation you are in, and showing that you are careful to consider other people’s needs and feelings
meanings.example: She’s always very polite.
meanings.example_cn: 她总是很有礼貌。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with the state, government or public affairs
meanings.example: a monarch without political power
meanings.example_cn: 没有政治权力的君主

meanings.meaning_en: someone who works in politics, especially an elected member of the government
meanings.example: politicians who are trying to get the minority vote
meanings.example_cn: 努力争取少数族群选票的政治家

meanings.meaning_en: ideas and activities relating to gaining and using power in a country, city etc
meanings.example: a good understanding of politics in China
meanings.example_cn: 对中国政治很好的了解

meanings.meaning_en: the process of making air, water, soil etc dangerously dirty and not suitable for people to use, or the state of being dangerously dirty
meanings.example: California’s tough anti-pollution laws
meanings.example_cn: 加利福尼亚州严厉的反污染法

meanings.meaning_en: a hole or container that has been specially made and filled with water so that people can swim or play in it
meanings.example: They have a nice pool in their backyard.
meanings.example_cn: 他们后院有个漂亮的游泳池。

meanings.meaning_en: modern music that is popular, especially with young people, and usually consists of simple tunes with a strong beat
meanings.example: a new pop record
meanings.example_cn: 新的流行音乐唱片

meanings.meaning_en: liked by a lot of people
meanings.example: Hilary was popular at school.
meanings.example_cn: 希拉里在学校里很受欢迎。

meanings.meaning_en: the number of people living in a particular area, country etc
meanings.example: Nearly 70 percent of the population still live in the countryside.
meanings.example_cn: 人口中差不多有70%仍住在乡村。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where ships can be loaded and unloaded
meanings.example: Britain’s largest port
meanings.example_cn: 英国最大的港口城市

meanings.meaning_cn: 位置，方位；姿势，安置方式；处境，状况；观点，立场；地位，身份；职务，职位；名次；（队员的）职责，角色；恰当位置；阵地；持有状态；（逻辑）命题，主张
安置，使处于；为（产品）定位

meanings.meaning_en: if you are positive about things, you are hopeful and confident, and think about what is good in a situation rather than what is bad
meanings.example: the power of positive thinking
meanings.example_cn: 正向思考的力量

meanings.meaning_en: the fact that sth might exist or happen, but is not certain to
meanings.example: There’s always a possibility that he might go back to Seattle.
meanings.example_cn: 他也许会回到西雅图去，这种可能性一直存在。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可能，或许；（用于强调惊讶或震惊）怎么，究竟；怎么可能，绝不可能（用于否定句，表强调）；能不能，能否（用于礼貌地请求）；尽量，尽可能

meanings.meaning_en: if something is possible, it can be done or achieved
meanings.example: Is it possible to get tickets for the game?
meanings.example_cn: 有没有可能弄到比赛的门票？

meanings.meaning_en: a strong upright piece of wood, metal etc that is fixed into the ground, especially to support something
meanings.example: a fence post
meanings.example_cn: 篱笆桩

meanings.meaning_en: to put up a public notice about something on a wall or notice board
meanings.example: The exam results were posted on the bulletin board yesterday.
meanings.example_cn: 考试成绩昨天在布告板上贴出来了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 邮局：一种提供邮政服务的公共机构，如接收、处理、发送信件、包裹等。
meanings.example: I went round to the post office.
meanings.example_cn: 我到邮局去了一趟。

meanings.meaning_en: a card that can be sent in the post without an envelope, especially one with a picture on it
meanings.example: Don’t forget to send us a postcard!
meanings.example_cn: 别忘了给我们寄张明信片！

meanings.meaning_en: a large printed notice, picture, or photograph, used to advertise something or as a decoration
meanings.example: A team of volunteers were putting up posters .
meanings.example_cn: 一队志愿者正在张贴海报。

meanings.meaning_en: to change the date or time of a planned event or action to a later one
meanings.example: The match had to be postponed until next week.
meanings.example_cn: 比赛不得不推迟到下周举行。

meanings.meaning_en: a deep round container used for cooking things in
meanings.example: pots and pans
meanings.example_cn: 锅碗瓢盆

meanings.meaning_cn: 马铃薯，土豆，洋芋；马铃薯植株；<英，非正式>（尤指脚后跟部的）袜子破洞

meanings.meaning_en: to make a liquid or other substance flow out of or into a container by holding it at an angle
meanings.example: She poured coffee for everyone.
meanings.example_cn: 她为每个人都倒了咖啡。

meanings.meaning_en: Powder consists of many tiny particles of a solid substance.
meanings.example: curry powder
meanings.example_cn: 咖喱粉

meanings.meaning_en: the ability or right to control people or events
meanings.example: It is not within my power (= I am unable or not in a position) to help you.
meanings.example_cn: 我是爱莫能助啊。

meanings.meaning_en: a powerful person, organization, group etc is able to control and influence events and other people’s actions
meanings.example: He was one of the most powerful men in Bohemia.
meanings.example_cn: 他是波希米亚最有权势的人物之一。

meanings.meaning_en: doing an activity or training regularly so that you can improve your skill
meanings.example: It takes hours of practice to learn to play the guitar.
meanings.example_cn: 学习弹吉他需要长时间的练习。

meanings.meaning_en: to do an activity, often regularly, in order to improve your skill or to prepare for a test
meanings.example: They moved the furniture back to practise their dance routine.
meanings.example_cn: 他们把家具往后挪以便练习舞蹈动作。

meanings.meaning_en: to speak to God in order to ask for help or give thanks
meanings.example: They went to the mosque to pray.
meanings.example_cn: 他们去清真寺祷告。

meanings.meaning_cn: 祷文，祷词；祈祷，祷告；祈祷仪式，祈祷会（prayers）；愿望，祈望；极小的机会，极小的可能性
meanings.example: We believe in the power of prayer.
meanings.example_cn: 我们相信祈祷的力量。

meanings.meaning_en: to say that something will happen, before it happens
meanings.example: Sales were five percent lower than predicted.
meanings.example_cn: 销售额比预期低5%。

meanings.meaning_en: to like someone or something more than someone or something else, so that you would choose it if you could
meanings.example: She prefers her coffee black.
meanings.example_cn: 她更喜欢喝黑咖啡。

meanings.meaning_cn: 怀孕的，妊娠的；意味深长的，意义重大的
meanings.example: Results Most of the hepatitis following pregnancy were HBV, with the increment of preg nant weeks, the incidence and mortality rates of hepatitis were increased.
meanings.example_cn: 结果妊娠合并肝炎以乙型为主，随妊娠周数增加，肝炎发病率和病死率增加。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使做好准备，把……预备好；（为……）做好准备；预备（饭菜），做（饭）；配制（药品或化学制品）；乐意做（be prepared to do sth.）；（在和弦中）预备（不和谐音）
meanings.example: My father send me to an engineering school to prep are me for a liter ary career.
meanings.example_cn: 我父亲把我送进了一家工业学校，好让我为文学生涯作好准备了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有准备的，准备好的；打算做，乐意做；提前准备好的
准备，预备；策划，筹备；（使）（自己或他人）作好准备（应对未来）（prepare 的过去式和过去分词形式）
准备（指动作或过程）；准备工作，筹备工作（preparations）；（食物、医药、化妆品的）制剂，配制品；（为科学实验或医药检验预备的）标本；（乐）准备音
指示, 规定, 命令, 处方, 药方
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of paper on which a doctor writes what medicine a sick person should have, so that they can get it from a  pharmacist
meanings.example: We are trying to cut the price of prescription drugs .
meanings.example_cn: 我们正努力降低处方药的价格。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or existing now
meanings.example: the present situation of the millions of people who are suffering poverty and disease
meanings.example_cn: 遭受贫困和疾病折磨的数百万人民的现状

meanings.meaning_en: the time that is happening now
meanings.example: Stop worrying about the past and live in the present.
meanings.example_cn: 别再为过去烦恼，好好地过眼前的日子。

meanings.meaning_cn: （颁奖等）仪式，典礼；授予，颁发；（在仪式上接受的）奖项，赠予物；展示会，介绍会，发布会；陈述，报告，说明；（事物的）呈现方式；（证件等的）出示；（证物的）提交，提供；（戏剧的）演出；（胎儿的）先露位置，产位；（尤指在帝王前）正式引见，引……朝见；<史>（圣职等的）推荐
总统；（某组织的）最高权力人
meanings.meaning_en: the official leader of a country that does not have a king or queen
meanings.example: President Bush
meanings.example_cn: 布什总统

meanings.meaning_en: to push something firmly against a surface
meanings.example: Manville kept his back pressed flat against the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 曼维尔后背紧紧地贴在墙上。

meanings.meaning_en: a woman or child who is pretty has a nice attractive face
meanings.example: a pretty little girl
meanings.example_cn: 漂亮的小姑娘

meanings.meaning_en: to stop something from happening, or stop someone from doing something
meanings.example: The rules are intended to prevent accidents.
meanings.example_cn: 这些规定旨在预防事故。

meanings.meaning_cn: 以前的，先前的；（时间或顺序上）稍前的；<非正式>过早的，过急的
meanings.example: In contrast to Ming Dynasty' s relevant system, this system bears thoree salient features inherited from the previou…
meanings.example_cn: 与明朝的报刊法制相比较，表现出“清因明制”、“斟酌损益”和“严刑峻法”的特点。

meanings.example: In contrast to Ming Dynasty' s relevant system, this system bears thoree salient features inherited from the previou…
meanings.example_cn: 与明朝的报刊法制相比较，表现出“清因明制”、“斟酌损益”和“严刑峻法”的特点。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money you have to pay for something
meanings.example: The price of fuel keeps going up.
meanings.example_cn: 燃料价格持续上涨。

meanings.meaning_cn: 小学：通常包括小学前三年级，但有时也包括幼儿园的学校。
meanings.example: She practised the piano in the primary school basement.
meanings.example_cn: 她在小学的地下室里练习弹钢琴。

meanings.meaning_en: the son of a king, queen, or prince
meanings.example: Prince William
meanings.example_cn: 威廉王子

meanings.meaning_en: a close female relation of a king and queen, especially a daughter
meanings.example: Princess Anne
meanings.example_cn: 安妮公主

meanings.meaning_cn: 最重要的，首要的；本金的，母金的
<美>（美国公立中小学的）校长；<英>（英国的）大学校长，学院院长；（企业或机构的）负责人；（音乐会、戏剧、芭蕾舞剧、歌剧中的）主角演员；（管弦乐队每一乐器组的）首席演奏者；（有利息的）本金，资金；（法律和商业事务中的）当事人，委托人；关键人物；（某些行业）完全合格的开业者；<英>（负责某一部门的）高级公务员；主犯，首犯；<史>决斗者；（支撑檩的）主椽；（管风琴的）主音栓

meanings.meaning_en: to produce many printed copies of a book, newspaper etc
meanings.example: Over five million copies of the paper are printed every day.
meanings.example_cn: 这份报纸每日印量超过五百万。

meanings.meaning_en: writing that has been printed, for example in books or newspapers
meanings.example: When the book was first written no publisher would print it.
meanings.example_cn: 这本书刚写成时没有出版商愿意出版。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine which is connected to a computer and can make a printed record of computer information
meanings.example: a laser printer
meanings.example_cn: 激光打印机

meanings.meaning_cn: 监狱，牢房；监禁，监狱制度；难以脱身的地方（或处境），牢笼
犯人，囚犯；俘虏，战俘；为……所困的人
私有的，自用的；（服务，行业）私营的，民营的；没有股票上市的；私下的，秘密的；（交易未涉及商业机构的）私下里的；（想法、感觉）私密的；未担任公职的，无官职的；与官职（或工作）无关的；安静的，不受打扰的；（人）内敛的，不喜欢谈论私事的；（尤指两人）单独的；私下辅导的；（教育，医疗）私立的；只有自己人明白的
（美、英陆军或美国海军陆战队）二等兵；<非正式> 私处，阴部（privates）

meanings.meaning_en: something that is given to someone who is successful in a competition, race, game of chance etc
meanings.example: In this month’s competition you could win a prize worth £3,000.
meanings.example_cn: 在本月的竞赛中您可以赢得价值3,000英镑的奖品。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that someone or something is very important or valuable
meanings.example: The first prize has gone to Dr John Gentle.
meanings.example_cn: 获得一等奖的是约翰·金特尔博士。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that sth is likely to happen or to be true
meanings.example: It'll probably be OK.
meanings.example_cn: 这大概没有问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation that causes difficulties
meanings.example: She was older than me, but that wasn’t really a problem.
meanings.example_cn: 她比我年长，不过那不算什么问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to cause a particular result or effect
meanings.example: New drugs are producing remarkable results.
meanings.example_cn: 新药正在产生显著的效果。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is grown or made in a factory in large quantities, usually in order to be sold
meanings.example: The London factory assembles the finished product .
meanings.example_cn: 伦敦工厂组装成品。

meanings.meaning_cn: （尤指需要长期训练和正规资格的）职业；（某）职业界同行，同业；（统称，指需要较高教育水平的）职业（the professions）；（信念、观点或感情的）公开表示，表白；入教誓言，修道誓约；入教仪式，入教

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a job that needs special education and training
meanings.example: What professional qualifications does he have?
meanings.example_cn: 他有哪些专业资格？

meanings.meaning_en: someone who works in a job that needs special education and training, such as a doctor, lawyer, or architect
meanings.example: You may need to seek professional help.
meanings.example_cn: 你可能需要寻求专业帮助。

meanings.meaning_cn: 教授；<美>（大学的）讲师，教员；信仰表示者，宣称信仰者

meanings.meaning_en: slow or steady movement somewhere
meanings.example: We made good progress despite the snow.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管下雪，我们的行程还是很顺利。

meanings.meaning_en: a carefully planned piece of work to get information about something, to build something, to improve something etc
meanings.example: The project aims to provide an analysis of children’s emotions.
meanings.example_cn: 该计划旨在对儿童情绪作出分析。

meanings.meaning_en: to stick out beyond an edge or surface
meanings.example: a three-year research project
meanings.example_cn: 一项为期三年的研究计划

meanings.meaning_cn: 承诺，保证；使很可能，预示；指望，期待（promise oneself）；<古>把（某人，尤指女人）许配给；有指望，有前途
承诺，诺言；前途，指望；迹象，预示
促进，提倡；升职，晋升；促销，推广； 将（运动队）晋级；使（学生）升年级；负责筹办，主办（大型活动，如音乐会或体育比赛）；促使（议会私法议案）通过；使（卒）升格为（尤指后等）；<英>（先打大牌）使（小牌）赢得一墩；使（催化剂）更活泼
发（音），读（音）；正式宣布（或公布、授予等）；发表意见，表态

meanings.example: The Korean ship was apparently undamaged.
meanings.example_cn: 那艘韩国船只显然并未被破坏。

meanings.meaning_en: right, suitable, or correct
meanings.example: Everything was in its proper place (= where it should be ) .
meanings.example_cn: 每样东西都放在恰当的位置。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing or things that someone owns
meanings.example: The hotel is not responsible for any loss or damage to guests’ personal property .
meanings.example_cn: 宾馆对住客个人财物的丢失和损坏概不负责。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep someone or something safe from harm, damage, or illness
meanings.example: Are we doing enough to protect the environment?
meanings.example_cn: 我们在保护环境方面做得够吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 骄傲的；自负的〔含贬义〕；自豪的
meanings.meaning_en: thinking that you are more important, skilful etc than you really are – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: a proud man who would not admit his mistakes
meanings.example_cn: 自以为是、不愿认错的男子

meanings.meaning_en: to show that something is true by providing facts, information etc
meanings.example: You’re wrong, and I can prove it.
meanings.example_cn: 你错了，我可以证明。

meanings.meaning_en: to give something to someone or make it available to them, because they need it or want it
meanings.example: Tea and biscuits will be provided.
meanings.example_cn: 有茶水和饼干供应。

meanings.meaning_cn: 公众的，大众的；公共的，公用的；政府的，公众事务的；<英> 大学的，为大学的；（声明、事件等）公开的，公诸于众的；公开场合的，大庭广众的；上市的；众所周知的，广为人知的
公众，大众（the public）；志趣相投（或从事同一类活动、具有共同特征）的群体；<非正式>（对某个艺术家、作家或表演家感兴趣的）读者，观众（one's public）；<英>（酒馆中的）低价吧台（=public bar），酒吧（=public house）；公共场所
出版，发行（书、杂志等）；（作家、 音乐家等）发表（自己的作品），使（作品）出版；（在互联网上）发表；（在报纸或杂志上）刊登，登载；公布，公开；颁布（法令），宣读（法令，结婚预告）；<法律>向第三方传布（诽谤）

meanings.meaning_en: to use your hands to make something or someone move towards you or in the direction that your hands are moving
meanings.example: Mom! Davey’s pulling my hair!
meanings.example_cn: 妈妈! 戴维拽我的头发！

meanings.meaning_en: an act of using force to move something towards you or in the same direction that you are moving
meanings.example: He gave her a sharp pull forward.
meanings.example_cn: 他猛地把她往前一拉。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine for forcing liquid or gas into or out of something
meanings.example: water/air/beer etc pump (=for moving water, air etc)
meanings.example_cn: 抽水机/抽气机/啤酒泵等

meanings.meaning_en: to make liquid or gas move in a particular direction, using a pump
meanings.example: It's not enough to get rid of raw sewage by pumping it out to sea.
meanings.example_cn: 仅用水泵将未经处理的污水排入海中是不够的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 处罚，惩罚（做错事或犯法的人）；惩处（犯罪行为）；<非正式>（尤指体育运动中）利用（对手的失误）；粗暴地对待；使遭受严重打击；自责；<非正式> 贪婪地吃喝；施加惩罚

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is being taught, especially a child
meanings.example: About 20 pupils study music here.
meanings.example_cn: 大约20名小学生在这里学习音乐。

meanings.meaning_cn: (常指未满一岁的)小狗, 小动物, 自负的青年
meanings.meaning_en: a young dog
meanings.example: a six-month-old puppy
meanings.example_cn: 一只六个月大的小狗

meanings.meaning_en: not mixed with anything else; with nothing added
meanings.example: rings made of pure gold
meanings.example_cn: 纯金制成的戒指

meanings.meaning_en: the purpose of something is what it is intended to achieve
meanings.example: The purpose of this meeting is to elect a new chairman.
meanings.example_cn: 这次会议的目的是选出一位新主席。

meanings.meaning_en: a small bag in which women keep paper money, coins, cards etc
meanings.example: Julie opened her handbag and took out her purse.
meanings.example_cn: 朱莉打开手袋，拿出钱包。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone or something move by pressing them with your hands, arms etc
meanings.example: It didn’t move, so she pushed harder.
meanings.example_cn: 它一动不动，因此她加力去推。

meanings.meaning_en: to move something to a particular place or position, especially using your hands
meanings.example: He put the coffee on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 他把咖啡放在桌上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 收起，放好：将某物放回它通常存放的地方，当不使用时，例如放入抽屉中。
meanings.example: "Yes, Mom," replied Cheryl as she slowly put away her doll.
meanings.example_cn: “是的，妈妈，”谢里尔一边回答，一边慢慢地把她的玩具娃娃收起来。

meanings.example: Would you put away your toys?
meanings.example_cn: 你能把玩具放好吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 关进监狱，送进精神病院：指将某人长期关押在监狱或精神病院中。。
meanings.example: Put away your shoes.
meanings.example_cn: 把鞋子放好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 1、放下：把手中的东西放在地面或其他表面上。
meanings.example: Danny put down his glass.
meanings.example_cn: 丹尼放下他的玻璃杯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 2、镇压：用武力或权威制止抗议、暴动等。
meanings.example: We've put down a 5% deposit on the house.
meanings.example_cn: 我们已支付了房款的5%作为订金。

meanings.meaning_cn: 3、贬低：用言语或行为使他人感到不好或不重要。
meanings.example: Soldiers went in to put down a rebellion.
meanings.example_cn: 士兵们攻进去镇压了一场叛乱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 推迟：将某事推迟到以后的时间。
meanings.example: We've had to put off our wedding until September.
meanings.example_cn: 我们只得把婚期推迟到九月。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使困惑或不安：使某人感到困惑或不安。
meanings.example: Mr. Bint has a propensity to put off decisions to the last minute.
meanings.example_cn: 宾特先生有一种将决定拖到最后一分钟的倾向。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使厌恶或排斥：使某人感到厌恶或排斥。
meanings.example: Some believe this level of compensation is essentially a poison pill to put off any rival bidders.
meanings.example_cn: 一些人相信这种程度的补偿本质上是一个毒丸策略，旨在阻止一切竞标对手。

meanings.meaning_cn: 摆脱或脱掉：摆脱或脱掉某物。
meanings.example: We've had to put off our wedding until September.
meanings.example_cn: 我们只得把婚期推迟到九月。

meanings.meaning_cn: 欺骗或欺诈：通过欺骗或欺诈手段。
meanings.example: We've had to put off our wedding until September.
meanings.example_cn: 我们只得把婚期推迟到九月。

meanings.meaning_cn: 穿上：指将衣物穿在身上。
meanings.example: He put on a gaily coloured shirt.
meanings.example_cn: 他穿上了一件色彩亮丽的衬衫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 假装：指故意表现出某种外貌或行为。
meanings.example: She put on the brakes suddenly.
meanings.example_cn: 她突然踩了刹车。

meanings.meaning_cn: 增加：指增加体重或数量。
meanings.example: He put on an American accent.
meanings.example_cn: 他假操着一口美国腔。

meanings.meaning_cn: 上演：指进行表演或演出。
meanings.example: He put on a gaily coloured shirt.
meanings.example_cn: 他穿上了一件色彩亮丽的衬衫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 戏弄：指故意误导或开玩笑。
meanings.example: He put on a gaily coloured shirt.
meanings.example_cn: 他穿上了一件色彩亮丽的衬衫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 扑灭（火焰）：将火焰扑灭或熄灭。
meanings.example: He put out his hand to Alfred.
meanings.example_cn: 他把手伸向艾尔弗雷德。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发布（新闻、声明等）：公开宣布或发布。
meanings.example: We put out from Liverpool.
meanings.example_cn: 我们从利物浦起航。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使困扰、烦恼或不安：给某人带来困扰、烦恼或不安。
meanings.example: He looked really put out.
meanings.example_cn: 看来他真生气了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提供（食物、饮料等）：提供食物、饮料等供他人享用。
meanings.example: He put out his hand to Alfred.
meanings.example_cn: 他把手伸向艾尔弗雷德。

meanings.meaning_cn: 生产（产品）：制造或生产产品。
meanings.example: He put out his hand to Alfred.
meanings.example_cn: 他把手伸向艾尔弗雷德。

meanings.meaning_cn: 推迟或取消（比赛、活动等）：推迟或取消原计划的比赛、活动等。
meanings.example: He put out his hand to Alfred.
meanings.example_cn: 他把手伸向艾尔弗雷德。

meanings.meaning_cn: 放置，储存：将物品放置在容器或储藏室中；准备好以便以后使用。
meanings.example: Can anyone put up bail for you?
meanings.example_cn: 有人保释你吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 忍受，容忍：在没有抱怨或报复的情况下忍受或容忍。
meanings.example: She put up with it all stoically.
meanings.example_cn: 她坚忍地承受了这一切。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提名，推举：提名某人参选；推举某人担任职务。
meanings.example: He put up a stout defence in court.
meanings.example_cn: 他在法庭上进行了顽强的辩护。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提供，供应：使某物可用；尤指公开出售。
meanings.example: Can anyone put up bail for you?
meanings.example_cn: 有人保释你吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 提供食宿：为某人提供食物和住所。
meanings.example: Can anyone put up bail for you?
meanings.example_cn: 有人保释你吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 建造，竖立：建造或竖立某物。
meanings.example: Can anyone put up bail for you?
meanings.example_cn: 有人保释你吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 展示，表现：展示某种特质或行为；尤指表现出勇敢的一面。
meanings.example: Can anyone put up bail for you?
meanings.example_cn: 有人保释你吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 贡献，支付：提供某物作为贡献或支付。
meanings.example: Can anyone put up bail for you?
meanings.example_cn: 有人保释你吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 增加，提高：增加某物的数量或程度；尤指增加赌注。
meanings.example: Can anyone put up bail for you?

meanings.meaning_en: a line of people waiting to enter a building, buy something etc, or a line of vehicles waiting to move

meanings.example_cn: 你得排队。

meanings.meaning_en: to form or join a line of people or vehicles waiting to do something or go somewhere
meanings.example: Some of the people queuing for tickets had been there since dawn.
meanings.example_cn: 购票队伍中有些人天刚亮就来了。

meanings.meaning_en: lasting for or taking only a short time
meanings.example: That was quick! I thought you’d be another hour.
meanings.example_cn: 很快啊！我以为你还要一个小时呢。

meanings.meaning_cn: 快速地；很快，马上；短暂地，匆匆地

meanings.meaning_en: not making much noise, or making no noise at all

meanings.example_cn: 我们得安静点，免得吵醒宝宝。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave a job, school etc, especially without finishing it completely

meanings.example_cn: 他和一个同事争吵后就辞职了。

meanings.meaning_en: completely
meanings.example: I’m sorry. That’s quite impossible.
meanings.example_cn: 我很抱歉，那是完全不可能的。

meanings.meaning_en: a short test that a teacher gives to a class

meanings.example_cn: 生物测验

meanings.example_cn: 这家人不在的时候，斯莱特留在这幢房子里看家。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which one group of people tries to obtain or achieve something before another group does
meanings.example: The race is on to develop more environmentally friendly forms of energy.
meanings.example_cn: 人们正在竞相开发更环保的能源形式。

meanings.meaning_en: a loud noise

meanings.example_cn: 这台旧机器以前噪音大得吓人。

meanings.meaning_en: when messages are sent or received in this way
meanings.example: We’ve lost radio contact with the plane.
meanings.example_cn: 我们和这架飞机失去了无线电联络。

meanings.meaning_en: a bar that you use to hang things on

meanings.example_cn: 毛巾杆

meanings.meaning_cn: <英>铁路，铁道；<英>铁路系统，铁路公司；<英>（其他交通工具使用的）轨道

meanings.meaning_en: water that falls in small drops from clouds in the sky

meanings.example_cn: 风雨交加的夜晚

meanings.meaning_en: if it rains, drops of water fall from clouds in the sky
meanings.example: There will be heavy rain in most parts of the country.
meanings.example_cn: 全国大部分地区将有大雨。

meanings.meaning_en: to move or lift something to a higher position, place, or level

meanings.example_cn: 你能把灯举高点好让我看清吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a number of people or things that are all different, but are all of the same general type

meanings.meaning_cn: 叩击, 轻拍, 轻敲, 斥责

meanings.example_cn: 她被一阵急促的敲门声惊醒。

meanings.meaning_en: not seen or found very often, or not happening very often

meanings.example_cn: 这种植物越来越罕见。

meanings.meaning_en: not very often

meanings.example_cn: 如今她很少公开露面。

meanings.meaning_en: fairly or to some degree

meanings.example_cn: 我在相当不寻常的环境中长大。

meanings.meaning_en: to look at written words and understand what they mean

meanings.meaning_en: the money that someone pays regularly to use a room, house etc that belongs to someone else

meanings.example: She rents out two rooms to students.
meanings.example_cn: 她把两个房间出租给学生

meanings.meaning_en: to fix something that is damaged, broken, split, or not working properly
meanings.example: Dad was up the ladder, repairing the roof.
meanings.example_cn: 爸爸在梯子上修补屋顶。

meanings.example: Where can I get my shoes repaired ?
meanings.example_cn: 哪儿能修补鞋子？

meanings.meaning_en: to say or write something again
meanings.example: Can you repeat your question?
meanings.example_cn: 你能重复一遍你的问题吗？

meanings.example_cn: 对不起——你能再说一遍吗？

meanings.example_cn: 我将接替队里的休。

meanings.meaning_en: to answer someone by saying or writing something

meanings.example_cn: 抱歉，我过了这么久才回复。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone about what has been happening, or what you are doing as part of your job
meanings.example: I’ve asked him to come back next week and report on his progress.
meanings.example_cn: 我要求他下星期回来汇报工作进展情况。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to write about news events for a newspaper, or to tell people about them on television or on the radio
meanings.example: a news reporter
meanings.example_cn: 新闻记者

meanings.meaning_en: a polite or formal demand for something
meanings.example: They have made an urgent request for international aid.
meanings.example_cn: 他们紧急请求国际援助。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for something in a polite or formal way
meanings.example: To request more information, please call our toll free number.
meanings.example_cn: 欲知详情，请拨打我们的免费电话。

meanings.meaning_cn: 营救，援救；拯救，挽救（生意等）；<非正式>防止……丢失（或遭丢弃），取回

meanings.meaning_en: serious study of a subject, in order to discover new facts or test new ideas
meanings.example: Gould was helped in his researches by local naturalists.
meanings.example_cn: 古尔德在研究过程中得到了当地博物学家的帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: to study a subject in detail, especially in order to discover new facts or test new ideas
