meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of admiring someone or what they do, especially because of their personal qualities, knowledge, or skills
meanings.example: With respect, I think you’re wrong.
meanings.example_cn: 恕我冒昧，我想您是错了。

meanings.meaning_cn: （对某人、某事）负责的；（对事故、错误、罪行等）负有责任的，应承担责任的；（工作或职位）重要的，责任重大的；可靠的，负责任的；作为缘由的，应受归咎的；向......负责的，向......汇报的

meanings.meaning_en: a period of time when you are not doing anything tiring and you can relax or sleep
meanings.example: You look exhausted! Why don’t you take a rest?
meanings.example_cn: 你看上去累坏了！ 为什么不休息一下呢？

meanings.meaning_cn: 结果；成绩；答案；比赛结果
meanings.meaning_en: something that happens or exists because of something that happened before
meanings.example: High unemployment is a direct result of the recession.
meanings.example_cn: 高失业率是经济衰退的直接后果。

meanings.meaning_en: if something results from something else, it is caused by it
meanings.example: Growing plants from seed can produce disappointing results .
meanings.example_cn: 将种子培育成植株，有时会产生令人失望的结果。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop working, usually because you have reached a certain age
meanings.example: At the age when most people retire, he is ready to face a new career.
meanings.example_cn: 在大多数人退休的年纪，他准备要面对一项新事业。

meanings.meaning_en: to go or come back to a place where you were before
meanings.example: It was forty five minutes before she returned.
meanings.example_cn: 过了45分钟她才回来。

meanings.meaning_en: to carefully examine or consider sth again, especially so that you can decide if it is necessary to make changes
meanings.example: The government will review the situation later in the year.
meanings.example_cn: 政府将在今年晚些时候对形势重新加以研究。

meanings.meaning_en: (North Amercian English) a lesson in which you look again at sth you have studied, especially in order to prepare for an exam
meanings.example: The decision will be reviewed by the Supreme Court.
meanings.example_cn: 这个判决将由最高法院复核。

meanings.meaning_en: to change a piece of writing by adding new information, making improvements, or correcting mistakes
meanings.example: The college has revised its plans because of local objections.
meanings.example_cn: 由于地方上的反对，学院已经修改了计划。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of changing something in order to improve it by correcting it or including new information or ideas
meanings.example: The phase of writing that is actually most important is revision.
meanings.example_cn: 写作中真正最重要的阶段是修改。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you get because you have done something good or helpful or have worked hard
meanings.example: The school has a system of rewards and punishments to encourage good behaviour.
meanings.example_cn: 学校有奖惩制度以鼓励良好行为。

meanings.meaning_en: to give something to someone because they have done something good or helpful or have worked for it
meanings.example: She wanted to reward the cleaners for their efforts.
meanings.example_cn: 她想酬谢清洁工们的努力。

meanings.meaning_en: a food that consists of small white or brown grains that you boil in water until they become soft enough to eat
meanings.example: a tasty sauce served with rice or pasta
meanings.example_cn: 配米饭或意面的美味酱汁

meanings.meaning_en: containing a lot of something
meanings.example: Rich mineral deposits have been found in the sea bed.
meanings.example_cn: 海底发现有丰富的矿床。

meanings.meaning_en: The rich are rich people
meanings.example: Red meat is a rich source of iron.
meanings.example_cn: 红肉含有大量铁质。

meanings.meaning_en: to sit on an animal, especially a horse, and make it move along
meanings.example: She learned to ride when she was seven.
meanings.example_cn: 她七岁时学会了骑马。

meanings.meaning_cn: 骑手, 附文, 扶手
meanings.meaning_en: A rider is someone who rides a horse, a bicycle, or a motorcycle as a hobby or job. You can also refer to someone who is riding a horse, a bicycle, or a motorcycle as a rider.
meanings.example: She is a very good and experienced rider.
meanings.example_cn: 她是一个有经验的优秀骑手。

meanings.example: I stood at her right.
meanings.example_cn: 我站在她的右边。

meanings.example: We should right the poor and the oppressed.
meanings.example_cn: 我们应当公正对待穷人和受压迫的人民。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly in a particular position or place

meanings.meaning_cn: 得力的；右手的，用右手的
meanings.example: You can't do a right-hand turn here.
meanings.example_cn: 你不能在这里右转弯。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of jewellery that you wear on your finger
meanings.example: a diamond ring
meanings.example_cn: 钻戒

meanings.example: a plain silver ring
meanings.example_cn: 一枚素面银戒指

meanings.meaning_cn: 回铃：指当被呼叫的电话正在响铃时，呼叫者听到的音调或音频录音。
meanings.example: You asked me to ring back.
meanings.example_cn: 你让我回电话的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 结账：通过收银机等方式进行总计和记录，特指销售时的结账操作。
meanings.example: Could you ring up the doctor?
meanings.example_cn: 您可以打电话给医生吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 取得，获得：取得某种成就或成功。
meanings.example: I'll ring up in a minute.
meanings.example_cn: 我马上就打电话。

meanings.meaning_en: to increase in number, amount, or value
meanings.example: The police seem unable to cope with the rising tide of (= large increase in ) car crime.
meanings.example_cn: 面对日益增多的汽车罪案，警方似乎无能为力。

meanings.example: The river was alive with birds.
meanings.example_cn: 这条河流周围满是各种鸟类。

meanings.example: The river overflowed its banks.
meanings.example_cn: 河水涨出了堤岸。

meanings.meaning_en: a specially prepared hard surface for cars, buses, bicycles etc to travel on
meanings.example: 65 Maple Road
meanings.example_cn: 枫树路65号

meanings.meaning_en: to cook something, such as meat, in an  oven  or over a fire, or to cook in this way
meanings.example: Are you going to roast the chicken?
meanings.example_cn: 这鸡你是准备烤的吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to steal money or property from a person, bank etc
meanings.example: They killed four policemen while robbing a bank.
meanings.example_cn: 他们抢劫一家银行的时候杀了4名警察。

meanings.meaning_cn: 岩石; 礁石; （尤指凸出地面的）岩块，大石块; 碎石，石子; <非正式>钻石，宝石; 摇滚乐; 可信赖的人，靠山; <英>棒棒糖; <非正式>石毒，强效可卡因块; <俚>睾丸（rocks）; 轻轻摇动，轻轻摇摆
meanings.example: A rock is an inanimate object.
meanings.example_cn: 岩石是无生命的物体。

meanings.meaning_cn: （使）轻轻摇晃，缓缓摆动; （使）剧烈摇摆，猛烈晃动; 使震惊，使害怕; <非正式>（尤指自信或惹人注目地）穿（衣）; <非正式>跳摇滚舞，奏摇滚乐; <俚>很好，棒极了
meanings.example: The ship hit an uncharted rock.
meanings.example_cn: 船撞在海图上未标示的岩石上。

meanings.example: The keel hit the rock first.
meanings.example_cn: 船龙骨先撞到岩石。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which someone or something is involved in an activity or situation, and how much influence they have on it

meanings.example_cn: 到目前为止，科学家们几乎没有该药物在防止更严重的感染后果的功能的明确证据。

meanings.example_cn: “我过生日时汤姆总是给我送红玫瑰。”“多浪漫啊！”

meanings.meaning_en: the structure that covers or forms the top of a building, vehicle, tent etc

meanings.example_cn: 他们最后在屋顶上找到了那只猫。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of the inside of a building that has its own walls, floor, and ceiling

meanings.meaning_en: a line of things or people next to each other

meanings.example_cn: 一排房子

meanings.meaning_cn: 橡胶；橡皮；合成橡胶；按摩师
meanings.meaning_en: a substance used to make tyres, boots etc, which is made from the juice of a tropical tree or artificially

粗鲁的，无礼的；粗俗的，下流的；突如其来的，猛烈的；<文> 简陋的，粗制的；<英> 有活力的，粗壮的；<古> 未开化的，原始的

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of thick cloth or wool that covers part of a floor, used for warmth or as a decoration

to spoil or destroy something completely
meanings.example: This illness has ruined my life.
meanings.example_cn: 这个病毁掉了我的生活。

meanings.meaning_en: an official instruction that says how things must be done or what is allowed, especially in a game, organization, or job
meanings.example: There are no hard and fast rules (= clear and definite rules ) about what to wear to classes.
meanings.example_cn: 对于上课着装并没有硬性规定。

meanings.meaning_en: to have the official power to control a country and the people who live there
someone such as a king or queen who has official power over a country or area
meanings.example: a 12-inch ruler
meanings.example_cn: 一把12英寸的尺子

meanings.meaning_en: to organize or be in charge of an activity, business, organization, or country
meanings.example: For a while, she ran a restaurant in Boston.
meanings.example_cn: 有一段时间她在波士顿开餐馆。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用完，耗尽：指使用完可用的供应物。
meanings.example: They have run out of ideas.
meanings.example_cn: 他们已经想不出办法了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 离开，抛弃：指突然离开或抛弃某人或某地。
meanings.example: I have run out of patience with her.
meanings.example_cn: 我对她已失去耐性。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用尽，耗尽：指完全用完或耗尽某物。
meanings.example: Their luck had simply run out. Still, never fear.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的好运已经结束。不过，别害怕。

meanings.meaning_cn: 结束，终止：指到达终点或结束某事。
meanings.example: They have run out of ideas.
meanings.example_cn: 他们已经想不出办法了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用尽体力：指在跑步中耗尽体力。
meanings.example: They have run out of ideas.
meanings.example_cn: 他们已经想不出办法了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who runs for sport or pleasure
meanings.example: a long-distance runner
meanings.example_cn: 长跑运动员

meanings.meaning_cn: 跑步，赛跑；管理，运作；走私，私运（毒品、枪支等）
运转着的；（水）流动的，（从水管和水龙头）流出的；（疮或身体部位）流出液体的，流脓的；连续的，反复不断的；现场的，实况的；在跑动中完成的，助跑的；持球跑动进攻的

meanings.meaning_en: If you are sad, you feel unhappy, usually because something has happened that you do not like
meanings.example: The relationship had been important to me and its loss left me feeling sad and empty.
meanings.example_cn: 这种关系对我一直都很重要，失去它让我感到难过而空虚。

meanings.meaning_en: not in danger of being harmed, lost, or stolen
meanings.example: She doesn’t feel safe in the house on her own.
meanings.example_cn: 她独自一人在家感到不安全。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong metal box or cupboard with special locks where you keep money and valuable things
meanings.example: Make sure you keep these documents safe .
meanings.example_cn: 你一定要妥善保管这些文件。

meanings.meaning_en: in a way that is safe
meanings.example: Drive safely!
meanings.example_cn: 安全行驶！

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of strong cloth fixed onto a boat, so that the wind will push the boat along
meanings.example: a yacht with white sails

meanings.example_cn: 那只拖网渔船已经从泽布吕赫港启航。

（乘船）航行；启航；驾驶（船只）（sail 的现在分词形式）

meanings.meaning_en: a mixture of raw vegetables, especially  lettuce  ,  cucumber  , and tomato
meanings.example: Would you like some salad with your pasta?
meanings.example_cn: 你的意大利面要配些色拉吗？

meanings.meaning_en: when you sell something
meanings.example: Harvey gets a $50 commission every time he makes a sale (= sells something as part of his job ) .
meanings.example_cn: 哈维每做成一笔生意可得到50美元的佣金。

meanings.example: That salesman is a real crook.
meanings.example_cn: 那推销员真是个骗子。

meanings.example_cn: 整条大麻哈鱼被端上了桌，并用欧芹、西红柿片和黄瓜片作为花色配菜。

meanings.example_cn: 这里面也许要加点盐和胡椒粉。

meanings.example_cn: 一撮盐

meanings.meaning_cn: 科学的，与科学有关的；细致严谨的，使用科学方法的

meanings.example_cn: 他们以不紧不慢的速度出发了。

meanings.example: She said that she couldn't come.

meanings.example: She thought she could reform him.
meanings.example_cn: 她觉得她可以使他洗心革面。

meanings.meaning_en: a farm animal that is kept for its wool and its meat

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of thin cloth that you put on a bed to lie on or lie under

meanings.meaning_en: a long flat narrow board attached to a wall or in a frame or cupboard, used for putting things on

meanings.meaning_en: to produce bright light

meanings.meaning_en: smooth and bright

meanings.meaning_en: a large boat used for carrying people or goods across the sea

meanings.meaning_en: to send goods somewhere by ship, plane, truck etc

meanings.example_cn: 我上班要穿衬衫打领带。

meanings.example_cn: 她又是震惊，又是羞辱，身体直发抖。

meanings.meaning_cn: 吃惊的，震惊的；愤慨的，十分厌恶的
使震惊，使惊愕；（使）生气，（使）不快；使生理休克，使受电击（shock 的过去式和过去分词形式）
令人震惊的；可怕的，令人厌恶的；糟糕的
meanings.example: It is shocking that nothing was said.
meanings.example_cn: 令人震惊的是，什么都没说。

meanings.meaning_cn: 感到震惊；震动；冲突（shock 的 ing 形式）

meanings.example_cn: 展览会上抽象画与令人震惊的照片并列展出。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you wear to cover your feet, made of leather or some other strong material

meanings.meaning_en: to fire bullets, etc.

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a plant that comes up above the ground when it is just beginning to grow, or a new part that grows on an existing plant

meanings.meaning_en: a building or part of a building where you can buy things, food, or services

meanings.example: I went on a shopping spree (= went shopping and bought a lot of things ) at the weekend and spent far too much money.

meanings.meaning_en: soon

meanings.example_cn: 她总是那么时髦，那么优雅。

meanings.example: I only did so-so in the exam.
meanings.example_cn: 我在考试中考得一般。

meanings.example: Their lunch was only so-so.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的午餐很一般。

meanings.meaning_en: the substance that you use to wash your body
meanings.example: Wash thoroughly with soap and water .
meanings.example_cn: 用肥皂和水彻底洗一洗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 肥皂剧：一种连续剧，主要以错综复杂的人际关系和情感化或感伤化的处理方式为特征。
meanings.example: The story has all the elements of a soap opera.
meanings.example_cn: 这个故事是非常典型的肥皂剧题材。

meanings.example: He coaches basketball and soccer.
meanings.example_cn: 他执教篮球和足球。

meanings.meaning_cn: 好交际的，合群的，友善的；（地方，场合，活动）气氛友好的
<美，旧>（非正式的）社交聚会，交谊会；<史>座位面对面的敞篷马车；<史>并肩双座的三轮车；<英>S 形的双人坐椅
社会的；社会地位的，社会阶层的；社交的，交际的；好交际的，合群的；群居的
meanings.example: I have a fantastic social life.
meanings.example_cn: 我有着极好的社交生活。

meanings.meaning_cn: 社交聚会，联欢会；<英>社会保障（the social）
meanings.example: She has a full social life.
meanings.example_cn: 她的社交活动非常频繁。

meanings.meaning_en: people in general, considered in relation to the laws, organizations etc that make it possible for them to live together
meanings.example: technology and its effects on modern society
meanings.example_cn: 科技及其对现代社会的影响

meanings.meaning_cn: 短袜, 鞋内衬底, 轻软鞋, 一击, 零食
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing made of soft material that you wear on your foot inside your shoe
meanings.example: a pair of socks
meanings.example_cn: 一双短袜

meanings.meaning_en: a comfortable seat with raised arms and a back, that is wide enough for two or three people to sit on
a soft sound or voice, or soft music, is quiet and pleasant to listen to
meanings.example: soft music
meanings.example_cn: 轻柔的音乐

meanings.meaning_en: a member of the army of a country, especially someone who is not an officer
meanings.example: A British soldier was wounded in the fighting.
meanings.example_cn: 战斗中，有一名英国士兵受了伤。

meanings.meaning_en: to find or provide a way of dealing with a problem
meanings.example: Charlie thinks money will solve all his problems.
meanings.example_cn: 查理认为钱能解决他所有的问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 若干，一些; 某个，某种; 相当多，大量; 少量的，不多的; 了不起的，很不错的; 不怎么样的，算不上……的
meanings.example: Robin opened some champagne.
meanings.example_cn: 罗宾打开了一些香槟酒。

meanings.example: I picked some flowers.
meanings.example_cn: 我摘了一些花。

meanings.example: We'll eat some now and save some for tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 我们现在吃一些，留一些明天吃。

meanings.example: Robin opened some champagne.
meanings.example_cn: 罗宾打开了一些香槟酒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 某人，有人；重要人物，当权人物
以某种方式，用某种方法；由于某种不明原因，不知为什么

meanings.meaning_en: used to mean a person, when you do not know or do not say who the person is
meanings.example: What would you do if someone tried to rob you in the street?
meanings.example_cn: 要是有人在街上抢劫你，你会怎么办？

meanings.meaning_en: used to mean a particular thing when you do not know its name or do not know exactly what it is
meanings.example: There’s something in my eye.
meanings.example_cn: 我眼睛里有什么东西。

meanings.example: Sarah said something about coming over later.
meanings.example_cn: 萨拉说她等一会儿过来什么的。

meanings.meaning_en: on some occasions but not always
meanings.example: I sometimes have to work late.
meanings.example_cn: 我有时得工作到很晚。

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s male child
meanings.example: Her son Sean was born in 1983.
meanings.example_cn: 她的儿子肖恩出生于 1983 年。

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of music with words that you sing
meanings.example: We used to listen to pop songs on the radio.
meanings.example_cn: 我们以前常常听收音机里播放的流行歌曲。

meanings.meaning_en: in a short time from now, or a short time after something else happens
meanings.example: It will be dark soon.
meanings.example_cn: 天很快就要黑了。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of your body that is sore is painful, because of infection or because you have used a muscle too much
meanings.example: I had a sore throat and aching limbs.
meanings.example_cn: 我喉咙疼，四肢酸痛。

meanings.meaning_en: a painful, often red, place on your body caused by a wound or infection
meanings.example: Mac’s still sore because I didn’t invite him.
meanings.example_cn: 马克还在因为我没邀请他而生气呢。

meanings.meaning_cn: 抱歉的，惭愧的，歉疚的; 表示同情的，难过的; 后悔的，懊悔的; 可怜的，糟糕的
meanings.example: Sorry, the answer's no.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，回答是不。

meanings.meaning_cn: （用于表示歉意）对不起，抱歉; 没听清，请再讲一遍; （纠正自己说错的话）不对，应该是
meanings.example: Sorry, I don't follow.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，我不明白。

meanings.meaning_en: a group or class of people, things etc that have similar qualities or features
meanings.example: Most of the victims developed psychological problems of one sort or another (= of various different types ).
meanings.example_cn: 大多数受害者都出现了这样那样的心理问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things in a particular order or arrange them in groups according to size, type etc
meanings.example: They do burgers, pizzas, that sort of thing.
meanings.example_cn: 他们供应汉堡包、比萨饼什么的。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a person that is not physical, and that contains their character, thoughts, and feelings. Many people believe that a person’s soul continues to exist after they have died.
meanings.example: the immortality of the soul
meanings.example_cn: 灵魂的不灭

meanings.meaning_cn: 声音，声响；听力范围，听距；乐音；（音乐演出、电影等的）音响录制和播出，音响制作；无线电广播；声音，音响；（个人或乐队的）音乐特色，音乐风格；<非正式>流行音乐（sounds）；海峡，海湾；厄勒海峡（the Sound）；印象，感觉；（检查体腔的）医用探子
（使）发声，（使）作响；发出（警告等），（以……语调）发表；测量（水体）的深度；试探，探询；听起来像；（从嗓音中）听起来；（用于谈论印象或观点）听起来，似乎；发音；听诊（肺或其他体腔）；（医）用探子检查（人的膀胱或其他内腔）；（尤指鲸鱼）向深海潜入
无损伤的，健康的，坚实的；合理的，明智的，可靠的；全面的，透彻的；酣睡的，沉睡的；（惩罚）严厉的；不错的，实实在在的；资金充实的

meanings.meaning_en: cooked liquid food, often containing small pieces of meat, fish, or vegetables
meanings.example: homemade tomato soup
meanings.example_cn: 自制的番茄汤

meanings.meaning_en: having a sharp acid taste, like the taste of a lemon or a fruit that is not ready to be eaten
meanings.example: Rachel sampled the wine. It was sour.
meanings.example_cn: 雷切尔尝了尝葡萄酒，是酸的。

meanings.meaning_en: the direction that is at the bottom of a map of the world, below the Equator. It is on the right if you are facing the rising sun.
meanings.example: Which way is south?
meanings.example_cn: 哪面是南？

meanings.meaning_en: in the south, or facing the south
in or to the southern part of England
the direction that is exactly between south and east
meanings.example: It shook buildings as far away as Galveston, 90 miles to the southeast.
meanings.example_cn: 它震动了东南方向90英里远的加尔维斯顿的建筑物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在南方的，向南的；南方的；美国南部地区的（Southern）；（风）从南面吹来的

meanings.meaning_en: the direction that is exactly between south and west
meanings.example: ...some 500 kilometres to the southwest of Johannesburg.
meanings.example_cn: …约翰内斯堡西南约五百公里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 空间，空地；（尤指有特定用途的）空位，处所；（公共汽车等的）空座；开阔地，空旷处；开阔，空旷；太空，外层空间；宇宙空间；一段时间；属于自己的空间；空格，空行；版面，篇幅；广告专页，广告插播时间；（乐）（谱表的）线间空白；（电信）空号
把（某物）隔开；在（词语等）之间加空格；变得昏昏沉沉，瞪着眼发呆

meanings.meaning_en: to make something such as time, money, or workers available for someone, especially when this is difficult for you to do
meanings.example: Sorry, I can’t spare the time.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，我抽不出时间。

meanings.meaning_en: not being used or not needed at the present time
meanings.example: Have you got any spare boxes?
meanings.example_cn: 你有没有多余的盒子？

meanings.meaning_cn: 闪烁的，闪亮的；妙趣横生的，才智焕发的；（饮料）起泡沫的；出色的，杰出的
闪烁，闪耀；生气勃勃；（眼睛）发亮（sparkle 的现在分词）

meanings.meaning_en: someone who makes a formal speech to a group of people
meanings.example: The keynote speaker (= main or most important speaker ) was Robert Venturi, the architect.
meanings.example_cn: 主要发言人是建筑师罗伯特·文图里。

meanings.meaning_en: not ordinary or usual, but different in some way and often better or more important

meanings.example_cn: 教室里的阅读专区

meanings.meaning_cn: 壮观的，令人惊叹的；惊人的，突如其来的
（运动）速度；（某事发生或进行的）速度；快，迅速；排挡，变速器；快门速度；感光度；照片曝光的时间；<非正式>安非他明；<古>成功，繁荣
快速移动；快速运送；超速驾驶；（使）加速，促进；<古>使兴旺发达，帮助成功；<非正式>用（脱氧麻黄碱之类的）兴奋剂成瘾
演说，发言，谈话；说话的能力；说话方式；口语，言语；（戏剧中的）台词；（该词常用于使某人感到自己所说的话很愚蠢）长篇大论

meanings.meaning_en: to form a word by writing or naming the letters in order
meanings.example: How do you spell ‘juice’?
meanings.example_cn: juice 怎么拼？

meanings.meaning_cn: 拼写，拼写能力；拼法，拼读
（用字母）拼写，拼出；招致，意味着（通常指坏事）；替换，顶替（spell 的现在分词形式）

meanings.meaning_en: to use your money to pay for goods or services
meanings.example: I can’t afford to spend any more money this week.
meanings.example_cn: 这星期我没有能力花更多的钱了。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of powder or seed, taken from plants, that you put into food you are cooking to give it a special taste
meanings.example: herbs and spices
meanings.example_cn: 香草和香料

meanings.meaning_cn: 加有香料的，辛辣的；刺激的，粗俗的
meanings.example: Thai food is hot and spicy.
meanings.example_cn: 泰国食品很辛辣。

meanings.meaning_en: if you spill a liquid, or if it spills, it accidentally flows over the edge of a container

meanings.example_cn: 凯蒂差点把牛奶洒出来。

meanings.meaning_cn: <非正式>未必很有趣但有益的

meanings.meaning_en: without being affected or prevented by something
meanings.example: We went out in spite of the rain.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管下着雨，我们还是出去了。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately annoy or upset someone
meanings.example: Kelly loved her husband in spite of the fact that he drank too much.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然丈夫酗酒，凯莉仍然爱着他。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分手：指一对情侣或夫妻结束关系，不再在一起。
meanings.example: My parents split up last year.
meanings.example_cn: 我父母去年离婚了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分散：指一群人停止在一起，各自离开。
meanings.example: The word is they've split up.
meanings.example_cn: 据说他们离异了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分开：指将一起的事物或人分成几部分或几个组。
meanings.example: She's split up with her boyfriend.
meanings.example_cn: 她和男朋友分手了。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a bad effect on something so that it is no longer attractive, enjoyable, useful etc
meanings.example: The whole park is spoiled by litter.
meanings.example_cn: 整个公园环境都给垃圾破坏了。

meanings.meaning_en: an object that you use for eating, cooking, or serving food. It has a small bowl-shaped part and a long handle.
an activity that people do in the countryside, especially hunting or fishing
meanings.example: the sport of falconry
meanings.example_cn: 放鹰狩猎运动

meanings.meaning_cn: 体育中心：一个设施齐全的场所，提供各种体育活动和设施，如运动场、健身房等。
meanings.example: The new sports centre will take the pressure off the old one.
meanings.example_cn: 新的体育运动中心将减轻老体育运动中心的压力。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular place or area, especially a pleasant place where you spend time
meanings.example: a nice quiet spot on the beach
meanings.example_cn: 海滩上一个安静的好地方

meanings.meaning_en: to notice someone or something, especially when they are difficult to see or recognize
meanings.example: I chose a spot well away from the road.
meanings.example_cn: 我选了一个远离马路的地点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 间谍, 侦探 v侦察
meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to find out secret information about another country, organization, or group
meanings.example: She worked as a spy for the American government.
meanings.example_cn: 她为美国政府收集情报。

meanings.meaning_cn: 正方形的，四方形的；成直角的；平方的；两清的，互不欠账的；诚实公正的；<非正式>古板守旧的；平行的，水平的；宽阔结实的；打平的，平局的；一致的，可共存的；长宽为…...的；整齐的；（韵律）简单易懂的
正方形，四方形；广场；平方，二次幂；<非正式>古板守旧的人；（棋盘上的）方格；直角尺，丁字尺；<史>（步兵的）方阵；方围巾；<英>托灰板，灰浆板；（板球）内场；（军营中的）操练场；<美>街区；（占星）90度星位；<美，非正式>美餐，饱餐
使成平方，使成二次幂；使（比赛的比分）打平；挺起胸膛；使成正方形，使成方形；<非正式>贿赂，收买；使谐调，符合；就…...征得…...的同意；结账，付清欠款；横（向）传（球）；（占星）处于方照位置
直接地；成直角，垂直地；<非正式>公正地，诚实地
压扁，压碎；（使）挤进，（把……）塞进；打断，制止，去除；控制，抑制（情绪）
（软式）墙网球，壁球；<英>果汁饮料；南瓜属植物（如南瓜）；拥挤的环境（或处所）；（生）（供显微镜观察用的）软化组织薄片，压片；咯吱声

meanings.meaning_en: a building for public events, especially sports and large rock music concerts, consisting of a playing field surrounded by rows of seats
meanings.example: the new Olympic Stadium
meanings.example_cn: 新的奥林匹克体育场

meanings.meaning_cn: 全体职员，员工；工作人员；参谋
meanings.meaning_en: the people who work for an organization
meanings.example: The staff were very good.
meanings.example_cn: 员工们都很棒。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular time or state that something reaches as it grows or develops
meanings.example: We’re getting to the stage where we hardly ever go out together.
meanings.example_cn: 我们快要到几乎不一起外出的地步了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 楼梯; 梯级（stair 的复数）
meanings.example: Have you vacuumed the stairs?
meanings.example_cn: 你用吸尘器清扫楼梯了吗？

meanings.example: She descended the stairs slowly.
meanings.example_cn: 她缓慢地走下楼梯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分隔栏；售货摊；前排座位
meanings.meaning_en: a table or a small shop with an open front, especially outdoors, where goods are sold
meanings.example: a market stall
meanings.example_cn: 市场摊位

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of paper that you buy and stick onto an envelope or package before posting it
meanings.example: a 29-cent stamp
meanings.example_cn: 一枚 29 美分的邮票

meanings.meaning_en: to walk somewhere in a noisy way by putting your feet down hard onto the ground because you are angry
meanings.example: Richard collects stamps.
meanings.example_cn: 理查德集邮。

meanings.meaning_en: to support yourself on your feet or be in an upright position
meanings.example: It looks like we’ll have to stand – there are no seats left.
meanings.example_cn: 看来我们只能站着——没有座位了。

meanings.meaning_en: a large ball of burning gas in space that can be seen at night as a point of light in the sky
meanings.example: I lay on my back and looked up at the stars.
meanings.example_cn: 我仰卧着看天上的星星。

meanings.meaning_cn: 以星状物装饰,变成演员
meanings.example: The sky was filled with stars.
meanings.example_cn: 满天繁星。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that you were not doing before, and continue doing it
meanings.example: There’s so much to do. I don’t know where to start.
meanings.example_cn: 有那么多的事情要做，我都不知道从哪里开始。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where trains or buses regularly stop so that passengers can get on and off, goods can be loaded etc, or the buildings at such a place
meanings.example: I want to get off at the next station.
meanings.example_cn: 我要在下一站下车。

meanings.meaning_en: to send someone in the military to a particular place for a period of time as part of their military duty
meanings.example: Grand Central Station
meanings.example_cn: 中央火车站

meanings.meaning_en: an image of a person or animal that is made in solid material such as stone or metal and is usually large
meanings.example: Churchill’s statue stands outside the parliament building.
meanings.example_cn: 丘吉尔的塑像矗立在议会大厦外。

meanings.meaning_en: to remain in a place rather than leave
meanings.example: They stayed all afternoon chatting.
meanings.example_cn: 他们待了整个下午聊天。

meanings.meaning_en: good quality  beef  , or a large thick piece of any good quality red meat
meanings.example: ...fresh salmon steaks.
meanings.example_cn: …新鲜的三文鱼排。

meanings.meaning_en: to take something that belongs to someone else
meanings.example: Boys broke into a shop and stole £45 in cash.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩们闯进一家商店，盗走了45英镑现金。

meanings.meaning_en: a road, hill etc that is steep slopes at a high angle
meanings.example: The road became rocky and steep.
meanings.example_cn: 路变得崎岖陡峭起来。

meanings.meaning_en: the movement you make when you put one foot in front of or behind the other when walking
meanings.example: a video of baby’s first steps
meanings.example_cn: 一盒婴儿学步的录像带

meanings.meaning_en: to bring your foot down on something
meanings.example: He took one step and fell.
meanings.example_cn: 他走了一步就跌倒了。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin piece of wood, plastic etc that you use for a particular purpose
meanings.example: a pair of drum sticks
meanings.example_cn: 一对鼓槌

meanings.meaning_en: if a pointed object sticks into something, or if you stick it there, it is pushed into it
meanings.example: a measuring stick
meanings.example_cn: 量尺

meanings.meaning_en: made of or covered with a substance that sticks to surfaces
meanings.example: There’s some sticky stuff in your hair.
meanings.example_cn: 你的头发上有什么黏糊糊的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: up to a particular point in time and continuing at that moment
meanings.example: I still haven’t finished painting the spare room.
meanings.example_cn: 我还没粉刷完那间空房间。

meanings.meaning_cn: 静止的，不动的；寂静的，平静的；不起泡的
meanings.meaning_en: not moving
meanings.example: Do you still have Julie’s phone number?
meanings.example_cn: 你还留着朱莉的电话号码吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a photograph of a scene from a film

meanings.meaning_cn: 蒸馏；使…静止；使…平静下来

meanings.meaning_en: to move a liquid or substance around with a spoon or stick in order to mix it together
meanings.example: Stir the paint to make sure it is smooth.
meanings.example_cn: 将油漆搅拌至均匀。

meanings.meaning_en: the organ inside your body where food begins to be  digested
meanings.example: I was so hungry my stomach hurt.
meanings.example_cn: 我饿得胃都痛了。

meanings.meaning_en: the large hard part at the centre of some fruits, such as a peach or cherry, which contains the seed
meanings.example: ...cherry stones.
meanings.example_cn: …樱桃核。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent someone from doing something or something from happening
meanings.example: The government tried to stop publication of the book.
meanings.example_cn: 政府企图阻止这本书出版。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of hitting something lightly, especially to get someone’s attention

meanings.example_cn: 她觉得有人轻轻拍了拍她的肩膀。

meanings.example_cn: 我走上去轻轻敲敲窗户。

meanings.meaning_en: the sense by which you know one food from another
meanings.example: Some birds have a highly developed sense of taste.
meanings.example_cn: 有些鸟的味觉很发达。

meanings.meaning_cn: 美味的; <非正式> 有趣的; <英，非正式> 性感的，迷人的; 善战的
meanings.example: Although it is tasty, crab is very filling.
meanings.example_cn: 螃蟹虽然好吃，但很容易让人饱。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that you must pay to the government according to your income, property, goods etc and that is used to pay for public services
meanings.example: No-one enjoys paying tax.
meanings.example_cn: 没人喜欢缴税。

meanings.meaning_cn: 出租车，计程车，的士; （南非的）小型不定时公交车; 出租汽船（或其他交通工具）
meanings.example: The taxi showed up on the dot.

meanings.meaning_cn: 茶，茶水; （用其他植物叶子沏的）饮料; 茶叶; <英>茶点，下午茶; <英>便餐，晚点; <西印度>（咖啡、可可等）热饮; <西印度>（尤指带有热饮、面包的）早点
meanings.example: There's hardly any tea left.
meanings.example_cn: 没有剩什么茶了。

meanings.example: "Tea or coffee?" John asked.
meanings.example_cn: “喝茶还是喝咖啡？” 约翰问。

meanings.example: Coffee and tea are mild stimulants.

meanings.meaning_en: to give lessons in a school, college, or university, or to help someone learn about something by giving them information

meanings.example_cn: 他教我分数和计算。

meanings.meaning_cn: 教学工作，授课；教义，学说

meanings.example_cn: 他不适于做教学工作。

meanings.example: Teaching is by lectures and seminars.
meanings.example_cn: 教学形式为讲座和研讨课。

meanings.meaning_cn: 教学；教训；教导（teach 的现在分词形式）
meanings.example: She gave up teaching three years ago.
meanings.example_cn: 三年前，她放弃了教学工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who play a game or sport together against another group
meanings.example: Which team do you support?
meanings.example_cn: 你支持哪个队？

meanings.meaning_en: a special way of doing something

meanings.example_cn: 他是个伟大的球员，球技十分精湛。

meanings.meaning_en: new machines, equipment, and ways of doing things that are based on modern knowledge about science and computers
meanings.example: Modern technology makes moving money around much easier than it used to be.
meanings.example_cn: 现代科技使货币流动比以前便捷得多。

meanings.meaning_cn: 青少年，十几岁的孩子（13到19岁之间的孩子）
电话通讯系统；电话；（电话机的）话筒，受话器

meanings.meaning_en: if someone tells you something, they communicate information, a story, their feelings etc to you
meanings.example: I’ll tell you all about it when I get back.
meanings.example_cn: 我回来再告诉你这一切。

meanings.meaning_cn: 温度，气温；体温；发烧；热烈程度，情绪激烈程度
暂时的，临时的；短期的，短暂的

meanings.example: I'm not much good at tennis.
meanings.example_cn: 我不太擅长打网球。

meanings.example: He's not much of a tennis player.

meanings.meaning_en: a shelter consisting of a sheet of cloth supported by poles and ropes, used especially for camping
meanings.example: We looked for a flat spot where we could pitch our tent (= put up our tent ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我们寻找一个平缓的地方搭帐篷。

meanings.meaning_en: a fixed period of time during which someone does something or something happens
meanings.example: Teachers often feel overworked in term time (= during the term ) .
meanings.example_cn: 教师在学期内经常觉得工作担子过重。

meanings.meaning_cn: 糟糕的，令人极为不快的；极度的，极其严重的；劣质的，很差劲的；可怕的，骇人的；生病的，不高兴的；危害极大的，造成极大伤害的
很，非常；非常糟地，严重地

meanings.example: That’s a terrific idea!
meanings.example_cn: 这个主意真棒！

meanings.meaning_cn: 非常害怕的，极度惊恐的
使害怕，使恐惧（terrify 的过去式和过去分词）

meanings.meaning_en: a set of questions, exercises, or practical activities to measure someone’s skill, ability, or knowledge
meanings.example: Did you get a good mark in the test?
meanings.example_cn: 你这次测验成绩好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the writing that forms the main part of a book, magazine etc, rather than the pictures or notes
meanings.example: There should not be too much text in children’s books.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童书籍里不应该有太多的文字。

meanings.meaning_en: a book that contains information about a subject that people study, especially at school or college

meanings.example_cn: 一本生物教科书

meanings.meaning_cn: （用以引出比较的第二部分）比; （比较数量、距离等）多于; （表示一事紧跟另一事发生）就; 除……（外）
meanings.example: Faith is stronger than reason.
meanings.example_cn: 信仰比理智更有力。

meanings.meaning_cn: （用以引出比较的第二部分）比; （比较数量、距离等）多于; （表示一事紧跟另一事发生）就; 除……（外）

meanings.example_cn: 那些看上去比这些熟一些。

meanings.example_cn: 我还没有机会向他表示谢意。

meanings.example_cn: 你好，戴夫，谢谢光临。

meanings.example: Thanks. I really enjoyed it.

meanings.example_cn: 联合国世界粮食计划署证实其８名工作人员在达尔富尔北部遭到绑架。

meanings.example: Flash card Machine features a free web app for creating and sharing your own flash CARDS.
meanings.example_cn: 记忆卡机器是一款创建和分享自己的快闪记忆卡的免费web应用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 他们的，她们的，它们的; 他的，她的

meanings.example_cn: 他会冲撞他们，踢他们的小腿。

meanings.example_cn: 那里有成千上万的人。

meanings.example_cn: 他们的车大些，所以更舒适些。

meanings.meaning_cn: 这（指前面曾提及或暗指的人或物）; 这（指当前所处的地方或时间）; 这（指即将要发生某事的时间）; 这个（指说话或写字时使用的媒介）
meanings.example: This suggestion dumbfounded Joe.
meanings.example_cn: 这个建议使乔伊惊呆了。

meanings.example: This suggestion dumbfounded Joe.
meanings.example_cn: 这个建议使乔伊惊呆了。

竖起大拇指请求搭便车；用拇指摸，用拇指捋；用拇指示意；用拇指翻动，翻阅
雷，雷声；雷鸣般的响声，轰隆声；怒容满面，（雷鸣般的）怒吼
打雷；发出雷鸣般的响声，轰隆地响；轰隆隆地快速移动，使快速移动；愤怒地大叫，怒吼；砰然重击

meanings.meaning_cn: 整理、收拾或清理一个地方，使其变得有序或整洁：指对一个地方进行整理、收拾或清理，使其变得有序或整洁。

meanings.example_cn: 爱因斯坦改变了我们的时空概念。

meanings.meaning_cn: （公共汽车、火车、飞机等的）时刻表；（学校的）课程表；日程表，时间表
为……安排时间；（学校里）把……列入课程表，排课

meanings.meaning_en: a soft silver-white metal that is often used to cover and protect iron and steel. It is a chemical element: symbol Sn

meanings.example_cn: 旧的锡浴缸

meanings.meaning_en: extremely small

meanings.example_cn: 你给侍应生小费了吗？

meanings.example_cn: 她显得疲倦而且神情沮丧。

meanings.example_cn: 他累了，动不动就发火。

meanings.example_cn: 这一天让人感到又累又长。

meanings.meaning_cn: （使）感到累，（使）感到疲劳；厌倦，使厌倦（tire 的现在分词形式）

meanings.meaning_en: light thin paper used for wrapping, packing etc

meanings.meaning_en: the name given to a particular book, painting, play etc

meanings.example_cn: 《耐心与萨拉》于1969年以《我们的地方》为书名首次出版。

meanings.example_cn: 皮兰德娄将其戏剧命名为《六个寻找作者的剧中人》。

meanings.meaning_cn: 朝; 位于……; 到某处; 到某状态; 差; 给; 对于; 比; 连着; 对着; 等于; 向……表示敬意; 伴随; 为了给……; 适合; 按……的看法; （结算账目时）记入
meanings.example: I was trying to save money to go to college.
meanings.example_cn: 我当时正努力攒钱去上大学。

meanings.example: She would like to talk to people one to one.

meanings.example: They come to eat and drink, to swim, to party.
meanings.example_cn: 他们来吃饭、喝酒、游泳，尽情欢乐。

meanings.meaning_en: bread that has been heated so that it is brown on both sides and no longer soft

meanings.meaning_en: the day that is happening now

meanings.example_cn: 我所想到的第一件事情就是，机组人员究竟是如何决定由谁来帮她脱掉衣服的？

meanings.example: He appeared at the window in a state of undress.
meanings.example_cn: 他光着身子出现在窗前。

meanings.example: She went out, leaving Rachel to undress and take a shower.
meanings.example_cn: 她出去了,留下雷切尔脱衣淋浴。

meanings.meaning_cn: 未被雇用的，失业的；（物）闲置的，未用的
失业人数，失业率；失业，失业状态；<美>失业救济金

meanings.meaning_en: not good enough to do something or to be used for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Jenkins is unfit for public office.
meanings.example_cn: 詹金斯不适合担任公职。

meanings.meaning_cn: 难以忘怀的，令人难忘的
不幸地，遗憾地；<正式>不恰当地，不合适地
meanings.example: Unfortunate ly, that day has come.
meanings.example_cn: 不幸的是，这一天到来了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不快乐的；不幸福的；不适当的
不健康的；危险的；有害身心健康的
制服，校服；<非正式>穿制服的警官；（某一群体的人穿的）典型服装，特有服装；（无线电通讯）字母 U 的代码
全部相同的，始终如一的；制服式的
不感兴趣的；无利害关系的
meanings.example: She seemed cold and uninterested.
meanings.example_cn: 她似乎很冷漠且不感兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe something or someone as uninteresting, you mean they have no special or exciting qualities
meanings.example: Their media have earned the reputation for being rather dull and uninteresting.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的媒体得到的名声是乏味无聊。

meanings.meaning_en: used in the names of some clubs or organizations
meanings.example: the British Golf Union
meanings.example_cn: 英国高尔夫球协会

meanings.meaning_en: a thing, person, or group that is regarded as one single whole part of something larger
meanings.example: The family is the basic social unit of modern society.
meanings.example_cn: 家庭是现代社会的基本单位。

meanings.meaning_cn: 宇宙，天地万物（the universe）；领域，体系；（已知宇宙以外的）宇宙
大学，综合性大学；大学校舍
不友善的，不亲切的；刻薄的；（天气）恶劣的
meanings.example: It's not in his nature to be unkind.
meanings.example_cn: 他天生不会刻薄。

meanings.meaning_en: not known about
meanings.example: The murderer’s identity remains unknown.
meanings.example_cn: 杀人凶手身份仍然不明。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that something will happen or be true if something else does not happen or is not true
meanings.example: Unless some extra money is found, the theatre will close.
meanings.example_cn: 要是不能找到更多资金，剧院将要关闭。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不幸的；倒霉的；不吉利的
不必要的；多余的，无用的
打开包裹；分析；卸下……；解除……的负担
meanings.example: She went to her room to unpack.
meanings.example_cn: 她回到自己的卧室打开行李取出衣物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 令人不快的，不舒服的； 不友善的，不客气的；使人生气的，引发暴力的

meanings.example: She lay sleepless until dawn.
meanings.example_cn: 她躺在那儿，直到天亮才睡着。

meanings.meaning_cn: 到……时，直到……为止; 直到（某处）
meanings.example: Heat the jam until it liquefies.
meanings.example_cn: 加热果酱直至其液化。

meanings.meaning_en: different from what is usual or normal
meanings.example: an unusual feature
meanings.example_cn: 不寻常的特点

meanings.meaning_cn: 向上，由低向高; 到楼上; （太阳）升起; 在高处; 面朝上，面朝天; 从地下到表面，向水面; 向北方，朝北方; 往（较高或较远的）某处; 去，在（更重要的地方，如大城市或大学）; 到……的近处，靠近; 到前面，朝前面; 处于（或进入）直立状态; 起床; 用劲地，以较大气力; （吐）出来; （强度，音量，活动）由弱到强，由低到高，由轻到响; （列表中）处于更高位置，（议程中）处于更重要的位置; （水平、数量或比率）由低到高; 高出，多; 向较高地位，向更好的状态; 出现，出席; （在品质、知识或成就方面）相等，比得上; 一起，聚拢地; 紧紧地，牢固地; 计划要，被建议，正被考虑; <非正式>愿意做（或参与）; 出庭受审的; 处于工作（或可用）状态，进入（可用）状态; （在讨论或思考时）引起某人的注意; 靠近（某人）; 靠近顶端; 做完地，完成地; 封闭，关闭; 成碎片，分成部分; 处于活跃期，进入兴奋状态; 公开展示地; 停下来; 每名队员，每个队; （航行）逆风地，逆水地; （舵柄）迎风转舵; （棒球）在场上击球; （长发）向头上（或脑后）梳理的; 彻底地，完全地; （时间）到; （道路）正在整修的; <非正式>（尤指异常或不愉快的事情）发生，出现
meanings.example: Eighty horses trotted up.
meanings.example_cn: 80匹马小跑上来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 往较高处，向较高处; 沿着……，顺着……; 近顶端; 往（河，溪）上游
meanings.example: In 'She tore up the letter', the word 'up' is a particle.
meanings.example_cn: 在She tore up the letter句中，up是小品词。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在高处; （向上）开; 升于地平线之上; 冒出地面，冒出水面; 在前方，在前面; 起床; 上涨; (时间) 到点的; （正在）发生，进行，出现; 得分领先于（对手），超前于（对手）; 正常运行，正常工作，起作用; （在活动中）轮到某人; 高兴，兴奋; 对……了如指掌的，熟悉的; （道路）正在修整的; （骑师）骑着马的; （物理）（夸克的味）带有+2/3电荷的，上夸克的（质子和中子被认为是由上夸克和下夸克组成）; 向上移动的，上行的; （时间）到点的; （时间）终止，结束
meanings.example: The offer seems to be on the up and up.
meanings.example_cn: 出价似乎越来越高。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使…更高，提高; 举起，抬起; 突然行动
meanings.example: Eighty horses trotted up.
meanings.example_cn: 80匹马小跑上来。

meanings.meaning_cn: （某一阶段的）成功，繁荣; <非正式>走运; 在增长，在改善中; （人或企业）诚实守法; 蒸蒸日上，越来越成功
meanings.example: Eighty horses trotted up.
meanings.example_cn: 80匹马小跑上来。

meanings.meaning_cn: （用于命令士兵或动物）起来！起立！
meanings.example: Eighty horses trotted up.
meanings.example_cn: 80匹马小跑上来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不超过，最多：用于表示某事物小于或等于但不超过某个规定的值、数量或水平。
meanings.example: We're mortgaged up to the hilt.
meanings.example_cn: 我们已经把什么都抵押了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 直到：表示某事物一直持续到某个时间或事件发生。
meanings.example: I'll be up to see you tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 我明天上来看你。

meanings.meaning_cn: 由……负责：表示某事物是某人的责任。
meanings.example: Davalillo goes up to pinch-hit.
meanings.example_cn: 达凡里路上场代打。

meanings.meaning_cn: 正在做某事：表示某人正在进行某事，通常是一些不好或非法的事情，通常是秘密进行。
meanings.example: We're mortgaged up to the hilt.
meanings.example_cn: 我们已经把什么都抵押了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 为……增加最新信息，更新；使现代化；向……提供最新信息
最新报道，最新消息；（计算机软件的）更新；新型，新版

meanings.example: Once you modify this file, upload it via RAM.
meanings.example_cn: 一旦您修改了这个文件，通过 RAM 来上传它。

meanings.example: Try this: Take a photo and upload it to Facebook, then after a day or so, note what the URL link to the picture is and then delete it.
meanings.example_cn: 试试这个：拍一张照片，上传到 Facebook，然后过一两天，注意照片的 URL 链接是什么，然后删除它。

meanings.meaning_en: used to mean ‘on’ or ‘onto’
meanings.example: an honour bestowed upon the association
meanings.example_cn: 授予该协会的荣誉

meanings.meaning_en: in a higher position than something else
meanings.example: the upper lip
meanings.example_cn: 上唇

meanings.meaning_en: to push something over without intending to
meanings.example: He upset a bowl of soup.
meanings.example_cn: 他打翻了一碗汤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 往楼上，在楼上; 脑力上，精神上
meanings.example: She's upstairs getting ready.
meanings.example_cn: 她在楼上做准备。

meanings.example: I carried her bags upstairs.
meanings.example_cn: 我把她的包拿到楼上。

meanings.example: He's upstairs unpacking his bags.
meanings.example_cn: 他在楼上打开他的旅行袋取出东西。

meanings.meaning_en: very important and needing to be dealt with immediately
meanings.example: He was in urgent need of medical attention.
meanings.example_cn: 他急需治疗。

meanings.example: Food aid is urgently needed.
meanings.example_cn: 迫切需要食物援助。

meanings.example: He regarded us suspiciously.
meanings.example_cn: 他以怀疑的眼光看着我们。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用，使用; 使用（词语）; 耗费，消费; 利用（他人或某种情形）; 服（药，尤指毒品）; 需要; 用（名字），自称; 对待; 用（洗手间或卫生间）（礼貌说法）
meanings.example: Could I use your phone, please?
meanings.example_cn: 请让我用一下你的电话可以吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 使用; 用途，用法; 词义，说法; 使用机会，使用权; （尤指思想，体力）运用能力; 耗费，耗用; （经常）服用（毒品）; <法律，史>（尤指受委托代管人的）受益; （教堂，教区）特色礼拜仪式
meanings.example: We'll use concrete paving.
meanings.example_cn: 我们将使用混凝土铺地面。

meanings.example: They should use uppercase.
meanings.example_cn: 他们应该使用大写字母。

meanings.meaning_en: helping you to do or get what you want
meanings.example: useful information
meanings.example_cn: 有用的信息

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that uses a product, service etc
meanings.example: road users
meanings.example_cn: 道路使用者

meanings.meaning_cn: 常事（the usual）；<非正式>常喝的饮料（尤指酒）（the usual）

meanings.meaning_en: an area of lower land between two lines of hills or mountains, usually with a river flowing through it
meanings.example: the San Fernando Valley
meanings.example_cn: 圣费尔南多山谷

meanings.meaning_cn: 值钱的，贵重的；有益的，宝贵的；重要的，珍贵的；可估价的

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money that something is worth
meanings.example: The alterations doubled the value of the house.
meanings.example_cn: 经改建后这所房子增值了一倍。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide how much money something is worth, by comparing it with similar things
meanings.example: We decided to get the house valued.
meanings.example_cn: 我们决定给房子估一估价。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle used especially for carrying goods, which is smaller than a truck and has a roof and usually no windows at the sides
meanings.example: a delivery van
meanings.example_cn: 运货车

meanings.meaning_cn: 香草精，香子兰精；香草冰淇淋；香草冰淇淋色，浅奶黄色；香子兰，香果兰，香夹兰
香草味的；无特色的，普通的
多样化，变化；种类，品种；（人或物的）各式各样；综艺表演，杂耍表演

meanings.meaning_en: if there are various things, there are several different types of that thing
meanings.example: The jacket is available in various colours.
meanings.example_cn: 这种夹克有好多种颜色可选。

meanings.meaning_en: a container used to put flowers in or for decoration
meanings.example: ...a vase of red roses.
meanings.example_cn: …一个插着红玫瑰的花瓶。

meanings.meaning_cn: 蔬菜；植物人；呆板懒散的人；植物
素食者，素食主义者；食草动物
交通工具，车辆；（实现目的的）工具，媒介；（为展露主演者才华而）度身定制的创作（电影、电视节目、歌曲等）；赋形药，调漆料；（个人，组织从事经营、尤指投资的）公司
（用于强调形容词或副词）很，非常; 极其，完全地; <非正式>显著的，典型的; 显然，确实，真正地
meanings.example: She is very caring and very genuine.
meanings.example_cn: 她很有同情心，也非常诚实可靠。

meanings.meaning_cn: 同一的，恰好的，正是的; （加强名词的语气）仅仅的，唯独的，甚至于; （强调极限的地点或时间）最……的，极端的，十足的; 最远端的，末端的; <古>真正的，真实的; 最佳的，最合适的
meanings.example: He was very polite and very correct.
meanings.example_cn: 他很有礼貌且举止得体。

meanings.example: It's hot out – very hot, very humid.
meanings.example_cn: 外面热烘烘的–非常热，非常潮湿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 兽医；<美，非正式>老兵；兽医诊所（vet's）
meanings.example: The vet had improvised a harness.
meanings.example_cn: 兽医临时凑成了一套马具。

meanings.meaning_cn: 仔细检查；彻底审查（某人）；诊疗；作兽医
meanings.example: She's at the vet, with her dog, right now.
meanings.example_cn: 她此刻正带着自己的狗在兽医那里。

meanings.example: What made you decide on a career as a vet?
meanings.example_cn: 是什么驱使你选择兽医这门职业的？

meanings.meaning_en: travelling through a place on the way to another place
meanings.example: We flew to Athens via Paris.
meanings.example_cn: 我们经由巴黎飞往雅典。

meanings.meaning_cn: 录象, 视频 a视频的
meanings.meaning_en: a digital recording of an event, for example one made using a mobile phone
meanings.example: a video clip shown on the Internet
meanings.example_cn: 因特网上的一段视频

meanings.meaning_cn: 电视游戏; 可视游戏
meanings.example: I like watching a video game.
meanings.example_cn: 我喜欢看电子游戏。

meanings.example: It even offered a video clip of these flying penguins, which became one of the most viewed videos on the Internet.
meanings.example_cn: 它甚至还提供了一段这些会飞的企鹅的视频剪辑，成为互联网上浏览量最多的视频之一。

meanings.meaning_en: what you think or believe about something
meanings.example: In my view, the country needs a change of government.
meanings.example_cn: 依我看，这个国家需要换个政府。

meanings.meaning_en: to watch a television programme, film etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 乡村，村庄；在乡村的，乡村的；村民；（城市中带有村庄特点的）生活小区，居民区；<美>（有有限自治权的）小自治市；<澳新>高级城郊购物中心；（动物的）群落

meanings.meaning_en: a small wooden musical instrument that you hold under your chin and play by pulling a bow(= special stick ) across the strings
meanings.example: She rippled a lively rhythm on the violin.
meanings.example_cn: 她在小提琴上奏出明快的节奏。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small living thing that causes infectious illnesses
meanings.example: children infected with the Aids virus
meanings.example_cn: 感染艾滋病病毒的儿童

meanings.meaning_en: an official mark put on your passport that gives you permission to temporarily enter or leave a foreign country
meanings.example: I was still in New York, trying to get a visa to visit Russia.
meanings.example_cn: 我仍在纽约，正在办理去俄罗斯的签证。

meanings.meaning_en: to go and spend time in a place or with someone, especially for pleasure or interest
meanings.example: Eric went to Seattle to visit his cousins.
meanings.example_cn: 埃里克到西雅图去看望他的表兄弟。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who comes to visit a place or a person
meanings.example: Times Square attracts more than 30 million visitors annually.
meanings.example_cn: 时代广场每年吸引三千多万游客。

meanings.meaning_cn: （某人掌握或使用的）全部词汇；（某一语言的）词汇；（某个学科的）专业词汇，术语；（尤指外语教科书中的）词汇表；（美术、音乐等领域的）表现形式，表达手段

meanings.meaning_en: the sounds that you make when you speak, or the ability to make these sounds
meanings.example: He recognized her voice instantly.
meanings.example_cn: 他立刻听出了她的声音。

meanings.example: I could hear angry voices.
meanings.example_cn: 我听到了愤怒的声音。

meanings.example: They had a volleyball court in the middle of the courtyard.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在院子中央有一个排球场。

meanings.meaning_cn: 体积，容积；总数，总量；音量，响度；（控制音量的）旋钮，控制杆；（成套图书中的）卷，册；（期刊）合订本；书籍；<史>（写在羊皮纸或纸草纸上的）书卷；（尤指头发的）厚，多
以卷的形式发出；成团卷起

meanings.meaning_en: to show which person or party you want, or whether you support a plan, by marking a piece of paper, raising your hand etc
meanings.example: In 1918 British women got the right to vote.
meanings.example_cn: 1918年，英国妇女获得了选举权。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the human speech sounds that you make by letting your breath flow out without closing any part of your mouth or throat
meanings.example: But he could say vowel clearly and began to learn vocabulary.
meanings.example_cn: 但是他已经能清楚地说元音并开始学习词汇。

meanings.meaning_en: to stay somewhere or not do something until something else happens, someone arrives etc
meanings.example: Hurry up! Everyone’s waiting.
meanings.example_cn: 快点！大家在等着呢。

meanings.example: A waiter offered him the menu.
meanings.example_cn: 一个侍者给他送上了菜单。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop sleeping, or to make someone stop sleeping
meanings.example: When she woke, the sun was streaming through the windows.
meanings.example_cn: 她醒来时，阳光泻入窗内。

meanings.meaning_cn: 醒来：停止睡觉；变得清醒。
meanings.example: You will automatically wake up after this length of time.
meanings.example_cn: 你将在这段时间之后自然醒来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 唤醒：使（人或动物）从睡眠中醒来。
meanings.example: Wake up, sleepyhead.
meanings.example_cn: 起床，懒鬼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 意识到：使（某人）意识到某事的存在（如问题或危险）。
meanings.example: You have to wake up now, baby.
meanings.example_cn: 你现在得醒了，宝贝儿。

meanings.example: You will automatically wake up after this length of time.
meanings.example_cn: 你将在这段时间之后自然醒来。

meanings.meaning_en: to move forward by putting one foot in front of the other
meanings.example: ‘How did you get here?’ ‘We walked.’
meanings.example_cn: “你们是怎么来这里的？”“我们是步行来的。”

meanings.meaning_en: a journey that you make by walking, especially for exercise or enjoyment
meanings.example: Doctors said he’d never walk again.
meanings.example_cn: 医生说他再也不能行走了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 步行（walk 的 ing 形式）

meanings.meaning_en: an upright flat structure made of stone or brick, that divides one area from another or surrounds an area
meanings.example: the Great Wall of China
meanings.example_cn: 中国的长城

meanings.example: We climbed over the wall into the orchard.
meanings.example_cn: 我们翻墙进了果园。

meanings.meaning_cn: 钱包，皮夹; （装文件的）皮夹，塑料夹; <古>（尤指商贩和朝拜者用的）行囊，旅行袋
meanings.example: This wallet feels like leather.
meanings.example_cn: 这个钱包摸上去像是皮的。

meanings.example: His wallet had been rifled.
meanings.example_cn: 他的钱包被偷了。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you need or want
meanings.example: She spent her life pandering to the wants of her children.
meanings.example_cn: 她一生都在设法满足子女的需要。

meanings.meaning_cn: 战争，战争状态；竞争，斗争，对抗；（为消灭有害事物的）长期斗争，顽强抵御；舌战，论战；军事，战术
meanings.example: Diplomacy is better than war.

meanings.example: They accepted without demur.
meanings.example_cn: 他们接受了，没有提出异议。

meanings.meaning_cn: <古>（方）不那样的话; 除非，如果不
meanings.example: He spoke without pretension.
meanings.example_cn: 他有话直说，不装相。

meanings.example: He complied without argument.
meanings.example_cn: 他没有争辩就服从了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 成年女子，妇女; （泛指）女性; 来自……（或做……、喜欢……等）的女子; 女工，女仆; 妻子，情人; （盛气凌人的称呼）女人
meanings.example: She's a very attractive woman.
meanings.example_cn: 她是个非常迷人的女子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 让某人与女性交往; 配备女性员工; <古>使女性化
meanings.example: Her mother was a lovely woman.
meanings.example_cn: 她母亲是个心地善良的女人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 想知道，好奇，琢磨；不知是否（用于提问或礼貌地提出请求）；感到疑惑，（对…）感到不安；感到惊讶，觉得惊奇
惊讶，惊叹；奇观，奇迹；令人惊讶的事物，令人难以置信的事物；能人，奇才，有特效的东西
绝妙的，令人惊叹的，极好的

meanings.meaning_en: the material that trees are made of
meanings.example: Put some more wood on the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 往火上再添些木柴。

meanings.meaning_en: made of wood
meanings.example: a wooden bench
meanings.example_cn: 木制长椅

meanings.meaning_en: the soft thick hair that sheep and some goats have on their body
meanings.example: a wool overcoat
meanings.example_cn: 羊毛大衣

meanings.meaning_cn: 字，词，单词; （某人说的）话，言语（words）; 简短的交谈，谈话; 命令，指示; 消息，信息; 诺言，承诺; 口角，吵架（words）; （警告、建议、赞扬的）话，话语; 歌词（words）; 一个字（所说或所写的最小量）（a word）; （不同于行动的）言，言语; 字（尤指16或32个字节的计算机数据基本单位）; 《圣经》，福音（the Word）
meanings.example: He had erased the wrong word.
meanings.example_cn: 他擦去了写错的字。

meanings.example: The appropriate word eluded him.
meanings.example_cn: 他想不起来那个合适的词。

meanings.meaning_cn: <美> （表示接受或同意别人刚说的话）就是，说得对
meanings.example: The English word 'sensible' and the French word 'sensible' are false friends.
meanings.example_cn: 英语的sensible一词和法语的sensible一词同形异义。

meanings.example: He had erased the wrong word.
meanings.example_cn: 他擦去了写错的字。

meanings.meaning_cn: 工作；[物] 功；产品；操作；职业；行为；事业；工厂；著作；文学、音乐或艺术作品
meanings.meaning_en: a job or activity that you do regularly, especially in order to earn money
meanings.example: There isn’t a lot of work at this time of the year.
meanings.example_cn: 每年这个时候工作机会都不多。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使工作；操作；经营；使缓慢前进
meanings.meaning_en: to do the activities and duties that are part of your job
meanings.example: He’s been out of work (= without a job ) for two years.
meanings.example_cn: 他失业有两年了。

meanings.example: My first job didn't work out.
meanings.example_cn: 我的第一份工作干得不好。

meanings.example: What if this doesn't work out?
meanings.example_cn: 如果这行不通怎么办呢？

meanings.example: I work out at the gym most days.
meanings.example_cn: 我多数日子都在健身俱乐部锻炼身体。

meanings.meaning_cn: 工作者，工作人员; 劳工，工人; 工作做得……的人; 工人阶级（the workers）; 工蜂，工蚁
meanings.example: She was a zealous worker for charity.
meanings.example_cn: 她是个热衷于慈善事业的工作者。

meanings.example: Meyers is a diligent and prolific worker.
meanings.example_cn: 迈耶斯是个勤奋而且出活多的工人。

meanings.example: Nuts and seeds are good sources of vitamin E.
meanings.example_cn: 坚果和种子是维生素E的良好来源。

meanings.example: He quickly vacated the gym after the workout.
meanings.example_cn: 锻炼完他很快离开了健身房。

meanings.meaning_cn: 世界，地球，天下; 星球，天体; 地区，国家，时代; 社会，生活; 领域，界，圈子; 生物界，自然界; 人生，生活圈子，阅历; 人世，今生，来世; 世俗; （有某种特色的）地方，情景; 大量，无数; 一切，重要性（the world）
meanings.example: I advance across the wide world, through all the truths of the world.
meanings.example_cn: 我在广阔的天地里前进，穿越世界的真理。

meanings.meaning_cn: 世界上最重要的，世界闻名的; 世界（性）的; 环球的
meanings.example: Kasparov became world champion.
meanings.example_cn: 卡斯帕罗夫成了世界冠军。

meanings.meaning_cn: 担心，发愁；使担忧，使发愁，使焦虑；烦扰，使不安宁（worry 的过去式和过去分词）

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel anxious about something
meanings.example: The recent changes in the Earth’s climate are beginning to worry scientists.
meanings.example_cn: 近来地球的气候变化使科学家开始担忧起来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 更糟的，更坏的，更差的; （病得）更厉害的
meanings.example: I've been to far worse places.
meanings.example_cn: 我到过糟糕得多的地方。

meanings.meaning_cn: 更坏，更差，更糟; 更糟的是，更倒霉的是
meanings.example: The situation got steadily worse.
meanings.example_cn: 局势逐渐恶化。

meanings.meaning_cn: 更糟的事，更恶劣的情况
meanings.example: Oh well, it could be worse.
meanings.example_cn: 哎，算了，情况本可能会更糟的。

meanings.meaning_en: worse than anything or anyone else
meanings.example: This is the worst recession for fifty years.
meanings.example_cn: 这是50年来最严重的一次经济衰退。

meanings.meaning_en: most badly
meanings.example: My worst fear was that we would run out of food.
meanings.example_cn: 我最大的担忧是我们会把食物吃光。

meanings.meaning_en: having a value in money, etc.
meanings.example: One of the pictures is worth £50,000.
meanings.example_cn: 其中一幅画值5万英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: how good or useful something is or how important it is to people
meanings.example: You should not deprecate your own worth.
meanings.example_cn: 你不应该贬低你自己的价值。

meanings.meaning_cn: 将，将会（will 的过去式，用于转述）; 会......（用于提出意见或征求建议时）; 会，就（表示预期或设想）; 会（表示不曾发生或不可能存在的事）; 才会，就会（说明动机）; 想（表示某人想要某物或想做某事）; 就（不），偏（不）; 请…...好吗？（表示客气地请求别人做某事）; 要不要…...？; 过去老是，过去常常; 总是，爱（带出一贯的行为）; <文>但愿…...（表示强烈的愿望）; 也许，大概（表示推测或希望）; 肯定，应该（表示有充分理由猜测是某种情况）
meanings.example: I would reject that contention.
meanings.example_cn: 我不会同意那种观点。

meanings.meaning_cn: <非正式>（表示极大的惊奇或钦佩）哇，呀
meanings.example: Wow! That's totally awesome!
meanings.example_cn: 哇！真是棒极了！

meanings.meaning_cn: <非正式> 使叫绝，博得（某人的）称赞
meanings.example: Wow, man! That's totally gnarly!
meanings.example_cn: 哇，老兄，那真是太好了！

meanings.meaning_cn: <非正式> 极大的成功，一鸣惊人之举; 音符失真，声音走音
meanings.example: I thought, "Wow, what a good idea."
meanings.example_cn: 我想: “哇，多妙的一个主意。”

meanings.meaning_cn: 写作，编写; 写道; 写信; 书写，写字; 谱写（音乐作品）; 编写（计算机程序）; 将（计算机中的）数据写入（磁盘或其他储存媒体）; 填写（表格、支票等），拟定; （笔）能写字; 拼写; <加，南非>参加（笔试）; 书写，手写（与铅印相对）; 以写作为生; 承保（保险单）
meanings.example: Write me while you're away.
meanings.example_cn: 你外出期间给我写信。

meanings.meaning_cn: 记录在书面形式中：将信息以书面形式记录下来。
meanings.example: Write down (in order of priority) the qualities you'd like to have.
meanings.example_cn: （按先后顺序）写下你所希望拥有的品质。

meanings.meaning_cn: 贬低，诋毁：通过书写方式贬低、诋毁或伤害。
meanings.example: Write down the sort of thing you would like to do, given the opportunity.
meanings.example_cn: 如果有机会，请写下你想做的那类事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 降低，贬值：降低某物的地位、等级或价值；尤指降低账面价值。
meanings.example: Find someone who will let you talk things through, or failing that, write down your thoughts.
meanings.example_cn: 找个能让你畅所欲言的人，如果不能的话，就把你的想法写下来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 降低品味、理解力或智力水平：通过书写方式降低品味、理解力或智力水平。
meanings.example: Write down (in order of priority) the qualities you'd like to have.
meanings.example_cn: （按先后顺序）写下你所希望拥有的品质。

meanings.meaning_cn: （职业的）作家，作者；执笔者，撰写人；写字……的人；（计算机）记录器；〈英，史〉文书，抄写员
meanings.example: Thomas R. Dew wrote a whole book in the wake of the state of Virginia's debates in 1832 over whether to re-write its constitution.
meanings.example_cn: 托马斯·德夫在1832年弗吉尼亚关于是否要重新制定宪法的辩论之后写了一本书。

meanings.meaning_cn: 写作，著书；作品，著作；写，书写；字迹；（书写或印刷的）文字；(某作家或专题的)着作，作品（writings）
写字；写作；写信（write的现在分词）
书面的，（协议、规定、法律等）成文的，（测验、工作等）书面的
书写；写作；写信（write 的过去分词形式）

meanings.example: I calculate he is wrong in saying that.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为他说的那句话是错误的。

meanings.meaning_en: the area around a house, usually covered with grass
meanings.example: The kids were playing in the back yard.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们在后院玩耍。

meanings.example: Uh, yeah, I guess so.
meanings.example_cn: 嗯，对，我想是这样。

meanings.example: "You got married, right?"—"Yeah, that's it."
meanings.example_cn: “你结婚了，对吧？”—“是的，没错。”

meanings.meaning_cn: 是，对；表示惊讶或反对；表示不相信
meanings.example: When I finished, he said, "Yeah. That figures."
meanings.example_cn: 我做完时，他说：“嗯，正如所料。”

meanings.meaning_cn: 年，日历年; 年，一年时间; 与某事相关的一年，年度; 学年; 年级，某年纪的学生; 年龄，年纪，岁; 很久，好长时间; 年代，时代; 年级，某年级的学生
meanings.example: They separated last year.
meanings.example_cn: 他们于去年分居了。

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of butter or the middle part of an egg
meanings.example: Yellow doesn’t suit me at all.
meanings.example_cn: 黄色一点都不适合我。

meanings.example: Yes, there's plenty of room.
meanings.example_cn: 是的，还很空呢。

meanings.example: Yes, officer, I saw what happened.
meanings.example_cn: 是，警察先生，我看到了发生的事。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize how much time will pass before something happens, or how long a situation will continue
meanings.example: ‘When’s your holiday?’ ‘Oh, not for ages yet.’
meanings.example_cn: “你什么时候去休假？”“噢，不知何年何月呢。”

meanings.meaning_en: used to introduce a fact, situation, or quality that is surprising after what you have just said
meanings.example: It could be months yet before they know their fate.
meanings.example_cn: 可能要好几个月他们才能知道自己的命运。

meanings.meaning_cn: 瑜伽，瑜伽术； 瑜伽派（印度哲学派别）
meanings.example: I always do yoga on a Monday.
meanings.example_cn: 我总是在星期一做瑜伽。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to a person or group of people when speaking or writing to them
meanings.example: Hi, Kelly. How are you?
meanings.example_cn: 嗨，凯利，你好吗？

meanings.example: You know Molly's pissed at you.
meanings.example_cn: 你知道莫莉对你很恼火。

meanings.meaning_cn: 幼小的，年轻的; 存在不久的，新成立的; （显得）年轻的，（显得）岁数不大的; 适合年轻人的; 由年轻人（或儿童）构成的，青少年的，平均年龄小的; 夭折的，早逝的
meanings.example: He's a brilliant young scientist.
meanings.example_cn: 他是一个才华横溢的青年科学家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 年轻人（the young）; 幼崽，雏鸟
meanings.example: Her grandchildren keep her young.
meanings.example_cn: 她的孙子孙女让她保持年轻。

meanings.meaning_cn: 【名】 （Young）（英、葡）扬，（柬）永，（中）杨，（广东话）威妥玛（人名）
meanings.example: She is an articulate young woman.
meanings.example_cn: 她是个善表达的年轻女子。

meanings.example: You should keep in with your colleagues.
meanings.example_cn: 你应当与你的同事友好相处。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality or state of being young
meanings.example: Despite his youth, he had travelled alone.
meanings.example_cn: 他虽然年纪还小，却已独自旅行过了。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that looks like a horse but has black and white lines all over its body
meanings.example: The neck of the zebra was nipped by a lion.
meanings.example_cn: 狮子咬断了那头斑马的脖子。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 0
meanings.example: Make x greater than or equal to zero.
meanings.example_cn: 设x大于或等于零。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area that is different from other areas around it in some way
meanings.example: San Francisco and Tokyo are both located in earthquake zones.
meanings.example_cn: 旧金山和东京都位于地震带。

meanings.meaning_en: a place, usually in a city, where animals of many kinds are kept so that people can go to look at them
meanings.example: The road to the zoo turns off here.
meanings.example_cn: 通向动物园的路由这儿拐弯。
